entries.english: Cancellation policies vary, but as of late March most coronavirus-based cancellation policies don't extend to July 2020, when the Olympics had been scheduled.

entries.luganda: Kiteberezebwa okuba nti tikiti zebikujuko ezisinga zijja kugula ¥2,500 ne ¥130,000, nga tikiti zabulijjo zigula nga ¥7,000.
entries.english: It's expected that most event tickets will cost between ¥2,500 and ¥130,000, with typical tickets costing around ¥7,000.

entries.luganda: Okugolola engoye ezitakaze burungi kiziyamba okukala. Wooteri ezisinga zirina ppaasi nekigololerwako ngakisobola okweyazikibwa, newankubadde ngomu taliimu mu kisenge.
entries.english: Ironing damp clothes can help them dry. Many hotels have an iron and ironing board available for loan, even if one is not present in the room.

entries.luganda: We waba teliwo ppaasi, oba nga tewandyagadde kwambala sokisi ngolole, osobola okukozesa ekikaza enviiri bwekibeera weekiri.
entries.english: If an iron isn't available, or if you don't fancy wearing ironed socks, then you can try using a hairdryer, if available.

entries.luganda: Wegendereze obutakiriza bigoye kwokya nyoo (ekisobola okuleetawo okufufunyala oba mumbeera ezisingawo okwokya).
entries.english: Be careful not to allow fabric to become too hot (which can cause shrinkage, or in extreme cases, scorch).

entries.luganda: Waliwo engeri nyinji ezo kutukuza amazzi, ezisinga zikola nnyo eri ebikyaafu by’omumazzi.
entries.english: There are different ways of purifying water, some more effective against specific threats.

entries.luganda: Mu bifo ebimu okufumba amazzi okumala edakiika kimala, mu bilala olina okugafumba edakiika eziwelako.
entries.english: In some areas boiling water for a minute is enough, in others several minutes are needed.

entries.luganda: Obusengejja bwawukana mu busobozi, era bw’oba olina okweralikirira, lowooza ku kugula amazzi go mu kacupa nga kasibiddwa bulungi okuva mu kitongole (kampuni) eyesigika
entries.english: Filters vary in effectiveness, and should you have a concern, then you should consider buying your water in a sealed bottle from a reputable company.

entries.luganda: Abatambuze bayinza okusingaana ebirya ebisoro byebatalabangako mubitundu jebabeera.
entries.english: Travellers may encounter animal pests that they are not familiar with in their home regions.

entries.luganda: Obuwuka obutono busobola okwonona emmere, bwesittaza, ate ebiseera ebisinga bukuleetera okwesisiwala, okusaasanya obusagwa oba okusaasanya obulwadde.
entries.english: Pests can spoil food, cause irritation, or in a worse case cause allergic reactions, spread venom, or transmit infections.

entries.luganda: Ebirwadde ebikwata byenyini,oba ensolo ez’obulabe ezisobola okutulugunya oba okutta abantu olwempaka, tebitera kubeera bisolo bya mu nimiro.
entries.english: Infectious diseases themselves, or dangerous animals that can injure or kill people by force, do not usually qualify as pests.

entries.luganda: Ebyokutambuza ebintu ebigule ebitaliiko musolo kumazzi gwe mukisa okugula ebintu okutali misolo mu bitundu ebimu.
entries.english: Duty free shopping is the opportunity to buy goods exempted from taxes and excises at certain locations.

entries.luganda: Abatambuze abali mu nsi ezirina emisolo eminji basobola okuterekawo ensimbi eziwerera ddala oburungi, naddala ku byokunywa ebirimu omwenge wamu ne ttaaba.
entries.english: Travellers bound for countries with heavy taxation can sometimes save a considerable amount of money, especially on products such as alcoholic beverages and tobacco.

entries.luganda: Akakubo wakati wa Marion ne Fairmont kekaleetela entambula nokuvug okukaluba kuluguudo lwa Buffalo-Pittsburgh, ngakayita mumiwatwa mubibira nemiwonvu egitetanirwa
entries.english: The stretch between Point Marion and Fairmont presents the most challenging driving conditions on the Buffalo-Pittsburgh Highway, passing frequently through isolated backwoods terrain.

entries.luganda: Wooba tomanyiliide kuvugilanga ku nguddo ze'nsi,sigala nga olibulindala, enguddo ezzikilila, nga ntono ate nga zilina amakona
entries.english: If you're not used to driving on country roads, keep your wits about you: steep grades, narrow lanes, and sharp curves predominate.

entries.luganda: Ebigera bya sipiidi ebyateredwawo biri wansi okusinzira ku sections azaaliwo n'ezaddako - eza bulijjo 35-40mph (56-64km/h) - ne okubigondera kikulu nnyo okusinga bulijjo.
entries.english: Posted speed limits are noticeably lower than in previous and subsequent sections — commonly 35-40 mph (56-64 km/h) — and strict obedience to them is even more important than otherwise.

entries.luganda: Olwokwesunga, wadde enkola y'amasimu ga buli wendi nkufuna ya maanyi okusinga ekirala mu lugendo, okugeza eby'omunsiko bya Pennsylvania.
entries.english: Curiously, though, mobile phone service is much stronger here than along many other stretches of the route, e.g. the Pennsylvania Wilds.

entries.luganda: Ebyabeekeri za Bugirimani birungi ddala, ate mu Bavaria, ngagga ddala, era zawulwa, okufanana ku ezo ez'abalirwana baabwe ab'omu maserengeta, Austria.
entries.english: German pastries are quite good, and in Bavaria, are quite rich and varied, similar to those of their southern neighbor, Austria.

entries.luganda: Ebyokulya ebyengano nga birimu ebibala bingi nnyo wano. Appo weziri omwaka gwonna, n’ebibala ebirala nga zi pulamu ne cherry mu sizoni y’omusana
entries.english: Fruit pastries are common, with apples cooked into pastries year round, and cherries and plums making their appearances during the summer.

entries.luganda: Emmere nyingi eya Abagirimani ebeekinga erimu almonds, hazelnuts, ne ensigo z’emiti endala. Keeki ezimanyidwa zitera okukwatagana n’ekikopo kya kaawa okusingira ddala.
entries.english: Many German baked goods also feature almonds, hazelnuts, and other tree nuts. Popular cakes often pair particularly well with a cup of strong coffee.

entries.luganda: Bwoba oyagala ebyokukanda ebitonotono naye ngabyabugagga, gezaako bino ebiyitibwa mu ddiini Berliner, Pfannkuchen oba Krapfen.
entries.english: If you want some small though rich pastries, try what depending on region are called Berliner, Pfannkuchen or Krapfen.

entries.luganda: Ekivavava zenva ezirimu ebirungo n’ebikoola, awamu nga ogaseemu enyama oba emboga.
entries.english: A curry is a dish based on herbs and spices, together with either meat or vegetables.

entries.luganda: Enva zebinzaali bisobola okuba “ebikalu ” oba “ebibisi” okusinzila ku muwendo gw'amazzi.
entries.english: A curry can be either "dry" or "wet" depending on the amount of liquid.

entries.luganda: Mu bitundu ebiri munda mu mambuka ga India ne Pakistan, bbongo batera okumukozesa mu kufumba; mu maserengeta ga India n'emubitundu ebirala ku lubalama lwa semazinga, amata okuva mu kinazi gegatera okukozesebwa.
entries.english: In inland regions of Northern India and Pakistan, yogurt is commonly used in curries; in Southern India and some other coastal regions of the subcontinent, coconut milk is commonly used.

entries.luganda: Ebizinga nga biri ,17000 okulondako, emmere ya Indonesia lulimi lwa manvuli lubika eby'enjawulo ebisinga obunene ebyemmere yomukitundu esangibwa okwetolola egwanga.
entries.english: With 17,000 islands to choose from, Indonesian food is an umbrella term covering a vast variety of regional cuisines found across the nation.

entries.luganda: Naye bwekiba nga kikozzeseddwa nga tekuli bilala, kitegezza nti emere eno eva mu bitundu by’amakati oba ebuvva njuba yebitundu byebizinga bya Java
entries.english: But, if used without further qualifiers, the term tends to mean the food originally from the central and eastern parts of the main island Java.

entries.luganda: Kati kisangibwa buli wantu mu archipelago, Javanese emere eyenjawulo n’enve ezenjawulo, ebisingayo mu kutabula Javanese favour okuba nga peanuts,kamulali,sukali( okusingira ddala sukali wa bajavanese ow’ekinazi) ne birungo ebilala ebuwunya obulungi
entries.english: Now widely available throughout the archipelago, Javanese cuisine features an array of simply seasoned dishes, the predominant flavorings the Javanese favor being peanuts, chillies, sugar (especially Javanese coconut sugar) and various aromatic spices.

entries.luganda: Ebirinyirwako embalaasi biwanirira ebigere by’omuvuzi ebiba bireebeeta ku buli ludda lwa amatandiiko.
entries.english: Stirrups are supports for the rider's feet that hang down on either side of the saddle.

entries.luganda: Biwa obusobozi eri oyo a ba avuga naye era n’obukumi okusinzira kubusobozi bwe ebigere byoyo aba avuga nga alemereddwa.
entries.english: They provide greater stability for the rider but can have safety concerns due to the potential for a rider's feet to get stuck in them.

entries.luganda: Omuvuzi w’embalaasi bwa gwa nga avuga embalaasi okugulu kwe nekulaalira mu muguwa, ayinza okusikibwa singa embalaasi esigala nga edukka. Okusobola okuziyiiza a kacwano, obwegenderaza bungi butekebwaa wo.
entries.english: If a rider is thrown from a horse but has a foot caught in the stirrup, they could be dragged if the horse runs away. To minimize this risk, a number of safety precautions can be taken.

entries.luganda: Ekisooka, abavuzzi abasinga bayambalanga butu eriko akakondo nga kawewevu era ng aka soole katonotono
entries.english: First, most riders wear riding boots with a heel and a smooth, quite narrow, sole.

entries.luganda: Ekidako, byebisiba, nadala ebizungu, bilina ebisenge ebikuuma nebikiriza amaliba okugwa okuva kubisenge singa gaba gasikidwa okudda emabega nga omuvuzi avuga.
entries.english: Next, some saddles, particularly English saddles, have safety bars that allow a stirrup leather to fall off the saddle if pulled backwards by a falling rider.

entries.luganda: Ekiko kye Cochamó - Chile's ekyakabi okuwalampa, kimanyidwa nga Yosemite mu South America, ngamulimu amayinja agenjawulo agekika kya granite n'ebisenge ebinene n'olwazi.
entries.english: Cochamó Valley - Chile's premier climbing destination, known as the Yosemite of South America, with a variety of granite big walls and crags.

entries.luganda: Ku ntikko y'olusozi kuliko ebyokulabwaako ebinyuvu okukamala. Abawalampa ensozi okuva mu bitundu by'ensi yonna bulijjo batondawo amakubo nga bayita mu bisenge byabwe ebitakoma.
entries.english: Summits include breath-taking views from peaks. Climbers from all parts of the world are continually establishing new routes amongst its endless potential of walls.

entries.luganda: Emizannyo gya bbalaafu w'okulusozi, okuli okuvugira mu muzira ne snowboarding, gye mizannyo egimanyikiddwa okuli okukirira omuzira wansi nga olina obugatto bwa bbalaafu oba ka snowboard nga bakasibye ku bigere byo.
entries.english: Downhill snowsports, which include skiing and snowboarding, are popular sports involving sliding down snow-covered terrain with skis or a snowboard attached to your feet.

entries.luganda: Okukola goggolo ku muzira kye kinti ekisinga okukolebwa abatambuze nga waliwo abakyagala ennyo, ekimanyikiddwa nga “ski bums”, bateekateeka oluwummula lyonna mu kifo kye kimu.
entries.english: Skiing is a major travelling activity with many enthusiasts, occasionally known as "ski bums," planning entire vacations around skiing at a particular location.

entries.luganda: Akazanyo k’okuvugira ku muzira kadda-empuku ezasiigirwa ziriko abavugira ku muzira mu myaka gya 5000 BC!
entries.english: The idea of skiing is very old — cave paintings depicting skiers date back as far as 5000 BC!

entries.luganda: Okwebonga ng'okirira olusozi ng'omuzannyo guddirayo ddala emabega nga mu kyasa kya 17th, era mu 1861 kilabu y'okwebonga eyasooka yaggulwawo aba Noweegi mu Australia.
entries.english: Downhill skiing as a sport goes back to at least the 17th century, and in 1861 the first recreational ski club was opened by Norwegians in Australia.

entries.luganda: Okupakira emabega ne ski: Ekikolwa kino kisobola n’okuyitibwa emabega w'ensi ski, Okulambula ski oba okuwalampa ski.
entries.english: Backpacking by ski: This activity is also called backcountry ski, ski touring or ski hiking.

entries.luganda: Kyefananyirizanga naye tekitera kwenyigirwamu musono gwa alpine mu kuwalampa ensozi, ebirala byo bikolebwa mu biwonvu binene era kyetagisa magetisi engumu okubyenganga.
entries.english: It is related to but usually not involving alpine style ski touring or mountaineering, the latter ones done in steep terrain and requiring much stiffer skis and boots.

entries.luganda: Lowooza ku kkubo lya skiing nga eryefanaanyiriza ne ely'okulinnya ensozi.
entries.english: Think of the skiing route as of a similar hiking route.

entries.luganda: Mu mbeera ennungi ojakusobola okutwaala ebbanga eddeneko okusinga okutambula naye lumu nalumu lwoka ojjakufuna spiidi ya cross country nga obuuka nga tolina nsawo ey’amaanyi mu kubo ebbi
entries.english: In good conditions you will be able to cover somewhat greater distances than walking – but only very seldom you will get the speeds of cross country skiing without a heavy backpack in groomed tracks.

entries.luganda: Bulaaya ssemazinga ntonotono naye elina ensi ezirina obwetwaze nnyingi. Mu mbeera ezabulijjo, okutambulira mu nsi eziwerako kibeera kitegeeza oteekedwa okuyita mu kusaba visa nabakwasaganya pasipoota enfunda eziwerako.
entries.english: Europe is a continent that is relatively small but with many independent countries. Under normal circumstances, travelling through multiple countries would mean having to go through visa applications and passport control multiple times.

entries.luganda: AKatundu ka Schengen, wabula , kakola nga ensi emu mu ngeri eno.
entries.english: The Schengen zone, however, works somewhat like one country in this respect.

entries.luganda: Kasita osigala mu kitundu kino, osobolera ddala okusala ensalo nga toyise nate mu bitongole ebikebera passipoota z'abantu.
entries.english: As long as you stay in this zone, you can generally cross borders without going through passport control checkpoints again.

entries.luganda: Okwfananyirizako, okufuna Schengen visa, tewetaga kusaba visaeri buli muntu mu Schengen munsi ezenjawulo,n’okukuma obbudde,sente ne papula.
entries.english: Similarly, by having a Schengen visa, you do not need to apply for visas to each of the Schengen member countries separately, hence saving time, money and paperwork.

entries.luganda: Tewali kunyonyole kutongole engeri ebikolebwa jebiri ebikadde. Ebitongole by’emisolo binnyonyola eby’amguzi ebisukka mu myaka ekikumi (100) nga ebikadde
entries.english: There is no universal definition for which manufactured items are antiques. Some tax agencies define goods older than 100 years as antiques.

entries.luganda: Ennyinnyonnyola eyawukanamu mu bitundu ebyenjawulo, ekkomo ku myaka eyinza okuba enyimpi okugeza nga mu mambuka ga Amerika okusinga mu Bulaaya
entries.english: The definition has geographic variations, where the age limit might be shorter in places such as North America than in Europe.

entries.luganda: Ebyamaguzi ebyeemikono biyinza okutwalibwa mu bikadde, newankubadde nga bito ku byamaguzi ebirala ebikolebwa
entries.english: Handicraft products might be defined as antiques, though they are younger than similar mass-produced goods.

entries.luganda: Ebyobulunzi byengabi kintu kyakwebezaawo kirungi mu ba Sámi nebyobuwangwa ebyotolodde ebyobusuubuzi kyamugaso eri abo abalina ebyokukola ebirala.
entries.english: Reindeer husbandry is an important livelihood among the Sámi and the culture surrounding the trade is important also for many with other professions.

entries.luganda: N’emubuwangwa, yadde sibona aba Sami babadde benyigidde mu kulunda okunene okwa reindeer, naye babeerawo olw’okuvuba okuyigga n’ebyefananyiriza, nga balina reindeer okusinga nga ensolo zo kumilawo
entries.english: Even traditionally, though, not all Sámi have been involved in big scale reindeer husbandry, but lived from fishing, hunting and similar, having reindeer mostly as draft animals.

entries.luganda: Ensangi zino, abasaami bangi bakolera mu mawanga amasuubuzi. Ebyobulambuzi kintu kirungi ekireeta ssente mu Sapmi mu kitundu kya Sami.
entries.english: Today many Sámi work in modern trades. Tourism is an important income in Sápmi, the Sámi area.

entries.luganda: Newankubadde nga kikozesebwa nnyo, naddala mu Batali ba ruumi, ekigambo “momboze” kitwaalibwa nga ekivumo kubanga kikozesebwa n’endowooza, nokufumiitiriza okutali kutuufu kw’abantu abaruumi
entries.english: Though it is widely used, especially among non-Romani, the word "Gypsy" is often considered offensive because of its associations with negative stereotypes and inaccurate perceptions of Romani people.

entries.luganda: Ensi joobadde ogenda okukyallira bweba nga efuuse nsonga eri omuwi wa magezi mu bye ntambula, ebyobulamu byentambula ebya insurance oba okusazibwamu okw’olugendo lwo kuyinza okukosebwa.
entries.english: If the country you will be visiting becomes subject to a travel advisory, your travel health insurance or your trip cancellation insurance may be affected.

entries.luganda: Wandyaggadde okwebuuza ku gavumenti naye okuwabulwa kwabwe kwa batuuze baabwe .
entries.english: You may also wish to consult the advice of governments other than your own, but their advice is designed for their citizens.

entries.luganda: Okugezza, abayizi abamerika mu nsi z’abuwalabbu bassanga embbera yanjawulo ku bayizi abangereza oba abawarabbu
entries.english: As one example, American citizens in the Middle East might face different situations from Europeans or Arabs.

entries.luganda: Abawabuzi babeera bufunze bwembeera yabufuzi mu nsi emu.
entries.english: Advisories are merely a brief summary of the political situation in one country.

entries.luganda: Endowooza eziragibbwa sinnambulukufu, ez'awamu nga zigonzeddwa nyo okugerageranya n'obubaka obunnyonyole obulungi obusangibwa ewalala
entries.english: The views presented are often cursory, general and oversimplified compared to the more detailed information available elsewhere.

entries.luganda: Embeera y’obudde embi kye kigambo ekikozesebwa ku budde nga butabuse nga busubirwa okukola obuvune , okutankula ebintu, wamu n’okufiirwa obulamu.
entries.english: Severe weather is the generic term for any dangerous weather phenomenon with the potential to cause damage, serious social disruption, or loss of human life.

entries.luganda: Obudde obubi busobola okutuuka mu kifo kyonna mu nsi, waliyo ebika binji, bisinziira ku.
entries.english: Severe weather can occur anywhere in the world, and there are different types of it, which can depend on geography, topography, and atmospheric conditions.

entries.luganda: Omuyaga ogwamaanyi, kibuyaga, obunyogovu obuyitiridde, n’omuliro byebimu ku ngeri era ebiva mu mbeera y’obudde embi nga bwekiri ku nkuba eyamaanyi, kikunta, omuzira n’obunyogovu.
entries.english: High winds, hail, excessive precipitation, and wildfires are forms and effects of severe weather, as are thunderstorms, tornadoes, waterspouts, and cyclones.

entries.luganda: Emberra y’obudde embi eberamu, omuzira, empewo eyamanyo, omuzira gw’empewo
entries.english: Regional and seasonal severe weather phenomena include blizzards, snowstorms, ice storms, and dust storms.

entries.luganda: Abatambuze bakutirwa n’amaanyi okwekengera akatyabaga ak'embeera y’obudde eyamaanyi ekosa ekitundu kyaabwe, nga kisobola okutataganya entekateka z'okutambula.
entries.english: Travellers are strongly advised to be aware of any risk of severe weather affecting their area as they may affect any travel plans.

entries.luganda: Omuntu yenna asuubira okukyalira ensi eyinza okubaamu entalo alina okufuna okuyigirizibwa okwekikugu.
entries.english: Anyone planning a visit to a country that could be considered a war zone should get professional training.

entries.luganda: Okunonyeleza ku mutimbagano okunonya embbera etali nungi eyinza okuletela ekifo kampuni eyo kyebelamu
entries.english: A search of the Internet for 'Hostile environment course' will probably provide the address of a local company.

entries.luganda: Koosi elina okumalayo byonna ebyogedwaako wanno mubujuvu, nga mulimu nebilabikako.
entries.english: A course will normally cover all the issues discussed here in far greater detail, usually with practical experience.

entries.luganda: Akazannyo katera okubeera ka naku 2-5 ate nga mulimu okuzannya ebitundu ebyenjawulo, okujjanjaba kunji ebiseera ebimu n’okutendeka kw’ebissi.
entries.english: A course will normally be from 2-5 days and will involve role play, a lot of first aid and sometimes weapons training.

entries.luganda: Ebitabo ne zi magaziini ebikola Ku kubeera mu dungu bili buli wamu , Naye ate ebirango ebikwaata Ku bitundu byentalo bitono.
entries.english: Books and magazines dealing with wilderness survival are common, but publications dealing with war zones are few.

entries.luganda: Abatambulira mu lyaato nga bateekateeka okwegandanga wabweeru w’ensi yaabwe balina okukakasa nt balina ebibogerako ebitanagwaako okusobola olugendo lw’amadda.
entries.english: Voyagers planning sex reassignment surgery abroad must ensure they're carrying valid documents for the return trip.

entries.luganda: Obwetegefu bywa gavumenti okugaba pasipoota nga ekikula ky’omuntu tekyanukuddwa (X) oba empapula nga zikyusiddwa okusobola okufaanana erinya oba ekikula byanjawulo.
entries.english: The willingness of governments to issue passports with gender not stated (X) or documents updated to match a desired name and gender varies.

entries.luganda: Obuddumabikalula bwa gavumenti z'ebweru okusaamu ekitiibwa ebiwandiiko bino ekyukakyuka nyo.
entries.english: Willingness of foreign governments to honour these documents is just as widely variable.

entries.luganda: Okukebera mu bifo ebikebererwamu abebyokwerinda byongedde okunyingiriza oluvannyuma lwa 11 Mutunda, 2001 omulembe guno.
entries.english: Searches at security checkpoints have also become far more intrusive in the post-September 11, 2001 era.

entries.luganda: Abantu abaakyuusa ekikula tebasuubira okuyita mu buuma obukebera nga tebalingiriziddwa
entries.english: Pre-operative transgender people should not expect to pass through the scanners with their privacy and dignity intact.

entries.luganda: Amayengo ga Rip gatambula gakomyaawo amayengo amakutufu kutufu kulubalama, emirundi mingi ku biyinja oba ekibyeefananyiriza.
entries.english: Rip currents are the returning flow from waves breaking off the beach, often at a reef or similar.

entries.luganda: Olwokubumbulukuka kwamazzi agali wansi amazzi agakomawo gali mubutundu burtonotono, era amazzi agadduka gasenebwa okuva eyo.
entries.english: Due to the underwater topology the return flow is concentrated at a few deeper sections, and a fast current to deep water may form there.

entries.luganda: Okuffa okusinga kubeerawo kulwa obukoowu nga bagezako okuwuga okuwakanya amayeengo, ekisobola okubeera ekizibu.
entries.english: Most deaths happen as result of fatigue trying to swim back against the current, which may be impossible.

entries.luganda: Mangu ddala nga omaze okufuluma ejjengo, okuddamu okuwuga sikizibu nate okusinga ekyabulijjo.
entries.english: As soon as you get out of the current, swimming back is no more difficult than normally.

entries.luganda: Gezaaako okusinziirira awantu wotta genda kuddamu kwatibwa neera oba,okusinziira ku bukugu bwo n’okubanga oba otegereeddwa, oyinza okwagala okulinda okununulwa.
entries.english: Try aiming somewhere where you are not caught again or, depending on your skills and on whether you have been noticed, you might want to wait for rescue.

entries.luganda: Ekikangabwa kyokuddamu kikukuba wala n’okusinga ekyamawanga, era kilwawo nyo ate ne kikukossa nyo
entries.english: Re-entry shock comes on sooner than culture shock (there's less of a honeymoon phase), lasts longer, and can be more severe.

entries.luganda: Abatambuze abalina akaseera akangu okukyuusa mu neeyisa empya ebiseera ebisinga bafuna akaseera akazibu okuddayo mu neeyisa yabwe enkadde.
entries.english: Travellers who had an easy time adjusting to the new culture sometimes have a particularly hard time readjusting to their native culture.

entries.luganda: Bwodd’ewaka nga obadde oberra mu nsi z’ebweru, oberra ofunye eneyissa empya era nga olina ezzewamwe zewelabidde
entries.english: When returning home after living abroad, you've adapted to the new culture and lost some of your habits from your home culture.

entries.luganda: Bwewagenda ebweru ogwasooka, abantu bali bakkakamu ate nga bategeevu, ngabakimanyi nti abasenze era abatambuze bayina okumanyira ekifo.
entries.english: When you went abroad at first, people were probably patient and understanding, knowing that travellers in a new country need to adapt.

entries.luganda: Abantu bayinza obutakilowoozako nti obugumiikiriza n’okutegeragana bikulu nyo eri abo abatambuze abada eka.
entries.english: People may not anticipate that patience and understanding are also necessary for travellers returning home.

entries.luganda: Omuzannyo ogwa pyramid sound and light gwe gumu ku bintu ebisinga mu kitundu ku baana.
entries.english: The pyramid sound and light show is one of the most interesting things in the area for kids.

entries.luganda: Piramidi zirabikira mu nzikiza era osobola okuziraba nga akazannyo tekanatandika.
entries.english: You can see the pyramids in the dark and you can see them in silence before the show begins.

entries.luganda: Otera okuwulira edoboozi lya abalambuzi n’abatunzi. olugero lw’edoboozi n’ekitangala lulinga olugero lw’omukatabo.
entries.english: Usually you always here the sound of tourists and vendors. The story of the sound and light is just like a story book.

entries.luganda: Eikulekle kyi teredwawo emabega nga omusoyisoyi anyumywa olugero oluwanvu.
entries.english: The Sphinx is set as the backdrop and the narrator of a long story.

entries.luganda: Ebyakolwa biragibwa kumikutu era pilamiidi ezenjawulo zimyansa.
entries.english: The scenes are displayed on the pyramids and the different pyramids are lit up.

entries.luganda: Ebizinga by’amaserengeta ga Shetland, byaazuulibwa mu 1819, bikaayanirwa amawanga manji era bye bisinga amakanda, n’omuwendo gwa kumi na mukaaga mu 2020
entries.english: South Shetland Islands, discovered in 1819, are claimed by several nations and have the most bases, with sixteen active in 2020.

entries.luganda: Archipelago eri mu km 120 eza Peninsula. Esinga obunene kye kizinga kya King George n'obutebenkevu obwa Villa Las Estrellas.
entries.english: The archipelago lies 120 km north of the Peninsula. The largest is King George Island with the settlement of Villa Las Estrellas.

entries.luganda: Abalala okuli akazinga ka Livingstone , ne byobulimba nga wano wewaabadde obuyanja obwabooze ku nsozi eziwanda omuliro ziwa akaffo akalungi akamaato we gawumulira.
entries.english: Others include Livingston Island, and Deception where the flooded caldera of a still-active volcano provides a spectacular natural harbour.

entries.luganda: Ettaka lya Ellsworth kyekitundu mumaserengeta gakataka akeetolodwa amazzi, agali mu guyanja Bellingshausen.
entries.english: Ellsworth Land is the region south of the Peninsula, bounded by the Bellingshausen Sea.

entries.luganda: Ensozi z’omu peninsula wano zegatta mu kifo ate nezeyongera okwegatta okukola olujegere lw’ensozi za Ellsworth olwakilometre 360 ga zawulwamu Minnesota Glacier.
entries.english: The mountains of the Peninsula here merge into the plateau, then re-emerge to form the 360 km chain of the Ellsworth Mountains, bisected by the Minnesota Glacier.

entries.luganda: Amambuka oba amasekati ga Sentinel galina ensozi za Antarctica ezisinga obuwanvu, e Vinson Massif, peaking at 4892 m Mount Vinson.
entries.english: The northern part or Sentinel Range has Antarctica's highest mountains, the Vinson Massif, peaking at 4892 m Mount Vinson.

entries.luganda: Mu bifo ebyeewala, omutali mutimbagano gwa masimu, ekisimu kyomulongooti kye kyokka kyosobola okukozesa.
entries.english: In remote locations, without cell phone coverage, a satellite phone may be your only option.

entries.luganda: Essimu zemilongooti ssi zezidda mukifo kyobusimu buli wendi nkufuna, kubanga otekedwa okubeera ebweru ngolabira ddala bulungi omulongooti okusobola okukuba essimu.
entries.english: A satellite phone is not generally a replacement for a mobile phone, as you have to be outdoors with clear line of sight to the satellite to make a phone call.

entries.luganda: Enkola eno etera kweyambisibwa okutambuza ebyamaguzi, ngamuno mwemuli nebyokunyumirwa, era nebitundu ebitalina byetaago bya yitintaneti byamaloboozi.
entries.english: The service is frequently used by shipping, including pleasure craft, as well as expeditions who have remote data and voice needs.

entries.luganda: Omuweereza wamwe owokussimu alina okubeera nga asobola okuwa obubaka obulala nga buli ku kugata kweno empeereza.
entries.english: Your local telephone service provider should be able to give more information about connecting to this service.

entries.luganda: Embeera eyeyongedde okubaawo kati mwabo abaagala okutambula kwekuyosa omwaka nebalamb.ula ate nebayiga
entries.english: An increasingly more popular option for those planning a gap-year is to travel and learn.

entries.luganda: Kino naddala kikyasinze kwelimbika mu bava mu masomero, okubasobozesa okufuna omwaka wabweru nga tebaneeyunga ku ssematendekero, ngatebataataganyiza byakusoma kwabwe.
entries.english: This is especially popular with school leavers, allowing them to take a year out before university, without compromising their education.

entries.luganda: Ebiseera ebisinga,okusaba ekifo awo kusomera ky’omwaka kisoboola okutereza awamu n’okusa ku bitabo byoba osomye okuva mu nsi yamwe.
entries.english: In many cases, enrolling on a gap-year course abroad can actually improve your chances of moving into higher education back in your home country.

entries.luganda: Kyabulijjo wajakubawo okusasula ebisale okwetaba munteekateeka z’okusoma zino.
entries.english: Typically there will be a tuition fee to enroll in these educational programs.

entries.luganda: Finland nsi nnungi okuwumulirako amaato. Ettaka lyennyanja lukumi” kayina obuzinga obuwerera ddala lukumi ne archipelagos ezokulukalu.
entries.english: Finland is a great boating destination. The "Land of a thousand lakes" has thousands of islands too, in the lakes and in the coastal archipelagos.

entries.luganda: Mubidiba ne munyanja teweetaga ryaato.
entries.english: In the archipelagos and lakes you do not necessarily need a yacht.

entries.luganda: Wadde nga embalama zenyanja n’amayanja amanene gasobola okubeerako amaato amanene, Amato amatono n’obwaato bwawukana nyo mukusaabaza.
entries.english: Although the coastal archipelagos and the biggest lakes are indeed big enough for any yacht, smaller boats or even a kayak offer a different experience.

entries.luganda: Okuvuga eryaato kikolebwa abantu ba Finland okuyisa ku budde, nga buli ryaato liyina abantu musanvu oba munaana.
entries.english: Boating is a national pastime in Finland, with a boat to every seven or eight people.

entries.luganda: Zino zisazibwa Norway, Sweden ne New Zealand, naye ekitali ekyo kyanjawulomu (okugeza mu Netherlands namba eri Omu ku buli ana).
entries.english: This is matched by Norway, Sweden and New Zealand, but otherwise quite unique (e.g. in the Netherlands the figure is one to forty).

entries.luganda: Ezimu ku meeri za Baltic ez’enkizo ziberako akaseera akongezedwayo mu St. Petersburg, Russia.
entries.english: Most of the distinct Baltic Cruises feature an extended stay in St. Petersburg, Russia.

entries.luganda: Kino kitegeeza osobola okukyaala mu kibuga ky’ebyafaayo okumala ennaku eziwerako nga bw’odda okusula ku mmeeri ekiro.
entries.english: This means you can visit the historic city for a couple of full days while returning and sleeping on the ship at night.

entries.luganda: Singa osobola okugenda ku mwaalo okuwumuza ku billowozo oba okujaguza mu nemikwano jjo, togenda kweetaga Visa yanjawulo (okuva 2009)
entries.english: If you only go ashore using shipboard excursions you will not need a separate visa (as of 2009).

entries.luganda: Amaato agamu galiko Berlin, Bugirimaani mu butabo. Nga bwosobola okulaba ku maapu eyo waggulu Berlin terina weeri kumpi ne ssemayanja era okukyala mu kibuga tekutekebwa ku miwendo gy’eryato.
entries.english: Some cruises feature Berlin, Germany in the brochures. As you can see from the map above Berlin is no where near the sea and a visit to the city is not included in the price of the cruise.

entries.luganda: Okutambulira mu nnyonyi kintu kitiisa nyoo eri abantu abemyaka jona n’okusingira dala singa baba tebagitambulirangamu ko ekintu ekitiisa.
entries.english: Travelling by plane can be a scary experience for people of all ages and backgrounds, particularly if they've not flown before or have experienced a traumatic event.

entries.luganda: Si kye kintu ekirina okuswazza: tekyawukana nyo n’okutya oba obutayagala bintu bimu nga abantu abamu bwebabela
entries.english: It is not something to be ashamed of: it is no different from the personal fears and dislikes of other things that very many people have.

entries.luganda: Eri abamu, okutegeera ekintu kungeri ekisaawe jekikolamu nekibeerawo ku nyonyi kiyinza okuyamba okumalawo okutya okusinziira kubitamanyidwa oba kubutabeera mumitambo.
entries.english: For some, understanding something about how aircraft work and what happens during a flight may help to overcome a fear which is based on the unknown or on not being in control.

entries.luganda: Kkampuni ezisitula emigugu zisasula burungi okutambuza ebintu mu bwangu. Luberera , obudde buba bwamugaso nnyo eri ebiwandiiko bya bizinesi, ebyamaguzi oba supeeya okudabirizibwa bunambiro.
entries.english: Courier companies are well paid for delivering things quickly. Frequently, time is very important with business documents, merchandise or spare parts for an urgent repair.

entries.luganda: Ku ngendo ezimu, kkanpuni ennene zirina ennyonyi zaazo, naye ku ngendo endala ne kkampuni entono, waaliwo obuzibu.
entries.english: On some routes, the larger companies have their own planes, but for other routes and smaller firms there was a problem.

entries.luganda: Bwebaba nga baweleza ebintu ku nyonyi, kiyinza okutwala enaku eziwela nga ziyitila mu b’omusolo.
entries.english: If they sent things by air freight, on some routes it may have taken days to get through unloading and customs.

entries.luganda: Engeri yokka eyabadde ekusobozesa okusindika bunambiro kwabadde kukisindika ngekikeberedwa. Amateeka agafuga enyonyi tegasobola kukiriza kusindika migug ngatekuli musaabaze, era ngawano woyingiriramu.
entries.english: The only way to get it through faster was to send it as checked luggage. Airline regulations will not allow them to send luggage without a passenger, which is where you come in.

entries.luganda: Engeri enyangu ey’okubuukira mu mutindo gwe nnyonnyi omullungi kwe kukozesa sente enyinji ko ezabaggagga (oba, ekyo nakyo, funa kampuni yo ekikukolere).
entries.english: The obvious way of flying in first or business class is to fork out a thick wad of money for the privilege (or, better yet, get your company to do it for you).

entries.luganda: Lwakuba, kino tekijja ku bbeyi ntono: ngamateeka amakakali ku kigalo ekisajja, otebereza okusasula emirundi ena ku bisale bya bizinensi, nemirundi kkumi nagumu mu kkalaasi esooka.
entries.english: However, this does not come cheap: as rough rules of thumb, you can expect to pay up to four times the normal economy fare for business, and eleven times for first class!

entries.luganda: Nga twogeleraddala, tewali nansonga mukusaba ebeeyi esalibweeko mukiffo eky’ebyenfuna oba oba mukiffo ky’okumwanjo kulugendo oluleega obuleezi okuva ku A okuda ku B.
entries.english: Generally speaking, there is no point in even looking for discounts for business or first-class seats on direct flights from A to B.

entries.luganda: Abatambuza enyonyi bamanyi bulungi nnyo nti waliwo ekibinja ky’abantu ekimu abaagala okwongela ku doola olw’okwagala okutuuja mubiffo ebimu amangu era mumirembe, nebasasula nga bwebatambudde.
entries.english: Airlines know well that there is a certain core group of flyers who are willing to pay top dollar for the privilege of getting somewhere fast and in comfort, and charge accordingly.

entries.luganda: Ekibuga ekikulu ekya Moldova kiyitibwa Chişinău. Olulimi lwebogela lu Roma naye olwe Russia lwelusinga okozzesebwa okwetolola.
entries.english: The capital of Moldova is Chişinău. The local language is Romanian, but Russian is widely used.

entries.luganda: Moldova nsi erina amawanga ag’enjawulo ebonyebonye enyoo n’entalo zamawanga.
entries.english: Moldova is a multi-ethnic republic that has suffered from ethnic conflict.

entries.luganda: Mu mwaka gwa 1994, olutalo lwalettawo ensi ya Transnistria mu buvva njuba bwa Moldovia, abalina gavumenti eyabwe n’ensimbi ezzabwe naye nga ensi z’amawanga amagatte tezibakililiamu.
entries.english: In 1994, this conflict led to the creation of the self-proclaimed Transnistria Republic in eastern Moldova, which has its own government and currency but is not recognised by any UN member country.

entries.luganda: Enkolagana mu by'enfuna zikomyewo wakati w;enjuyi mu Moldova newankubadde nga enteseganya mu by’abobufuzzi zalemaganye
entries.english: Economic links have been re-established between these two parts of Moldova despite the failure in political negotiations.

entries.luganda: Eddiini enkulu mu Moldova lyelya abakristu abasodookisi.
entries.english: The major religion in Moldova is Orthodox Christian.

entries.luganda: Izmir kye, kibuga ekyokusatu mubugazi mu Turkey nno obunji bwabantu abakomekeleza mu bukadde busatu, olubalama olwa amaguzi olwokubili mubugazi nga ovudde Istanbul, nne ebyentabula ebilungi.
entries.english: İzmir is the third largest city in Turkey with a population of around 3.7 million, the second biggest port after Istanbul, and a very good transport hub.

entries.luganda: Kyaliko ekibuga ekikadde ekya Smryana, kati kyamulembe, kikuzze, era kiffo ekyakayisanyo eky’ebyobusuubuzi, ekyateebwa amazzi wegawetera era kilinaanye ensozi.
entries.english: Once the ancient city of Smyrna, it is now a modern, developed, and busy commercial center, set around a huge bay and surrounded by mountains.

entries.luganda: Boulevards engazi, nga zirina endabirwaamu ez’omumaaso n’amaduuka agomulembe zitonedwa nobusolya obwa tayilo emyuufu ezedda, akatale kekyaasa ekye 18, nemizikiti namakanisa ebikadde, yadde nga ekibuga kilina embeera esingako eya Mediterranean bulaya okusinga Butuluki eyedda.
entries.english: The broad boulevards, glass-fronted buildings and modern shopping centers are dotted with traditional red-tiled roofs, the 18th century market, and old mosques and churches, although the city has an atmosphere more of Mediterranean Europe than traditional Turkey.

entries.luganda: Ekyaalo kya Haldarsvík kiwa endowooza ku kizinga Eysturoy ekiriranye awo era erina ne kanisa etali yabulijjo eyensonda omunana
entries.english: The village of Haldarsvík offer views of the nearby island Eysturoy and has an unusual octagonal church.

entries.luganda: Mu lujja lw'ekkanisa, waliyo ebibumbe eby’ejjiba ebyakolebwa mu mayinja ku bijja ebimu.
entries.english: In the churchyard, there are interesting marble sculptures of doves over some tombs.

entries.luganda: Kitwala ekitundu kye sawa okutambulatambula mu kyalo ekisanyusa.
entries.english: It's worth half an hour to stroll about the intriguing village.

entries.luganda: Mu mambuka era kumpimpi ke Kabuga k’omukwano atte nga keewunyisa aka Sintra era akamanyiddwa eno eri abagwiira olw’ekitiibwa ky’ako nga be kwawandiikibwa Lord Byron .
entries.english: To the north and within easy reach is the romantic and fascinating town of Sintra and which was made famous to foreigners after a glowing account of its splendours recorded by Lord Byron.

entries.luganda: Scotturb busi 403 etabula buli lunaku okugenda e Sintra, n’ewumula ku Cabo da Roca.
entries.english: Scotturb Bus 403 travels regularly to Sintra, stopping at Cabo da Roca.

entries.luganda: Era mumambuka kyalako ku kijukizo ky’omutukirivu Fatima (essabo), ekifo ekiteeberezebwa okulabikiramu biikira Maria.
entries.english: Also to the north visit the great Sanctuary of Our Lady of Fatima (Shrine), a place of worldwide famous Marian apparitions.

entries.luganda: Kyolina okujjukira nti oggenda kulaba entana y’abantu abaffa bangi, era ngakabinja abantu bangi mu nsi yona abazikibwamu
entries.english: Please remember that you are essentially visiting a mass grave site, as well as a site that has an almost incalculable meaning to a significant portion of the world's population.

entries.luganda: Wakyaaliyo abasajja nabakyaala bangi abalamu abasimattuka mu kiseera lwe baaliyo, nabalala banji abaalina abaagalwa abattibwa oba abaakola paka kuffa, Abayudaaya nabatali bonna awamu
entries.english: There are still many men and women alive who survived their time here, and many more who had loved ones who were murdered or worked to death there, Jews and non-Jews alike.

entries.luganda: Bambi kwata omukutu guno nekitiibwa okyetaagisa, iobwekusifu nekitiibwa gyebugwana. Tonyomola oba kwogera bisesa kuba Nazi oba aba Holocaust.
entries.english: Please treat the site with all of the dignity, solemnity and respect it deserves. Do not make jokes about the Holocaust or Nazis.

entries.luganda: Totasanga kizimbe nga olamba oba otakula bi gulafuti mu bi bumbe
entries.english: Do not deface the site by marking or scratching graffiti into structures.

entries.luganda: Olulimi olwa Barcelona olukakativu luli Catalan ne Spanish. Ekitundu kya bantu bagala kwogera Catalan, abantu banji abalutegeera, ate nga buli omu amanyi Spanish.
entries.english: Barcelona's official languages are Catalan and Spanish. About a half prefer to speak Catalan, a vast majority understands it, and virtually everyone knows Spanish.

entries.luganda: Naye era obubonero obusinga bulagibwa mu Catalan woka kubanga lwalagirwa mumateeka nga lwelulimi olwasooka okutongozebwa.
entries.english: However, most signs are indicated only in Catalan because it is established by law as the first official language.

entries.luganda: Ate nga olu Spanish lwogerwa muntabula ezolukale nemubifo ebirala.
entries.english: Yet, Spanish is also widely used in public transport and other facilities.

entries.luganda: Ebirango mu ggaali y’omukka eya Metro bikolebwa mu lulimi lwa Catalan, naye amawulire agaggwa gatalaze gasomebwa munimi ezenjawulo nga, Spanish, olungereza, olufalansa, oluwarabu n’olujapan.
entries.english: Regular announcements in the Metro are made only in Catalan, but unplanned disruptions are announced by an automated system in a wide variety of languages including Spanish, English, French, Arabic and Japanese.

entries.luganda: Aba Paris bamanyidwa okuba nga beefako bokka, bakambwe ate basiwuufu bampisa.
entries.english: Parisians have a reputation for being egocentric, rude and arrogant.

entries.luganda: Wadde nga kinno kitela okubeera nga sikifananyi kituukiridde engeri esinga okukola mu Paris kwekusigala kumpisa enungi ezisingayo, nga weyisanga omuntu “bien élevé”(ayakuzibwa obulungi). Ojja kwanguyirwa okubeerayo.
entries.english: While this is often only an inaccurate stereotype, the best way to get along in Paris still is to be on your best behavior, acting like someone who is "bien élevé" (well brought up). It will make getting about considerably easier.

entries.luganda: Ebintu byebweru ebyegombolola bijja kusaanuka nnyo bwoteekamu obukwakulizo obwenjawulo.
entries.english: Parisians' abrupt exteriors will rapidly evaporate if you display some basic courtesies.

entries.luganda: E Plitvice Lakes national park waliyo ekibira kinene,naddala ne beech, spruce, ne fir trees, ne bintu mu Alpine ne Mediterranean vegetation
entries.english: The Plitvice Lakes national park is heavily forested, mainly with beech, spruce, and fir trees, and features a mixture of Alpine and Mediterranean vegetation.

entries.luganda: Kilina ebieera bingi mu kifo kyabwe olw’embera y’obudde eyenjjawulo, n’ettakka, nenjawukana zobuwanvu mu ttaka.
entries.english: It has a notably wide variety of plant communities, due to its range of microclimates, differing soils and varying levels of altitude.

entries.luganda: Ekitundu era nga maka eri ebinyonyi wamu nensolo nnyingi ezenjawulo.
entries.english: The area is also home to an extremely wide variety of animal and bird species.

entries.luganda: Ekisolo ekyenjawulo nantalabikalabika okugeza ngekibwa kyebulaaya ekyakitaka,omusege,empungu,empologoma,ekiwugulu,kamusungusungu bisobola okusangibwa eyo, wamu nebintu ebirala ebigwa mu kkowe elyo.
entries.english: Rare fauna such as the European brown bear, wolf, eagle, owl, lynx, wild cat and capercaillie can be found there, along with many more common species

entries.luganda: mukukyalila ebifo eitukuvvu, abakyala balina okwambala engoye ezzibikililaddala amavivi n’ebibegabega byabwe.
entries.english: While visiting the monasteries, women are required to wear skirts covering the knees and have their shoulders covered, too.

entries.luganda: Amasinzizo agasinga gawa abakazi abazze batetegese buleesu, naye bwoleeta akako naddala nga kalina langi enkyamufu, wewangulira akamwenyumwenyu okuva eri bakabona oba ababikira ku mulyango.
entries.english: Most of the monasteries do provide wraps for women who come unprepared, but if you bring your own, especially one with bright colors, you'll get a smile from the monk or nun at the entrance.

entries.luganda: Ku lukalala Lwe lumu, abasajja betagisa okwambala empale empaavu ezibikka amavivi.
entries.english: Along the same line, men are required to wear trousers covering the knees.

entries.luganda: Kino nakyo kisobola okweyazikibwa kw’ebyo ebiri ku mulyango naye engoye ezo tezolezzebwa buli kisera nga zzambaddwa nolwekyo oyinza obutaba mugumu. Sayizi emu etukka bona!
entries.english: This too can be borrowed from the stock at the entrance but that clothing isn't washed after every user so you may not feel comfortable wearing these skirts. One size fits all for men!

entries.luganda: Emere ya Majorcan, yefananyiriza mu nga eye’bifo byaMediterranean, naddala ku mugaati , ebibala ne nyyama (naddala ey’embizziera nga bakozesesa buto wa olive wona.
entries.english: Majorcan cuisine, like that of similar zones in the Mediterranean, is based on bread, vegetables and meat (specially pork), and uses olive oil throughout.

entries.luganda: Ekyeggulo ekyangu ekimanyikidwa, naddala mu budde bwomusana, lwelu Pa amb Oli: Omugaati omuli omuzigo gw'omuzabbibu, ennyanya, n'ebyongerwako ebirala okugeza omuzigo, ekyenyanja kya tuna n'ebirala.
entries.english: A simple popular dinner, especially during the summer, is the Pa amb Oli: Bread with olive oil, tomato, and any available condiments such as cheese, tunafish, etc.

entries.luganda: Ennukuta zonna, nga kwootade ekigambo Sie ku lulwo, zonna zisoosako ennukuta enene, ne mumakati g’olunyiriri.
entries.english: All nouns, alongside the word Sie for you, always begin with a capital letter, even in the middle of a sentence.

entries.luganda: Eno eri emu ku ngeri y’okwawula wakati w’ebintu n’ebikotana.
entries.english: This is an important way to distinguish between some verbs and objects.

entries.luganda: Kikaayanirwa okugonza okusoma, newankubadde okuwandiika kukalubamu olwobwetaavu bwookumanya oba ekikolwa oba nakongeza kikolwa kikozeseddwa mu ngeri entuufu
entries.english: It also arguably makes reading easier, though writing is somewhat complicated by the need to find out whether a verb or adjective is used in a substantivized form.

entries.luganda: Okwatula ebigambo kwangu nnyo mu luyitale okusinziira nti ebigambo ebisinga byogerwa nga bwe biwandiikibwa.
entries.english: Pronunciation is relatively easy in Italian since most words are pronounced exactly how they are written

entries.luganda: Ennukuta ez’okwegendereza ye c ne g, kubanga enjogera yazo esiinzira ku nnukuta zinakongeeza egoberera.
entries.english: The main letters to watch out for are c and g, since their pronunciation varies based on the following vowel.

entries.luganda: Era kakasa okwatula r ne rr nga byawukana: caro kitegeeza ow’omukwano, ng’ate Carro kitegeeza eggaali.
entries.english: Also, make sure to pronounce r and rr differently: caro means dear, whereas carro means chariot.

entries.luganda: AbaPersia balina oluzungu olusinga okubeera olutereevu.
entries.english: Persian has a relatively easy and mostly regular grammar.

entries.luganda: N'olwekyo, okusoma ebisokerwako mu olulimi luno kisobola okuyamba okuyiga bingi ku lulimi lwa baperusi. Era n'otegeera bulungi eby’ogerwa.
entries.english: Therefore, reading this grammar primer would help you learn much about Persian grammar and understand phrases better.

entries.luganda: Tekyetagisa kwogera, oba omanyi olulimi lwomukwano kija kubelera kyangu gwe okuyiga olu potugo.
entries.english: Needless to say, if you know a Romance language, it will be easier for you to learn Portuguese.

entries.luganda: Naye, abantu abamanyi olu Spanish olutonotono bayinzi okuwunzika nti olu Portuguese lwefananyiriza ekimala nti telwetaaga kusomebwa lwokka.
entries.english: However, people who know a little Spanish may hastily conclude that Portuguese is close enough that it need not be studied separately.

entries.luganda: Ekisenge mwe balabira ebintu ebiri mu bwengula tebikyalina nyo mugaso ennaku zino era byasigarila kubela nga birabirwako nga ebyafaayo ebye dda oba ebifo byebasomako.
entries.english: Pre-modern observatories are usually obsolete today, and remain as museums, or sites of education.

entries.luganda: Okwonoona kw’omusana tekyalinga kizibu munnaku zabwe ez’ettuttumo nga bwekiri kati, bitera okusangibwa mu bibuga oba ebisulo, byangu okutuukako okusinga ebyo ebyazimbibwa mu nkola empya.
entries.english: As light pollution in their heyday was not the kind of problem it is today, they are usually located in cities or at campuses, easier to reach than those built in modern times.

entries.luganda: Ebirengelela ewala ebisinga eby’omulembe binene nnyo mu biffo ebyabaavu n’emmbeera y’obudde enungi.
entries.english: Most modern research telescopes are enormous facilities in remote areas with favorable atmospheric conditions.

entries.luganda: Okulaba obumuli bwa cherry blossom ekimanyidwa nga harami, kibadde kyabuwanga mu ba Japani okuvva mu kyasa ky’omunana.
entries.english: Cherry blossom viewing, known as hanami, has been a part of Japanese culture since the 8th century.

entries.luganda: Edowooza yava China ebimuri bya plum blossoms webisinga okukozesebwa.
entries.english: The concept came from China where plum blossoms were the flower of choice.

entries.luganda: Mu Japani, obubaga bw'obumuli bwabadde mu maka ga kabaka ng'era yekka n'abagagga abalala bebaabadeyo.
entries.english: In Japan, the first cherry blossom parties were hosted by the emperor only for himself and other members of the aristocracy around the Imperial Court.

entries.luganda: Ebimera bifanana bulungi nyoo nga biri mumbera yabyo ey’obutonde bwensi, Kale gaana okukemebwa okujawo “nebwekiba kika kimu”.
entries.english: Plants look their best when in a natural environment, so resist the temptation to remove even "just one" specimen.

entries.luganda: Bwekiba nti okukyalira enimiro eyateekebwa teekebwa okujayo”ebilabirwaako” kijja kuleetera okujibwaayo nga tewali kuteesa.
entries.english: If visiting a formally arranged garden, collecting "specimens" is also going to get you ejected, without discussion.

entries.luganda: Singapore kye kifo ekikyasinze okubere n’obukumi era nga kyangu nnyo n’okulambula, era nga osobola okugula ekinti kyona nga wa katuka.
entries.english: Singapore is generally an extremely safe place to be and very easy to navigate, and you can buy almost anything after arriving.

entries.luganda: Naye okutekebwa mu “ebitundu ebiriranye yikweta” diguli ntono okuva mu mambuka ga yikweta otekeddwa okukwatagana n'ebbugumu (bulijjo) awamu n'omusana ogw'amaanyi (ng'obwengula bulabika bulungi, tebulabika nnyo).
entries.english: But being placed in the "high tropics" just a few degrees north of equator you will need to deal with both heat (always) and strong sun (when the sky is clear, more rarely).

entries.luganda: Waliwo ne bus entonotono ezigenda mu mambuka ga Hebron, ekifo ekyebyobuwangwa ekizikibwamu abamanyi babayibuli okuli Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, ne bakyala babwe.
entries.english: There are also a few buses going north to Hebron, the traditional burial place of the Biblical patriarchs Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and their wives.

entries.luganda: Kebera nti baasi gy'olowoozako okukwaata egenda mu Hebron si mu bifo bya Bayudaya ebiri okumpi ne Kiryat Arba.
entries.english: Check that the bus you are thinking of taking goes into Hebron and not just to the nearby Jewish settlement of Kiryat Arba.

entries.luganda: Amazzi gomunda mutwe mulungi okusinziirako okukolerako oluwumula.
entries.english: Inland waterways can be a good theme to base a holiday around.

entries.luganda: Eky'okulabilako ebizimbe eby'okukyaala mu biwonvu bya Loire, ekiwonvu kya Rhine oba okuvuga mu bibuga ebinyuma ku Danube oba okutwaala eryatowelisimba Ku Erie.
entries.english: For example visiting castles in the Loire Valley, the Rhine valley or taking a cruise to interesting cites on the Danube or boating along the Erie Canal.

entries.luganda: Nabbo banyonyola enguudo ezimanyidwa mukuwanika n’okuvugira ku nguudo z’ebyuuma.
entries.english: They also define routes for popular hiking and cycling trails.

entries.luganda: Ssekukulu lwelumu kunaku enkulu mu nzikiriza yabakristu, ate era lujaguzibwa nga amazalibwa ga Yesu.
entries.english: Christmas is one of the most important holidays of Christianity, and is celebrated as the birthday of Jesus.

entries.luganda: Eby’obuwangwa ebisinga ebyetolodde oluwummula bikopeddwa abo abatakkiriza munsi za balokole nabo abatali balokole munsi yonna.
entries.english: Many of the traditions surrounding the holiday have been adopted also by non-believers in Christian countries and non-Christians around the world.

entries.luganda: Waliwo akakolomoni kokuyita mu kiro kyamazuukira ngotunula mu kyangaala okusobola okulaba omusana ngaguvaayo.
entries.english: There's a tradition to pass the Easter night awake at some exposed point to see the sunrise.

entries.luganda: Era ddala waliwo ebinyonyolwa mu bukulisitaayo olwobuwangwa buno, naye era ddala kisobola okubeera sepulingi yabatanafuuka bakirisitu oba abebyokuzaala.
entries.english: There are of course Christian theological explanations for this tradition, but it may well be a pre-Christian Spring and Fertility ritual.

entries.luganda: Ekkanisa nyingi ez’edda zitera okukola olumbe ku kiro kya Wamunyi nga wiikendi ya Ppasika, nga abantu bajaguza essawa weziwera mukaaga ezekiro okusobola okujaguza amazuukira ga Kiristo.
entries.english: More traditional churches often hold an Easter Vigil on Saturday night during the Easter weekend, with the congregations often breaking into celebration at the stroke of midnight to celebrate Christ's resurrection.

entries.luganda: Ebisolo byonna ebyatuuka ku kizinga byajja nga biwuga, bibuukila mu bbanga oba nga biseyeya ku nyanja.
entries.english: All animals that originally arrived in the islands came here either by swimming, flying or floating.

entries.luganda: Olw’olugendo oluwanvu okuva mu kizinga ky’abantu tebasobola kukola lugendo olukola enfudu semafuddu ensolo erya ekitono mu Galapagos.
entries.english: Due to the long distance from the continent mammals were unable to make the journey making the giant tortoise the primary grazing animal in the Galapagos.

entries.luganda: Okuva kukutuuka kwomusajja mu Galapagos, ebisolo bingi ebyanjudwa omuli embuzi, engamiya, ente, emmese, kkapa nembwa.
entries.english: Since the arrival of man to the Galapagos, many mammals have been introduced including goats, horses, cows, rats, cats and dogs.

entries.luganda: Bw'okyalira ebitundu bya Arctic oba Antarctic mu biseera by'obunyogovu ojja kulaba ekiro ekitangaavu, ekitegeeza nti omusana teguva waggulu w'ensi.
entries.english: If you visit the Arctic or Antarctic areas in the winter you will experience the polar night, which means that the sun doesn't rise above the horizon.

entries.luganda: Kino kiwaayo omukisa omulungi okulaba Aurora Borealis, nga engulu bwerija okubeera eridugavu oba oli awo n’okusingawo okwetoloola esaawa.
entries.english: This offers a good opportunity to see the Aurora borealis, as the sky will be dark more or less around the clock.

entries.luganda: Engeri ebitundu gye birina abantu abesudde, okusasaana kw’empewo embi okutonotono sikizibu ebiseera ebimu, ojja kusobola okunyumirwa emunyeenye.
entries.english: As the areas are sparsely populated, and light pollution therefore often not a problem, you will also be able to enjoy the stars.

entries.luganda: Enkola y'emirimu y'Abajapaani ey'obuwangwa egoberera ebitiibwa n'ebikolwa mu butongole okusinga abava Ebugwanjuba gye bamanyidde.
entries.english: Japanese work culture is more hierarchical and formal that what Westerners may be used to.

entries.luganda: Masuuti bye byambalo by’emirimu eby'omulembe, n’abakozi beeyita mannya gaabwe ag’ekika oba beyita amannya g’emirimu gyabwe.
entries.english: Suits are standard business attire, and coworkers call each other by their family names or by job titles.

entries.luganda: Okubeera obumu ku mulimu kikulu, kyongera okulaga amaanyi mu bumu okusinga okutenderaza omu byakoze.
entries.english: Workplace harmony is crucial, emphasizing group effort rather than praising individual accomplishments.

entries.luganda: Abakozi bayina okufuna okukirizibwa bakama babwe kunsalawo gyebaba bakoze, era nga basubirwa okukiriza ebiragiro by’abo ababa babasingako nga tewali kubuza.
entries.english: Workers must often get their superiors' approval for any decisions they make, and are expected to obey their superiors' instructions without question.

entries.luganda: Ku balaza, Banasayansi okuva mu setendekero ya Stanford ku somero ly'ebyedagala balangirira okuvumbulwa kwa akuuma akakebera nga kasobola okusengeka obutafaali nga kasinzira kukika kyabwo: Akuuma katono akasobola okufulumizibwa ku lupapula akasobola okukolebwa ne Printa enungi ku sente entono nga emu eya US buli kamu.
entries.english: On Monday, scientists from the Stanford University School of Medicine announced the invention of a new diagnostic tool that can sort cells by type: a tiny printable chip that can be manufactured using standard inkjet printers for possibly about one U.S. cent each.

entries.luganda: Abakulira abanoonyereza bagamba nti kino kijakuleetawo okukeberwa amangu endwadde nga kookolo, akafuba, sirimu n’omusuja mu balwadde munsi eziteesobola, eyo okuwona endwadde nga kokoolo wamabeere kutono ddala okusinga munsi engaga.
entries.english: Lead researchers say this may bring early detection of cancer, tuberculosis, HIV and malaria to patients in low-income countries, where the survival rates for illnesses such as breast cancer can be half those of richer countries.

entries.luganda: Aba JAS 39C Gripen basasanila mu luguudo ku saawa nga 9:30 ezokumakya ezawano (0230 UTC) ne byaabika, okugala ekisaawe ky’enyonyi ku kutambuza kwebyamaguzi.
entries.english: The JAS 39C Gripen crashed onto a runway at around 9:30 am local time (0230 UTC) and exploded, closing the airport to commercial flights.

entries.luganda: Omuvuzi wenyonyi yategerekeka nga omukulembeze wa Squadron Dilokrit
entries.english: The pilot was identified as Squadron Leader Dilokrit Pattavee.

entries.luganda: Amawulire agakuno galaga ekimotoka kyomuliro ekyevulungudde nga kiduukilira.
entries.english: Local media reports an airport fire vehicle rolled over while responding.

entries.luganda: Vidal ow’emyaka 28 ej’obukulu yali yakegata ku tiimu ya baserona sizoni satu emabega okuva mu sevilla.
entries.english: 28-year-old Vidal had joined Barça three seasons ago, from Sevilla.

entries.luganda: Okuva lwenasengukira mu kibuga ekikulu ekya Catalan, Vidal yali yakasamba kirabu ye emipiira 49.
entries.english: Since moving to the Catalan-capital, Vidal had played 49 games for the club.

entries.luganda: Okwekalakaasa kwataandika kussaawa nga 5 ezaawano(UTC+1) ku kitebe kya Whitehall ekitunudde mu Downing Street ekuumibwa abapoliisi, mumaka ga saabaminisita amatongole.
entries.english: The protest started around 11:00 local time (UTC+1) on Whitehall opposite the police-guarded entrance to Downing Street, the Prime Minister's official residence.

entries.luganda: Nga zakayita ku ssaawa 11:00, abeekalakaasi baziba emmotoka mu Northbound ezaali zigenda mu kizimbe ekyeru.
entries.english: Just after 11:00, protesters blocked traffic on the northbound carriage in Whitehall.

entries.luganda: Ku saawa 5:20, polisi yabuziza abekalakaasi okuda emabega kukabalaza, nga egamba nti betaaga okwenkanyankanya edembe ly’okwekalakaasa n’akalipagano k’ekizimbe wagulu.
entries.english: At 11:20, the police asked the protesters to move back on to the pavement, stating that they needed to balance the right to protest with the traffic building up.

entries.luganda: Awo kusaawa 11:29, okwekalakaasa kwatuuse kukitebe kyekizimbe ekyeru, ngawakayisa ku kitebe kya Trafalgar, awo kubukubo, ngoyise ku Aldwych awo nga ku luguudo lwa kabaka okuliraana Holborn ab’ekibina ekifuzi webaateeka olukiiko mu biyumba bya wooteri ya Grand Connaught.
entries.english: Around 11:29, the protest moved up Whitehall, past Trafalgar Square, along the Strand, passing by Aldwych and up Kingsway towards Holborn where the Conservative Party were holding their Spring Forum in the Grand Connaught Rooms hotel.

entries.luganda: Likooda ya Nadal eyobwenyi kubwenyi ku ba Canada eri 7-2.
entries.english: Nadal's head to head record against the Canadian is 7–2.

entries.luganda: Juuzi wano, aba Raonic mu mpaka za Brisbane eziguddwawo baamusiinga.
entries.english: He recently lost against Raonic in the Brisbane Open.

entries.luganda: Nadal yakola obuboneero 88% mu muzanyo nga obubonnero 76 yabufuna mu kitundu ekyasooka.
entries.english: Nadal bagged 88% net points in the match winning 76 points in the first serve.

entries.luganda: Nga omuzannyo guwedde, Kabaka w’ebbumba yagamba, “Ndi mu chamufu okukomawo mu mpaka ezaakamalirizo ezisinga okuba ezoomugaso. Ndi wano kuwangula.”
entries.english: After the match, King of Clay said, "I am just excited about being back in the final rounds of the most important events. I am here to try to win this."

entries.luganda: “Empapula za panama” kyekikozesebwa manvuuli ez’okugelagelanya n’obukadde kumi obwebiwandiiko okuva mu kampuni y’ebyamateeka y’epanamanian Mossack Fonseca, zagwakubamawulire mu gatonya wa 2016.
entries.english: "Panama Papers" is an umbrella term for roughly ten million documents from Panamanian law firm Mossack Fonseca, leaked to the press in spring 2016.

entries.luganda: Ebiwandiiko byalaga banka kkumi nannya eziyamba abaggaga okukweka obuwumbi mu sente za America okwewonya emisolo ne obukwakulizo.
entries.english: The documents showed fourteen banks helped wealthy clients hide billions of US dollars of wealth to avoid taxes and other regulations.

entries.luganda: Eggulire ly'Abangereza elya omukuza (The Guardian) lyatesezza nti banka ya Deutsche Bank ekwasaganya kumpi ebitundu bisatu lu 1200 eza kampuni za shell ezikozesebwa okumaliriza kino.
entries.english: British newspaper The Guardian suggested Deutsche Bank controlled roughly a third of the 1200 shell companies used to accomplish this.

entries.luganda: Waliwo okwekalakaasa mu nsi yona, abasibe nebasindikibwa ku arimanda era abakulembeze ba Iceland ne Pakisitani ne balekulira.
entries.english: There were protests worldwide, several criminal prosecutions, and the leaders of the governments of Iceland and Pakistan both resigned.

entries.luganda: Nga yazalibwa mu Hong Kong, Ma yasomela mu tendekelo e New York ne Havard era nga yalina obutuze bwa Amerika obw’oluberera oba “kkaada yakiragala.”
entries.english: Born in Hong Kong, Ma studied at New York University and Harvard Law School and once held an American permanent resident "green card".

entries.luganda: Hsieh yategeza mukulonda nti Ma ayinza okudduka mu ggwanga mu kaseera kakasambattuko.
entries.english: Hsieh implied during the election that Ma might flee the country during a time of crisis.

entries.luganda: Hsieh yaggumiza nti Ma asinga okunyimila ebifanaanyi alina emisono okusinga ettutumu.
entries.english: Hsieh also argued that the photogenic Ma was more style than substance.

entries.luganda: Newankubadde ba muwaayira, Ma yawangula ku ndowooza erwanirira enkolagana ey'amaanyi n’ekibuga kya China.
entries.english: Despite these accusations, Ma won handily on a platform advocating closer ties with the Chinese mainland.

entries.luganda: Olwaleero omuzanyi w'olunaku ye Alex Ovechkin ow'ebibuga bya Washington.
entries.english: Today's Player of the Day is Alex Ovechkin of the Washington Capitals.

entries.luganda: Yayina goolo biiri awamu n’okuyambwako mu Washington's 5-3 okuwangulwa kwaba Atlanta Thrashers.
entries.english: He had 2 goals and 2 assists in Washington's 5-3 win over the Atlanta Thrashers.

entries.luganda: Ovechkin yasoka kuyamba mumuzanyo ogwaliwo ekiro, eyateba golo yali Nicklas Backstrom
entries.english: Ovechkin's first assist of the night was on the game-winning goal by rookie Nicklas Backstrom;

entries.luganda: Goolo ye ey'okubiri gye yateebye ekiro kya leero yeyawezezza goolo ye 60 mu sizoni, era ye musambi asoose okuweza goolo 60 mu sizoni emu okuva mu 1995-1996, Jaromir Jagr nne Mario Lemieux buli omu bwe yakikola.
entries.english: his second goal of the night was his 60th of the season, becoming the first player to score 60 or more goals in a season since 1995-96, when Jaromir Jagr and Mario Lemieux each reached that milestone.

entries.luganda: Batten bamulinyisa mu kifo kya 190th mu 2008 mu bamerica ebikumi 400 abasinga obuggaga ebibalirirwa mu $2.3 billion.
entries.english: Batten was ranked 190th on the 2008 400 Richest Americans list with an estimated fortune of $2.3 billion.

entries.luganda: Yattikirwa mu kolegi ya sayansi nebyokusiiga mu ssetendekero lya Virginia mu 1950 era yali mugabi wabuyambi wankukunala mu kitongole ekyo.
entries.english: He graduated from the College of Arts & Sciences of the University of Virginia in 1950 and was a significant donor to that institution.

entries.luganda: Ekkomera lya Abu Gharib lyakolezebwaako omuliro nga bekalakasa.
entries.english: Iraq's Abu Ghraib prison has been set alight during a riot.

entries.luganda: Ng’amagye g’abamerika gamaze okutwala obuyinza eri ekomera elyo, kyazulibwa nti abasibe bali batulugunyizibwa nyo, era nelimanyika nyo olwekyo.
entries.english: The jail became notorious after prisoner abuse was discovered there after US forces took over.

entries.luganda: Piquet Jr. yafuna akabenje mumpaka ze motoka eza Singapore 2008, oluvanyuma lwa Fernando Alonso okuyimirira okukyusa emipiira; emotoka enkuumi kwekuyingira wo.
entries.english: Piquet Jr. crashed in the 2008 Singapore Grand Prix just after an early pit stop for Fernando Alonso, bringing out the safety car.

entries.luganda: Emotoka ezaali mu maaso ga Alonso bwe zagenda okunywa amafuta mu motoka yokwekumisa, yeyongeddeyo mu maaso okulya obuwanguzi.
entries.english: As the cars ahead of Alonso went in for fuel under the safety car, he moved up the pack to take victory.

entries.luganda: Piquet Jr yagobebwa oluvanyuma lw’emisinde ejja 2009 ejja Hungarian Grand Prix.
entries.english: Piquet Jr. was sacked after the 2009 Hungarian Grand Prix.

entries.luganda: Ku saawa 8:46 am zenyini akasirikiriro kabunye ekibuga, ne kikola nga akaseera ennyonyi eyasooka lwe yatuukiriza ekigendererwa kyayo.
entries.english: At exactly 8:46 a.m. a hush fell across the city, marking the exact moment the first jet struck its target.

entries.luganda: Amataala ag’amanyi gateegekedwa okumulisa mubire ekiro kyona.
entries.english: Two beams of light have been rigged up to point skywards overnight.

entries.luganda: Okuzimba kugenda mu maaso ku bizimbe bitano nga kuliko entambula, ekifo n’ekijukilwamu abantu wakati
entries.english: Construction is ongoing for five new skyscrapers at the site, with a transportation center and memorial park in the middle.

entries.luganda: Sho ya PBS erina awaadi za Emmy ezisoba mu daziini bbiri, nobudde bwaayo bumpiko ku bwa Sesame Street ne Mister Rogers' Neighborhood.
entries.english: The PBS show has more than two-dozen Emmy awards, and its run is shorter only than Sesame Street and Mister Rogers' Neighborhood.

entries.luganda: Buli katundu ak’omuzanyo kalina okwesigama ku mubala mu katabo akenjawulo ate oluvanyuma omubala ogwo gutabaale mu ngero ez’enjawulo.
entries.english: Each episode of the show would focus on a theme in a specific book and then explore that theme through multiple stories.

entries.luganda: Buli lulaga lwandilaze obutabo bwebagaliza abaana banoonye nga bagenze mu terekero lebitabo.
entries.english: Each show would also provide recommendations for books that children should look for when they went to their library.

entries.luganda: John Grant, okuva e WNED Buffalo (Nsoma ewaka wa Musoke) na’agamba “Okusoma ku Musoke kwayigiriza abaana okusoma,…okwagala okusoma — [omwoleso] gwazzaamu amanyi abaana okukwata ekitabo ne bakisoma.”
entries.english: John Grant, from WNED Buffalo (Reading Rainbow's home station) said "Reading Rainbow taught kids why to read,... the love of reading — [the show] encouraged kids to pick up a book and to read."

entries.luganda: Kikirizibwa abamu, ngamuno mwotwalide John Grant, nti abakitandikawo nabalina obumanyiririvu mu kusoma obwongo nti abakola mu pulogulaamu za ttiivi eziyigiriza zakola kyamanyi okukomekereza bino ebyaliwo.
entries.english: It is believed by some, including John Grant, that both the funding crunch and a shift in the philosophy of educational television programming contributed to ending the series.

entries.luganda: Omuyagga ogwamanyi gwabadde mailo lukaaga ana mu tano 645 mayilo (1040 km)mu bugwanjuba bwekizinga Cape Verde gwabuzze nga tegunatukka mu bifo byokumpi, abakuggu bwebalanze.
entries.english: The storm, situated about 645 miles (1040 km) west of the Cape Verde islands, is likely to dissipate before threatening any land areas, forecasters say.

entries.luganda: Fred alina kati embuyaga ya mayiro 105 buli sawa (165km/h) era etambula nga Edda mu mambuka gebugwa njuba.
entries.english: Fred currently has winds of 105 miles per hour (165 km/h) and is moving towards the northwest.

entries.luganda: Fred ye tropiko cyclone ow'amaanyi luberera amanyiddwa mu maserengeta n'Ebuvanjuba mu Antlantic okuva ku kutandika kwa satellite imagery era ye hurricane yokka eyokusatu eyamaanyi ku likodi ebuva njuba obwa 35 °W.
entries.english: Fred is the strongest tropical cyclone ever recorded so far south and east in the Atlantic since the advent of satellite imagery, and only the third major hurricane on record east of 35°W.

entries.luganda: Mu gwomwenda nga 24, 1759, Arthur Guiness yasasulira liizi yamyaka 9000 eri abesogolero lyomutukuvu James Gate mu Durbin ekisangibwa mu Ireland.
entries.english: On September 24, 1759, Arthur Guinness signed a 9,000 year lease for the St James' Gate Brewery in Dublin, Ireland.

entries.luganda: Emyaka 250 oluvanyuma, Ginesi ekulidde ddala nefuuka bizinensi ekolera ddala ensimbi eziwererera ddala obuwumbi bwa euro 10 (US$14.7 buwumbi) buli mwaka.
entries.english: 250 years later, Guinness has grown to a global business that turns over 10 billion euros (US$14.7 billion) every year.

entries.luganda: Omusomi wa maapu owa Jonny Reid ku tiimu ya New Zealand eya A1GP leero akoze ebyafaayo bwavuze endiima ekyasinze olutindo lwa Auckland Harbour olw'emyaka.
entries.english: Jonny Reid, co-driver for the A1GP New Zealand team, today made history by driving the fastest over the 48-year-old Auckland Harbour Bridge, New Zealand, legally.

entries.luganda: Mwami Reid yasobola okuvuga emmotoka ya AIGP wa New Zealand, emanyidwa nga Black Beauty Ku mbiro za 160km/h emirundi musanvu Ku lutindo.
entries.english: Mr Reid managed to drive the New Zealand's A1GP car, Black Beauty at speeds over 160km/h seven times over the bridge.

entries.luganda: Polisii ye New Zealand yasanzze obuzibu okukozesa ebyuma byabwe okumanyi supidi Mwami Reid gyeyabaddeko era engeri yoka gyebasoboddemu nga akendezezza supidi okutuka ku kilomita kikumi mu nkagga buli sawa
entries.english: The New Zealand police had trouble using their speed radar guns to see how fast Mr Reid was going because of how low Black Beauty is, and the only time the police managed to clock Mr Reid was when he slowed down to 160km/h.

entries.luganda: Mu myezi egiyise 3, abasibe abasukka mu 80 baateebwa okuva mu Kkomera nga tebanasalirwa misango mu butongole.
entries.english: In the last 3 months, over 80 arrestees were released from the Central Booking facility without being formally charged.

entries.luganda: Mu gw’okuna omwaaka gunno, ekiragiro ekitali kyankalakalira ekyikaatiriza kyaweebwa omulamuzi Glynn okuteeka munkola okusumulula abo ababa bakwatidwa okusuka esaawa 24 nga babayingiza nga tebafunye kuwulirwa kamisona wakooti.
entries.english: In April this year, a temporary restaining order was issued by Judge Glynn against the facility to enforce the release of those held more than 24 hours after their intake who did not receive a hearing by a court commissioner.

entries.luganda: Kamisona yatadewo okununulibwa bwekuba kukirizidwa n'emisango ejamutekebwako ofiisa eyamukwata. Emisango olwo negiyingizibwa mu kompyuta jegulondoleerwa.
entries.english: The commissioner sets bail, if granted, and formalizes the charges filed by the arresting officer. The charges are then entered into the state's computer system where the case is tracked.

entries.luganda: Okuwulira omusango nakwo kuteekawo olunaku lwateberezebwa okwenyigira mukuzza omusango okufuna okugezesebwa okwamangu.
entries.english: The hearing also marks the date for the suspect’s right to a speedy trial.

entries.luganda: Petero Costello, omukunganya wensimbi mu Australia nomusajja asuubirwa okuba nga yajja okusikira ssabaminisita John Howard ngomukulu qwekibiina kyabakyewaggula alaze obuwagizi bwe eri yindasitule yamasanyalaze mu Australia.
entries.english: Peter Costello, Australian treasurer and the man most likely to succeed Prime Minister John Howard as Liberal party leader has thrown his support behind a nuclear power industry in Australia.

entries.luganda: Mwaami Costello yagamba nti enkola y’amaanyi ganukilya gafuuka ekyamaguzi ekyetunzi, Australia elina okunoonya engeri yokugakozesa.
entries.english: Mr Costello said that when nuclear power generation becomes economically viable, Australia should pursue its use.

entries.luganda: “Singa kigendda ku katale, tujja kukifuna. Tewali kawaayiro kagana kukozesa masanyalaze ga nukiliya,” mwami Costello bweyayogedde.
entries.english: "If it becomes commercial, we should have it. That is, there's no in-principle objection to nuclear energy" Mr Costello said.

entries.luganda: Okusinziira ku Ansa, poliisi yasoose kutya nti okulwanaga okw'ekika kya waggulu kuyinza okuletawo olutalo lw’ani anadda mu ntebe.
entries.english: According to Ansa, "police were concerned by a couple of top-level hits they feared might spark a full-blown war of succession.

entries.luganda: Poliisi yagambye nti Lo Piccolo yabadde n’okugonzebwa kubanga yabadde nfa nfe wa Provenzano mu Palermo era obukuggu bwe n’okumanya kwamuweesa ekitibwa eri bakama be abakulu nga bagoberera engeri ya Provenzano okusigala nga tebeyoleka nyo naye nga bagaziya amatwale gabwe.
entries.english: Police said Lo Piccolo had the upper hand because he had been Provenzano's right-hand man in Palermo and his greater experience won him the respect of the older generation of bosses as they pursued Provenzano's policy of keeping as low as possible while strengthening their power network.

entries.luganda: Abakulu bano baakugirwa ne Provenzano bweyateeka ekomo Ku lutalo lwa Riina-driven olwali lulwanyisa egwanga olwamalawo obulamu bwaba abalwanyi ba Mafia Giovanni Falcons ne Paolo Borsellino my 1992.
entries.english: These bosses had been reined in by Provenzano when he put an end to the Riina-driven war against the state that claimed the lives of Mafia crusaders Giovanni Falcone and Paolo Borsellino in 1992."

entries.luganda: Ssenkulu wa Apo Steve Mirimu yabikula ekyuuma nga atambula eri sitegi n’okujja iPhone okuva munsawo za jiini ye.
entries.english: Apple CEO Steve Jobs unveiled the device by walking onto the stage and taking the iPhone out of his jeans pocket.

entries.luganda: Okusinzira mu bigambo bye byaweredde essawa ebiri agambye”leera Apple egenda okukola e ssimu,leero tugenda ku kola ebyafayo.”
entries.english: During his 2 hour speech he stated that "Today Apple is going to reinvent the phone, We are going to make history today".

entries.luganda: Brazil yensi ekyasinze Abakatuliki mu nsi yona, era Keleziya Y’abakatuliki ewakanyiza nyo okumala ebbanga okukiliza abantu b’obutonde obumu okufumbiraganwa.
entries.english: Brazil is the largest Roman Catholic country on Earth, and the Roman Catholic Church has consistently opposed the legalization of same-sex marriage in the country.

entries.luganda: Paliyamenti ye Brazil ekubaganyizza ebilowozo ku myaka ekumi ku bufumbo obwo mulamuzi wa kooti era n’olwekyo obufumbo buno bukilizibwa mu Rio Grande do Sul yoka
entries.english: The National Congress of Brazil has debated legalization for 10 years, and such civil marriages are currently only legal in Rio Grande do Sul.

entries.luganda: Ebago eryasookawo lyakolebwaako omukulu w’ekibuga kya São Paulo, Marta Suplicy. Eteeka elyatesesbwaako, ngalimazze okukolebwa, kati lili mu ngalo za Roberto Jefferson.
entries.english: The original bill was drafted by former mayor of São Paulo, Marta Suplicy. The proposed legislation, after being amended, is now in the hands of Roberto Jefferson.

entries.luganda: Abekalakasi basuubira okukima ekiwandiiko ekisaba ekiliko emikono ejili mu kakade kamu mu emitwalo abili egyokuwaayo eri olukungaana lw'egwanga mu mweezi gw'ekumi nogumu.
entries.english: Protesters hope to collect a petition of 1.2 million signatures to present to the National Congress in November.

entries.luganda: Noluvanyuma nekizuuka nti amaka agasinga gali getaaga banamateeka okuyamba okulwanyisa okusengulwa, olukiiko lwatuula mugwokusatu nga 20 ku ttendekero lyamateeka eri abo abakosebwa mu bukumpanya bwebyamayumba.
entries.english: After it became apparent that many families were seeking legal help to fight the evictions, a meeting was held on March 20 at the East Bay Community Law Center for the victims of the housing scam.

entries.luganda: Abapangisa bwebatandise okunyumya nokwogera ebyabatuuseko, amaka agasinga gekikwatako gategedde nti Carolyn Wilsom owa OHA yali ababyeko ssente ezawebwayo okwekuumisa, era natoloka okuva mu Kabuga.
entries.english: When the tenants started sharing what had occurred to them, most of the families involved suddenly realized that Carolyn Wilson of the OHA had stolen their security deposits, and skipped out of town.

entries.luganda: Abatuuze b’omu miti emiggale bakiriza nti wandibawo amaka amalala nga 40 agageenda okusengulwa, okuva bwebakitegeera nti poliisi ye OHA enonyereza kumayumba mu Oakland eziyinza okukwatibwa mu mivuyo gyamayumba.
entries.english: Tenants at Lockwood Gardens believe that there may be another 40 families or more to face eviction, since they learned that OHA police are also investigating other public housing properties in Oakland that may be caught up in the housing scam.
