entries.luganda: Bandi yasazizzamu ekivulu ekyabadde ekyokubelewo ku Kisawe ky’okujjukira abalwana mu lutalo e Maui. Ekivvulu kyaadde kyakuletta abantu kkenda, betondedde abawagizi babwe
entries.english: The band canceled the show at Maui's War Memorial Stadium, which was set to be attended by 9,000 people, and apologized to fans.

entries.luganda: Abakwasaganya kampuni, HK Management Inc., teyawa nsonga bwebaasazaamu nga Mutunda (sebutemba) 20, naye baanenya ebyentambula olunaku olwaddako.
entries.english: The band's management company, HK Management Inc., gave no initial reason when they canceled on September 20, but blamed logistical reasons by the next day.

entries.luganda: Banamateeeka aba Greek abatutumufu, Sakis Kechagioglou ne George Nikolakopoulos baasibiddwa mu komera lya Athens erya Koryadallus, nga basingiddwa ogw’obufere saako n’enguzi.
entries.english: The famous Greek lawyers, Sakis Kechagioglou and George Nikolakopoulos have been imprisoned in the Athens' jail of Korydallus, as they were found guilty of graft and corruption.

entries.luganda: Nga ebiva mukino, akavuvungano akanene kagudewo mumateeka gebyalo bya Greek olwokwoleka ebikolwa ebimenya amateeka nga abalamuzi, banamateeka, abalungamya byebakoze mumwaka oguyise.
entries.english: As a result of this, a big scandal within the Greek legal community has been raised through the exposure of illegal actions that judges, lawyers, solicitors and attorneys have done during the previous years.

entries.luganda: ssabiiti ntono emabega, munamawulire Makis Triantafylopulous ku katambi ka terefayina “Zoungla” ku Alpha terefayina, omukiise wa palamenti ate nga munamateeka, Petros Mantouvalos yakwatiidwa olw’abantu mu yafeesi ye okusangibwa nga bamenya amateeka nobuli bwenguzi.
entries.english: A few weeks ago, after the information published by the journalist Makis Triantafylopoulos in his popular Television show "Zoungla" in Alpha TV, the member of Parliament and lawyer, Petros Mantouvalos was abdicated as members of his office had been involved in illegal graft and corruption.

entries.luganda: N’ekirala, omulamuzi omukulu Evangelos Kalousis asibiddwa emisango gy’obukumpanya n’empisa ensiiwuufu.
entries.english: Moreover, top judge Evangelos Kalousis is imprisoned as he found guilty of corruption and degenerate behaviour.

entries.luganda: Roberts yaganira ddala okwogera ku ddi lwakkiriza obulamu lwe butandika, ekibuuzo ekikulu nga oyogera ku mpisa z’okugyamu olubuto, nga agamba nti tekiri mu mpisa okwogera ku bintu by’ensonga nga ezo.
entries.english: Roberts flatly refused to say about when he believes life begins, an important question when considering the ethics of abortion, saying that it would be unethical to comment on the specifics of likely cases.

entries.luganda: Yakikoze, wabula yasazizamu sitaatimenti ye esooka nti Roe v. Wade yeyali “etteeka elikakanyizidwa mu ttaka” ngakatiiriza ensaalawo za kkooti enkulu.
entries.english: He did, however, reiterate his earlier statement that Roe v. Wade was the "settled law of the land", emphasizing the importance of consistent Supreme Court rulings.

entries.luganda: Era yakkakkasizza nti yakkiririza mu ddembe lye ely’obukusifu okusalawo kwa Roe kwekwaali kwesigamye
entries.english: He also confirmed that he believed in the implied right to privacy which the Roe decision depended upon.

entries.luganda: Maroochdydore yali amaliriza wagulu w'edaala, poyinta mukaaga eziri kiriya eza Noosa mu sekonda.
entries.english: Maroochydore had finished on top of the ladder, six points clear of Noosa in second.

entries.luganda: Enjuyi zombie zaali za kusisikana mu mpaka eziddirira ezaakamalirizo Noosa weyaddukira n’obuwanguzi n’obubonero kuminakamu (11)
entries.english: The two sides would meet in the major semi final where Noosa ran out winners by 11 points.

entries.luganda: Maroochydore ate nakuba Caboolture mu luzanya oludilila olusemba.
entries.english: Maroochydore then defeated Caboolture in the Preliminary Final.

entries.luganda: Hesperonychus elizabethae kiva mu maka ga Dromaeosauridae era kizibwe wa Velociraptor
entries.english: Hesperonychus elizabethae is a species of the family Dromaeosauridae and is a cousin of Velociraptor .

entries.luganda: Kino ekinyonyi ekijudde ebyooya, ekinyonyi ekirina omusaayi kikirizibwa nti kyatambude busimbalaala ku magulu abiri namaala agalina agamuwabutwa.
entries.english: This fully feathered, warm blooded bird of prey was believed to have walked upright on two legs with claws like the Velociraptor.

entries.luganda: Olwala lwakyo olwokubiri lwaali lunene, omwava erinnya Hesperonychus ekitegeeza “western claw.”
entries.english: Its second claw was larger, giving rise to the name Hesperonychus which means "western claw."

entries.luganda: Ng’olesse okukona omuzira, embbera y’obudde enzibu elemesezza okutasa abantu.
entries.english: In addition to the crushing ice, extreme weather conditions have been hampering rescue efforts.

entries.luganda: Pittman yagamba nti embeera zaali tezikyeeyongerako paka akaseera mumaaso mu wiiki ejja.
entries.english: Pittman suggested that conditions wouldn't improve until sometime next week.

entries.luganda: Omuwendo n’obunene bwa kapaketi ka ice, okusinziira ku Pittman, bebisinze okuba omubi eri basealers okumala emyaka 15.
entries.english: The amount and thickness of the pack ice, according to Pittman, is the worst it has been for sealers in the past 15 years.

entries.luganda: Amawulire agasaasanye mu kitundu kyenyanja emyufu olwaleero mu maziika ga Jeff Weise era basatu ku balumizibwa omwenda bakwatibwa omuyizi omulala nakwatubwa kubyokubwatuuka mu mwezi gwokusatu nga 21.
entries.english: News spread in the Red Lake community today as funerals for Jeff Weise and three of the nine victims were held that another student was arrested in connection with the school shootings of March 21.

entries.luganda: Abebyobuyinza bogedde kitono mu bujjuvu ebisuka mu bikwata ku kusibibwa kwa leero.
entries.english: Authorities said little officially beyond confirming today's arrest.

entries.luganda: N’olweekyo, amanyi ku kunoonyereza yagambye Minneapolis Star-Tribune nti yali Louis Jourdain, mutabani wa ssentebe wa Red Lake Floyd Jourdain ow’emyaka kumi n’omukaaga
entries.english: However, a source with knowledge of the investigation told the Minneapolis Star-Tribune that it was Louis Jourdain, 16-year old son of Red Lake Tribal Chairman Floyd Jourdain.

entries.luganda: Tekinnamanyibwa mu kaseera kanno emisango ejinamuteekebwako oba ki ekya lettedde aba ebyobuyinza okukwaata omuvubuka naye okuwoza kwatandise mu kooti.
entries.english: It is not known at this time what charges will be laid or what led authorities to the boy but juvenile proceedings have begun in federal court.

entries.luganda: Lodin naye yagamba nti b'ofiisa basalawo okusazaamu runoff okusobola okuwonya Abafghan okusasaanya na akatyabaga k'ebyokwelinda mu kulonda okulala.
entries.english: Lodin also said officials decided to cancel the runoff in order to save Afghans the expense and security risk of another election.

entries.luganda: Abakugu bateegezeza nti nti bafunye obukakafu obumala okuva mu konsitityusooni yabafaghan okulaga nti okubajjamu kyabadde tekyetaagisa.
entries.english: Diplomats said that they had found enough ambiguity in the Afghan constitution to determine the runoff as unnecessary.

entries.luganda: Kino kibuzabuza alipoota ezasooka, okusazamu okudduka kyandibadde kimenya mateeka ga ggwanga.
entries.english: This contradicts earlier reports, which said that cancelling the runoff would have been against the constitution.

entries.luganda: Enyonyi yali egenda ku Irkutsk era yali evugibwa ba interior troops.
entries.english: The aircraft had been headed to Irkutsk and was being operated by interior troops.

entries.luganda: Okunonyeleza kw’atandise okuzula ekitufu.
entries.english: An inquiry was established to investigate.

entries.luganda: Il-76 kibadde kitundu kya mugaso nyo eri Russia n'amagye ga Soviet okuva mu 1970, era gali galabye akabenje akaddala mu Russia omwezi oguwedde.
entries.english: The Il-76 has been a major component of both the Russian and Soviet military since the 1970s, and had already seen a serious accident in Russia last month.

entries.luganda: Mu gwekkumi nga 7 yingini yeyawula ngabasimbula naye tewali yalumizibwa. Russia yasalakoko Il-76s oluvanyuma lwakabenje ako.
entries.english: On October 7 an engine separated on takeoff, without injuries. Russia briefly grounded Il-76s after that accident.

entries.luganda: Milo 800 ez’omukutu wa Trans-Alaska zagalwaawo oluvanyuma lw'okufiirwa oyiro omukwafu mu maserengeta ga Fairbanks, Alaska.
entries.english: 800 miles of the Trans-Alaska Pipeline System were closed down following a spill of thousands of barrels of crude oil south of Fairbanks, Alaska.

entries.luganda: Amasanyalaze okulemererwa nga kiva mu kukebera owava omuliro ekikolebwa bulijjo kyaleetera valuvu ezikugira puleesa okweggula era oyiro nayiika kumpi ne pampu ya siteseni ya Fort Greely.
entries.english: A power failure following a routine fire-command system test caused relief valves to open and crude oil overflowed near the Fort Greely pump station 9.

entries.luganda: Obujji okwegula kyakkirizza puleesa kulwa sisitiimu ate amafuta ne gakulukuta ku kibanyi mpaka mu kippipa ekisobola okwetika ebippipa 55,000 (obukadde 2.3 obwa mazzi).
entries.english: The valves opening allowed a pressure release for the system and oil flowed on a pad to a tank that can hold 55,000 barrels (2.3 million gallons).

entries.luganda: Emisana golwokusatu, obumooli bwa ttanka bwabadde butonya ngakiteberezebwa okuba mu kugaziya ebyamasanyalaze mu ttaanka.
entries.english: As of Wednesday afternoon, the tank vents were still leaking probably from thermal expansion inside the tank.

entries.luganda: Ekifo ekilala ekiddako ekiri wansi wa tanka ezisobola okuwanilira ebita 104,500 kyali tekinajuzibwa kutuuka waggulu.
entries.english: Another secondary containment area below the tanks capable of holding 104,500 barrels was not yet filled to capacity.

entries.luganda: Endowooza eziyingira wo butereevu ku terefayina kati, zeezisoose okuwulirwa ng’aba kulila Iran bakiriza nti ekibonerezo kikoseza abantu.
entries.english: The comments, live on television, were the first time that senior Iranian sources have admitted that the sanctions are having any effect.

entries.luganda: Mulimu okukugira mu byenfuna ne nvumbo okuva mu European Union ku kufulumya amafuta g'omu ttaka, ebyenfuna bya Iran mwe bijja 80% ku nsimbi ez'ebweru.
entries.english: They include financial restrictions and a ban by the European Union on the export of crude oil, from which the Iranian economy receives 80% of its foreign income.

entries.luganda: Mu alipoota yabwe esinga obupya omwezi guno, OPEC yagamba nti okutunda kw’amafuta kwakenderedde ddala okumala emyaka abbiri nga bafulumya obukadde bwa pippa 2.8 buli lunaku.
entries.english: In its most recent monthly report, OPEC said exports of crude had fallen to their lowest level for two decades at 2.8 million barrels per day.

entries.luganda: Omukulembeze w'ensi, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, annyonnyodde nga bwe kali “akatego” okwesigama ku mafuta okuviira ddala nga obujeemu bw’abasiiramu mu Iran mu 1979 ate ensi erina okwenunula okukavaamu.
entries.english: The country's supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, has described the dependency on oil as "a trap" dating from before Iran's Islamic revolution in 1979 and from which the country should free itself.

entries.luganda: Capsule bwe tuuka kunsi neyingira mu bbanga, Ku sawa nga 11 ezokumakya (esawa ze buva njuba), esubirwa okutekako ekitangaala ekimala okulaga eri abantu bonna mu mambuuka ga kalifoniya, oregon, Nevanda, ne Utah.
entries.english: When the capsule gets to Earth and enters the atmosphere, at about 5am (eastern time), it is expected to put on quite a light show for folks in Northern California, Oregon, Nevada, and Utah.

entries.luganda: Ekyombo kijja kweefaananyiriza nnyo kibun’omu mu bbanga
entries.english: The capsule will look much like a shooting star going across the sky.

entries.luganda: Kapiso ejakuba etambulila mu kilo mita nga 12.8 oba mayilo 8 buli sekonda, obwangu obumala okuva San Francisco okutuuka mu Los Angeles mu dakiika emu.
entries.english: The capsule will be traveling at about 12.8 km or 8 miles per second, fast enough to go from San Francisco to Los Angeles in one minute.

entries.luganda: Stardust yakugunjawo likoda esooka ate eyoluberera olwokubera ekyizungirizi kyomubbanga ekisinga okuwenyuka okudda mu nsi, ngemenyawo likoda eyasooka okugunjibwawo mu mwezi gwokutano ogwa 1969 mumadda gobukulembeze bwa Apollo X.
entries.english: Stardust will set a new all-time record for being the fastest spacecraft to return to Earth, breaking the previous record set in May of 1969 during the return of the Apollo X command module.

entries.luganda: “Kijja kutambula kunsalo z’omubukiika konno w’omumambuka ga California ne kyakisa egulu okuva mu California ngakiyita mu masekati ga Oregon nokweyongerayo mu Nevada ne Idaho era mu Idaho ne mu Utah,” Maneja wa Tom Duxbury, Stardust bweyagamba.
entries.english: “It will move over the west coast of northern California and will light the sky from California through central Oregon and on through Nevada and Idaho and into Utah,” Tom Duxbury, Stardust's project manager said.

entries.luganda: Okusalawo kwa mwami Rudd okusa omukono ku Kyoto climate accord, kisosola United States nga kati yeja okubeera ensi yoka ekulakulanyi okugaana okukiriza endagaano.
entries.english: Mr. Rudd's decision to sign the Kyoto climate accord isolates the United States, which will now be the only developed nation not to ratify the agreement.

entries.luganda: Gavumenti ya Australia eyakavaako yagaanye okussa omukono okukiriza Kyoto, nga egamba nti eyinza okukosa ebyenfuna nga ye sigamye nnyo ku kuyingiza amanda mu nsi, nga ate ensi nga India ne China zo tezaafunamu mu byenfuna ebyali bigereddwa.
entries.english: Australia's former conservative government refused to ratify Kyoto, saying it would damage the economy with its heavy reliance on coal exports, while countries like India and China were not bound by emissions targets.

entries.luganda: Ebay kyekyamanyi kyeyakafuna mu byafaayo byaayo.
entries.english: It is the biggest acquisition in eBay's history.

entries.luganda: Kampuni esuubira okugaziya ensulo zamagoba zonna okusobola okufuna ettutumu mu bitundu omukutu omugatta bantu ogwa skype mweguyina ekifo ekigumivu, okugeza China, Amaserengeta ga bulaaya, ne Brazil.
entries.english: The company hopes to diversify its profit sources and gain popularity in areas where Skype holds a strong position, such as China, Eastern Europe, and Brazil.

entries.luganda: Bannasayansi batebeereza Enceladus ngekifo ky'amanjazi agetabula enyo era nga we wasubira okuva akaweta kabalafu aka Kisuule.
entries.english: Scientists have suspected Enceladus as geologically active and a possible source of Saturn's icy E ring.

entries.luganda: Enceladus kye kintu ekisinga okumulisa mu ziseŋŋendo ezetoloola enjuba. Era emulisa ebitundu kyenda (90) ku buli kikumi eby’omusana ogugituukako.
entries.english: Enceladus is the most reflective object in the solar system, reflecting about 90 percent of the sunlight that hits it.

entries.luganda: Omufulumya we mizzanyo Konami yagambye leero mu mawulire ga ba japan mbu te bagya fulumya luzanya lwa mukaga mu Fallujah.
entries.english: The game publisher Konami stated today in a Japanese newspaper that they will not be releasing the game Six Days in Fallujah.

entries.luganda: Omuzannyo gwesigamizibwa ku lutalo olwokubiri olwa Fallujah, olutalo olwamanyi wakati w’abamerika n’amajje ge Iraq.
entries.english: The game is based on the Second Battle of Fallujah, a vicious battle between American and Iraqi forces.

entries.luganda: ACMA yakizuula nti nga ojeko vidiyo okutekebwa Ku mutimbagano, Big Brother yali tenamenya mateeka g'ekinyusi ky'okusunsula ku online nga amawulire gaali teganatelekebwa Ku lutimbe lwa big brother.
entries.english: The ACMA also found that despite the video being streamed on the Internet, Big Brother had not breached online content censorship laws as the media had not been stored on Big Brother's website.

entries.luganda: Eteeka erifuga ebyempuliziganya lilungamya kunkozesa ya yomutimbagano, naye ekintu okutuukagana n’omutindo gw’omutimbagano, kilina okubeera kunsibuko yaayo.
entries.english: The Broadcasting Services Act provides for the regulation of Internet content, however to be considered Internet content, it must physically reside on a server.

entries.luganda: Obubaka bwa Amerika mu Nairobi, Kenya buwaddeyo okulabula eri “nnalukalala b'e Somalia” abaagala okukola obulumbaganyi bwe ekitujju mu Kenya ne Ethiopia.
entries.english: The United States embassy located in Nairobi, Kenya has issued a warning that "extremists from Somalia" are planning to launch suicide bomb attacks in Kenya and Ethiopia.

entries.luganda: U.S egambye nti effunye obubaka okuva mu bantu abatamanyikiddwa nga bwogera ku batujju okwabya “ebiffo ebimu ebyolukale” mu Ethiopia ne Kenya.
entries.english: The U.S. says it has received information from an undisclosed source that specifically mentions the use of suicide bombers to will blow up "prominent landmarks" in Ethiopia and Kenya.

entries.luganda: Edda enyo nga nolulaga lwabuli lunaku nelipoota ya Colbert ngatenabaawo, Heck ne Johnsom batebeereza okufulumya ekiwandiiko ekisasamaza mu mawulire—nemukusoma amalire bwebali bakyali bayizi mu UW mu 1988.
entries.english: Long before The Daily Show and The Colbert Report, Heck and Johnson envisioned a publication that would parody the news—and news reporting—when they were students at UW in 1988.

entries.luganda: Okuva lwe kyatandikibwawo, Katungulu efuuse obwakabaka mu kusaka amawulire obutazzanyirwako, nga efulumya olupapula, erina omutimbagano ogugobererwa abagenyi abapya abenjawulo 5,000,000 buli mwezi, laadiyo, atte amasumi ganno yafulumya ekifaananyi ky’ensi yonna ekiyitibwa Ensi yaffe ensiru.
entries.english: Since its inception, The Onion has become a veritable news parody empire, with a print edition, a website that drew 5,000,000 unique visitors in the month of October, personal ads, a 24 hour news network, podcasts, and a recently launched world atlas called Our Dumb World.

entries.luganda: Al Gore ne General Tommy Franks batela okusagira mu mitwe jaabwe emikulu (Gore's yali nkatungulu lwekagamba nti ye ne Tipper bali balina okwegadandga okukyasinze mu bulamubwaabwe oluvanyuma lw’okugwa 2000 mukulonda kwa koleggi).
entries.english: Al Gore and General Tommy Franks casually rattle off their favorite headlines (Gore's was when The Onion reported he and Tipper were having the best sex of their lives after his 2000 Electoral College defeat).

entries.luganda: Abawandiis baabwe banji bagenze mumaaso nookufuna ettuttumu ku mawulire ga show za Jon Stewart ne Stephen Colbert’s.
entries.english: Many of their writers have gone on to wield great influence on Jon Stewart and Stephen Colbert's news parody shows.

entries.luganda: Ekivvulu kino kyekimu ku kampeyini z’ekiuga Bucharest ekigezako okuzza engulu endabika ye Bu Roma ng’ekibuga ekilungi
entries.english: The artistic event is also part of a campaign by the Bucharest City Hall that seeks to relaunch the image of the Romanian capital as a creative and colourful metropolis.

entries.luganda: Ekibuga kyekijja okusooka muaserengeta gobukiika kkoo bwa bungereza okubeera nenyiriri zente, bino byebikujuko byebisiige ebikyasinze obunene mu nsi yonna, mumakati gogwomukaaga nogwomunaana omwaka guno.
entries.english: The city will be the first in southeastern Europe to host CowParade, the world's largest public art event, between June and August this year.

entries.luganda: Ekirango ky’olwaleero kyayongedeyo obweyamo bwa gavumenti obwakolebwa mu gwokusatu gw’omwaka gunno okuyamba ku bisitula ebirala.
entries.english: Today's announcement also extended the government's commitment made in March of this year to fund extra carriages.

entries.luganda: Ebiyaana 300 byetaagisa okuweza1,300 okukendeza ku mujjuzo.
entries.english: An additional 300 brings the total to 1,300 carriages to be acquired to relieve overcrowding.

entries.luganda: Christopher Garcia, omwogezi w’abaserikale ba Los Angeles, yagambye nti omusajja gwebasubira okkuza omusango bamunonyerezako gwa kuyita waatasanide okuyita sso ssi gwa kwonona bintu.
entries.english: Christopher Garcia, a spokesperson of the Los Angeles Police Department, said the suspected male offender is being investigated for trespassing rather than vandalism.

entries.english: Modern Education accused him of printing large advertisements on buses without authorisation and lying by saying that he was the chief English tutor.

entries.luganda: Yavunaanibwa okumumenya amateeka ga copyrigh, naye teyavunaanibwa.
entries.english: He has also been accused previously of copyright infringement, but was not charged.

entries.luganda: Eyali omuyizi yagamba nti yatera ‘okukozesa olulimi olufuutifuuti mu kibiina, yayigirizibwa engeri z'okukwana mu buwandiike, era yalinga mukwano gw’abaana.
entries.english: A former student said that he 'used slang in class, taught dating skills in notes, and was just like the students' friend.'

entries.luganda: Mu myaka amakumi asatu emabegga, china eggaziyiza ebynfuna byayo newankubadde nga y’abantu aba communist.
entries.english: During the last three decades, despite officially remaining a communist state, China has developed a market economy.

entries.luganda: Enkyukakyuka ezzasoka mu byenfuna z’akolebwa mu bukulembezze bwa Deng Xiaoping.
entries.english: The first economic reforms were made under the leadership of Deng Xiaoping.

entries.luganda: Okuva n’olwo, ebyenfuna bya China bikuze emirundi 90.
entries.english: Since then, China's economic size has grown by 90 times.

entries.luganda: Omulundi ogukyasoose, omwaka oguwedde China yafulumya amamotoka okusinga bugirimaani era neyisa abamerika ngensi ekyasinze akatale mu kkolero lino.
entries.english: For the first time, last year China exported more cars than Germany and surpassed the United States as the biggest market for this industry.

entries.luganda: GDP ya China eyinza okuba esinga ko eya United States mu myaka ebiri.
entries.english: China's GDP could be larger than the United States within two decades.

entries.luganda: Omuyaga Danielle, ogwookuna ogwatuumibwa mu 2010 mu biro byemiyaga gya Atlantic, gukutte mu buvanjuba bwa ssemayanja Atlantic.
entries.english: Tropical Storm Danielle, fourth named storm of the 2010 Atlantic hurricane season, has formed in the eastern Atlantic Ocean.

entries.luganda: Omuzira, ogwabadde mailo 3000 okuva e Miami mu Florida, era nga gulina supidi ya mita 40mph (64 kph).
entries.english: The storm, located approximately 3,000 miles from Miami, Florida, has maximum sustained winds of 40 mph (64 kph).

entries.luganda: Bannasaayansi ku kitongole kya National Hurricane Center basuubira nti Danielle gujja kuba kibuyaga ow'amaanyi ku lwokusatu lwa wiiki eno.
entries.english: Scientists at the National Hurricane Center predict that Danielle will strengthen to a hurricane by Wednesday.

entries.luganda: Nga omuyaga guli wala ne kulukalu, kijja kubera kizibu okufuna obusobozi obumala ku United States oba Caribbean.
entries.english: As the storm is far from landfall, it remains difficult to assess potential impact to the United States or Caribbean.

entries.luganda: Eyazaalibwa mu kibuga ekikulu ekya Croatia, Zagreb, Bobek yafuna ettutumu ng'azanyira ab'ekibinja kya Partizan Belgrade.
entries.english: Born in the Croatian capital, Zagreb, Bobek gained fame while playing for Partizan Belgrade.

entries.luganda: Yabeeyungako mu 1945 and stayed until 1958
entries.english: He joined them in 1945 and stayed until 1958.

entries.luganda: Mukaseera ke ngali mu ttiimu, yatebye goolo 403 mu ndabika 468.
entries.english: During his time with the team, he scored 403 goals in 468 appearances.

entries.luganda: Tewali mulala yali alabiseeko oba yateeba goolo za kilaabu zisinga za Bobek.
entries.english: No one else has ever made more appearances or scored more goals for the club than Bobek.

entries.luganda: Mu mwaka gwa 1995, yaloondebwa okuba omuzaanyi assinze mu byafaayo bya Partizan.
entries.english: In 1995 he was voted the best player in Partizan's history.

entries.luganda: Ebijaguzo byagulwaawo olulaga olwenjawulo olwabadiigize abamanyidwa nga Cirque du Soleil.
entries.english: The celebrations started with a special show by the world-renowned group Cirque du Soleil.

entries.luganda: Kyagobereddwa Istanbul State Symphony Orchestra, bbandi ya Janissary, n’abayimbi Fatih Erkoç ne Müslüm Gürses.
entries.english: It was followed by the Istanbul State Symphony Orchestra, a Janissary band, and the singers Fatih Erkoç and Müslüm Gürses.

entries.luganda: Awo Whirling Dervishes yatwaala ku kituuti.
entries.english: Then Whirling Dervishes took to the stage.

entries.luganda: Omukyaala omwatikirivu Sezen Aksu owa Butuluki yayimba n'Omuyitale tenor Alessandro Safina n'omuyimbi owa Buyonaani Harris Alexiou.
entries.english: Turkish diva Sezen Aksu performed with the Italian tenor Alessandro Safina and Greek singer Haris Alexiou.

entries.luganda: Mukamalirizo, akabinja kamazina akabaturuuki akomuliro gwa Anatolia bayoleseza mu mwoleso gwa “Troy”.
entries.english: To finish, Turkish dance group Fire of Anatolia performed the show "Troy".

entries.luganda: Petero Lenz, omuvuzi wa pikipiki ez'empaka ow’emyaka, 13 afudde oluvanyuma lw'okwetaba mu kutomera mu Indianapolis motor speed way.
entries.english: Peter Lenz, a 13-year-old motorcycle racer, has died after being involved in a crash at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway.

entries.luganda: Bweyabadde nga addukamu, Lenz yagudde okuva ku ggaali, yatomeddwa muvuzi munne Xavier Zayat
entries.english: While on his warm-up lap, Lenz fell off his bike, and was then struck by fellow racer Xavier Zayat.

entries.luganda: Mangu ddala yafibwaako omukozi webyeddagala webaddukira natwalibwa mu dwaliro ly'okukitundu oluvanyuma gyeyafiira.
entries.english: He was immediately attended to by the on-track medical staff and transported to a local hospital where he later died.

entries.luganda: Zayat teyalumiziddwa mu kabenje
entries.english: Zayat was unhurt in the accident.

entries.luganda: Bwewekaanya engeri ensi yonna gyeyimiriddemu mu byenfuna, Zapatero yayongedeyo ngagamba nti “enkola yebyamaguzi yemu kubyenfuna, era ngezanya ekifo kyamaanyi.
entries.english: Regarding the global financial situation, Zapatero continued by saying that "the financial system is a part of the economy, a crucial part.

entries.luganda: Tulina obuzibu mubyenfuna bwamwaaka mulamba, ekiretedde embeera esinga okubeera embi emyeezi ebiri ejiyise, nate ndowooza kati obutale bwebyensimbi butandise okuda engulu.”
entries.english: We have a year-long financial crisis, which has had its most acute moment in the past two months, and I think now the financial markets are beginning to recover."

entries.luganda: Sabiiti ewedde, Amawulire ameerere galanze nti kijja kuyitimula enkozesa y’olulimi olukozesebwa wonna mu ku wereza amawulire, nga ogaseeko ebyempuliziganya bisatu.
entries.english: Last week, Naked News announced that it would dramatically increase its international language mandate to news reporting, with three new broadcasts.

entries.luganda: Nga mu kaseera kanno baweereza mu luzungu ne mu lu Japani, ekitongole kyensi zonna kitongoza olu sipanisi, oluyitale, ne pulogulamu zolulimi olukoleya, eza telefayina, omutimbagano, nebyuuma eb’yomungalo.
entries.english: Already reporting in English and Japanese, the global organization is launching Spanish, Italian, and Korean-language programs, for television, the web, and mobile devices.

entries.luganda: “Ekyomukisa tewali kyantukako naye nalaba akatambi ka macabre, abantu nga bagezaako okumenya amadirisa okusobola okufuluma. ”
entries.english: "Luckily nothing happened to me, but I saw a macabre scene, as people tried to break windows in order to get out.

entries.luganda: Abantu bali bakuba emitayimbwa n’entebbe, naye amadirisa gabadde tegasobola kumenyeka.
entries.english: People were hitting the panes with chairs, but the windows were unbreakable.

entries.luganda: Edinisa elimu lyamala nelimenyeka, nebatandika okudduka nga bafulumila mudinisa, bino byatutegezeddwa Franciszek Kowal
entries.english: One of the panes finally broke, and they started to get out by the window," said survivor Franciszek Kowal.

entries.luganda: Emunyenye zivako ekitangala n’ebbuggumu ng’amanyi gazzo gakwataganye n’ebintu ebilala
entries.english: Stars give off light and heat because of the energy made when hydrogen atoms are merged (or fused) together to form heavier elements.

entries.luganda: Abanasayansi bagezzako okukola ekyuma ekinakola amanayi mu ngeri y’emu
entries.english: Scientists are working to create a reactor that can make energy in the same way.

entries.luganda: Eno, wadde, nsonga nzibu nnyo okumaliriza era ejja kutwaala emyaka Minji nga tetunalaba bigisvuganya nga bizimbiwa
entries.english: This, however, is a very hard problem to solve and will take many years before we see useful fusion reactors built.

entries.luganda: Empiso eya ppuwa eseeyeeya ku mazzi kulwa surface tension.
entries.english: The steel needle floats on top of the water because of surface tension.

entries.luganda: Okuyulika kw'ettaka kubawo kubanga molekyu z'amazzi eziri ku ngulu kwa amazzi zisikirizana nnyo okusingira ddala empewo za molekyu waggulu.
entries.english: Surface tension happens because the water molecules at the surface of the water are strongly attracted to each other more than they are to the air molecules above them.

entries.luganda: Obutofaali bw’amazzi bukola olububi kumazzi kungulu olusobozesa empiso okutengeetera kumazzi kungulu.
entries.english: The water molecules make an invisible skin on the water’s surface that allows things like the needle to float on top of the water.

entries.luganda: Ekyambe ku kukuwalampa omuzira kiriko obwoogi enjuyi zombie okusobozesa okukwaata amangu kw’abalafu, nebwooba okiwunziseemu.
entries.english: The blade on a modern ice skate has a double edge with a concave hollow between them. The two edges allow for a better grasp of the ice, even when tilted.

entries.luganda: Olwokuba nti wakati we jirita waliwo oluwonko, ejjirita bwe yesikira oludda olumu oba olulala,oludda oluberanga lu kwataganye ne balafu n’alwo lugoma.
entries.english: Because the bottom of the blade is slightly curved, as the blade tilts to one side or the other, the edge which is in contact with the ice also curves.

entries.luganda: Kino kiletela bu siketi okukyuka mu mabbali. Bwokyusa n’odda ku ddyo, nga budda kukoono, era wodda ku koono, nga budda ku ddyo
entries.english: This causes the skater to turn. If the skates tilt to the right, the skater turns right, if the skates tilt to the left, the skater turns left.

entries.luganda: Okuddayo ku maanyi gaabwe gebabadde nago, baalina okwesonyiwa amaanyi amalala gebafunye okuva ku mataala.
entries.english: To return to their previous energy level, they must get rid of the extra energy they got from the light.

entries.luganda: Kino bakikola nga basangula akatundu kekitangaala katono akayitibwa “photon”.
entries.english: They do this by emitting a tiny particle of light called a "photon".

entries.luganda: Banasayansi omutendera guno baguyita “okwagazisa okuvaayo kw’ekibugumu” kubanga okuvaayo kw’ekitangala kya photon n’ekitangaala kika kyakibugumu.
entries.english: Scientists call this process "stimulated emission of radiation" because the atoms are stimulated by the bright light, causing the emission of a photon of light, and light is a type of radiation.

entries.luganda: Ekifanaanyi ekiddako kilaga akaziba kavaamu obukontanyo. Mubutuufu obukontanyo butono nyo okusinga obuli mu kifanaanyi.
entries.english: The next picture shows the atoms emitting photons. Of course, in reality photons are a lot smaller than those in the picture.

entries.luganda: Obusimu bwa pulotoni butono ku bintu ebikola atomu.
entries.english: Photons are even smaller than the stuff that makes up atoms!

entries.luganda: Oluvannyuma lw'essaawa z'okulongoosa eziwerako ku balubu emu balubu n'ekuba.
entries.english: After hundreds of hours of operation the filament in the bulb eventually burns out and the light bulb no longer works.

entries.luganda: Etaala yyetaga odizibwamu.kyetagisa okuba omwegendereza nga ogiteka mu.
entries.english: The light bulb then needs replacing. It is necessary to be careful in replacing the light bulb.

entries.luganda: Ekisooka, swiki y’ettaala eya fikisikya yetaaga okubeera nga ejjidwako oba kebo okujjibwako.
entries.english: First, the switch for the light fixture needs to be turned off or the cable disconnected.

entries.luganda: Kinno kivude kulwakubanga amasanyalaze agayingira mu soketti ewali ebyuuma bulubu wegenda gasobola okukuba bwokwatayo oba entobo y’ebyuuma bweeba ekyaali mu masanyalaze.
entries.english: This is because electricity flowing into the socket where the metallic part of bulb sits can give you a severe electric shock if you touch the inside of the socket or the metal base of the bulb while it is still partly in the socket.

entries.luganda: Ekitundu ekisinga omugaso mu ntambuza y’omusaayi n’empewo gw’omutima, ogupikka omusaayi
entries.english: The major organ of the circulatory system is the heart, which pumps the blood.

entries.luganda: Omusayii guva kumutiima mu nseeke eziyitibwa arteries negukoomawo kumutiima mu nseeke eziyitibwa emisiiwa.enseeke entono ziyitibwa capillaries.
entries.english: Blood goes away from the heart in tubes called arteries and comes back to the heart in tubes called veins. The smallest tubes are called capillaries.

entries.luganda: Amayo ga triceratops gandisobode okugaaya sibikoola byoka naye namatabi amagumu nemirandira.
entries.english: A triceratops' teeth would have been able to crush not only leaves but even very tough branches and roots.

entries.luganda: Bannasaayasi abamu balowooza nti Triceratopos zaalyanga cycads ekimera ekyangu okusanga mu biseera bya Cretaceous.
entries.english: Some scientists think Triceratops ate cycads, which are a type of plant that was common in the Cretaceous.

entries.luganda: Ebimera bino bifanana nga obuti bwensansa n'enguleobutono n'engule y'obukoola obusongovu, obulina obukoola obufumita.
entries.english: These plants look like a small palm tree with a crown of sharp, spiky leaves.

entries.luganda: Envubu yakozeseza mumwagwayo omuggumivu okunoga ebikoola nga tenaba kulya muti.
entries.english: A Triceratops could have used its strong beak to strip off the leaves before eating the trunk.

entries.luganda: Bana sayansi bagamba nti ebimera bino bya busagwa nnyo era nga tekisoboka kuba nga waliwo ddayinaso yonna eya birya, newankubadde leero Sloth n’ebisolo ebirala byonna nga ensuku (okuva mu lunyiriri lwa dayinaso) esobola okulya ebikoola oba ebibala ebyobusagwa.
entries.english: Other scientists argue that these plants are very poisonous so it is unlikely that any dinosaur ate them, even though today the sloth and other animals like the parrot (a descendant of the dinosaurs) can eat poisonous leaves or fruit.

entries.luganda: Amanyi ga lo’s gayinza gatya okunsika? Bwe wandiyimiridde Kungulu kwa lo, wandi pimye kitono okusinga nga oli Ku ttaka.
entries.english: How would Io's gravity pull on me? If you stood on the surface of Io, you would weigh less than you do on Earth.

entries.luganda: Omuntu azitowa pawunda 200 (90kg) wano ku nsi abera azitowa pawunda 36 (16kg) ku mwezi. Kwegamba amanyi aga gulavity gakusika nodda wansi.
entries.english: A person who weighs 200 pounds (90kg) on Earth would weigh about 36 pounds (16kg) on Io. So the gravity, of course, pulls less on you.

entries.luganda: Enjuba telina kabubi kakaluba akagibise nga ensi kwosobola okuyimirila. Omusana gwona gwakolebwa omuka, omuliro ne plasma.
entries.english: The Sun doesn't have a crust like the Earth that you can stand on. The whole Sun is made out of gases, fire, and plasma.

entries.luganda: Omukka gukendeera buli lwe weyongerayo okuva mu masekati g’omusana.
entries.english: The gas becomes thinner as you go farther from the center of the Sun.

entries.luganda: Kye tulaba wabweeru bwe tutunuulira omusana mwe muva ekitangaala, ekitegeeza “omupiira ogw’ekitangaala”.
entries.english: The outer-part we see when we look at the Sun is called the photosphere, which means "ball of light".

entries.luganda: Oluvanyuma lw’emyaka nga enkumi satu ejayita, mu 1610, omubuusi womubanga Galileo Galilei yakozesanga ekyuuma kikalimagezi okulaba nti Venus elina emitendera, nga omweezi bweguli.
entries.english: About three thousand years later, in 1610, Italian astronomer Galileo Galilei used a telescope to observe that Venus has phases, just as the moon does.

entries.luganda: Emitendera gibaawo kubanga oludda lwa venus (oba olwomwezi) ogutunude mu musana guliko ekitangaala.Emitendera gya venus zawagidde ekintu kya Copernicus nti ensi zetoolola omusana.
entries.english: Phases happen because only the side of Venus (or of the Moon) facing the Sun is lighted. The phases of Venus supported the theory of Copernicus that the planets go around the Sun.

entries.luganda: Oluvannyuma, nga wayise emyaka mitono nnyo, omukugu mu by'ekizungirizi ayitibwa Jeremiah Harrocks yetegereza entambula ya Venus.
entries.english: Then, a few years later in 1639, an English astronomer named Jeremiah Horrocks observed a transit of Venus.

entries.luganda: Bungereza yamala ebbanga gwanvu eryemirembe ng’emaze okuwamba nokweddiza Danelaw.
entries.english: England had experienced a long period of peace after the reconquest of the Danelaw.

entries.luganda: Lwakubanga mu 991 Ethelred yalumbibwa ejje lyabayeekela elisinga gonna egaali gabaddewo okuva mu kyasa kya Guthrum mumaaso ko awo.
entries.english: However in 991 Ethelred was faced with a Viking fleet larger than any since Guthrum's a century earlier.

entries.luganda: Amagye gakulembelwa Olaf Trygvasson okuva e Norway nga alino ebilubililwa ebyokutaasa ensi ye okuva mu buyinza bwa ba Danish
entries.english: This fleet was led by Olaf Trygvasson, a Norwegian with ambitions to reclaim his country from Danish domination.

entries.luganda: Oluvanyuma lw’okkukutataganyizibwa, Ethelred yakilizanganya ne Olaf, eyadda e Norway okugezzako okweddiza obwa kabaka n’obuwanguzzi obutonotono
entries.english: After initial military setbacks, Ethelred was able to agree to terms with Olaf, who returned to Norway to try to gain his kingdom with mixed success.

entries.luganda: Hangeul ye walifu yokka eya yiiyizibwa era ekozesebwa buli lunaku. Walifu ya yiiyizibwa mu 1444 mu bufuzi bwa King Sejong (1418 -1450).
entries.english: Hangeul is the only purposely invented alphabet in popular daily use. The alphabet was invented in 1444 during the reign of King Sejong (1418 – 1450).

entries.luganda: King Sejong yali ssekabaka ow’okuna owa Joseon Dynasty era nga yakyasinze okugoberere lwa.
entries.english: King Sejong was the fourth king of the Joseon Dynasty and is one of the most highly regarded.

entries.luganda: Yeyatuumira dala Hangeul alphabet Hunmin Jeongeum, ekitegeeza “Amaloboozi amatuufu ag’okulagira abantu”
entries.english: He originally named the Hangeul alphabet Hunmin Jeongeum, which means "the correct sounds for the instruction of the people".

entries.luganda: Waliwo ebiwanuzibwa bingi ku nger Sanskrit gyeyatandika okubeerawo. Ekimu ku byo kwekusenguka kwaba Aryan okuva mu bukiika ddyo okudda mu Buyindi abaleeta olulimi lwabwe nabo.
entries.english: There are many theories to how Sanskrit came into existence. One of them is about an Aryan migration from the west into India who brought their language with them.

entries.luganda: Olusansikaati lwelulimi olwedda olugerageranyizibwa no’lu Latini olwogerwa ebulaaya.
entries.english: Sanskrit is an ancient language and is comparable to the Latin language spoken in Europe.

entries.luganda: Ekitabo ekyasookera ddala okuwandiikibwa munsi yonna kyali mu Sanskrit. Bwebaamala okugatagata endagaano za Upanishad, awo Sanskrit n'eggwa olw'emitendera.
entries.english: The earliest known book in the world was written in Sanskrit. After the compilation of Upanishads, Sanskrit just faded due to hierarchy.

entries.luganda: Sanskirt lulimi lugazi ateera lugagga, ngakino kyekikoze nga ensibuko yennimi ezomulembe ezabayindi, okugeza nga latino yensibuko yennimi za bungereza okugeza fuleenshi noluspanish.
entries.english: Sanskrit is a very complex and rich language, which has served to be the source for many modern Indian languages, just like Latin is the source for European languages like French and Spanish.

entries.luganda: Ne okusika omuguwa kwa furansi kulwa Germani kwatandiika okwetegeka
entries.english: With the battle for France over, Germany began to get ready to invade the island of Britain.

entries.luganda: Bugirimaani obulumbaganno yabuwa erinya “Ekikwekweto Sealion”. Ebyokulwanisa ne ebyokukozesa bingi ebya amajje ge’Bungereza byabuze nga bavva mu Dunkirk, kwegamba amajje gali ganafuyemu.
entries.english: Germany code-named the attack “Operation Sealion”. Most of the British Army's heavy weapons and supplies had been lost when it evacuated from Dunkirk, so the army was fairly weak.

entries.luganda: Naye Abalwanyi b'obwakabaka baali bakyali bamanyi okusinga aba Bugirimaani (“Kriegsmarine”) era bandisanyizawo buli luseregende olulumba olwasindikibwa okuyita ku mukutu gwa bazungu.
entries.english: But the Royal Navy was still much stronger than the German Navy (“Kriegsmarine”) and could have destroyed any invasion fleet sent across the English Channel.

entries.luganda: Naye era, emeeri ntono ezabalangira zasiimbibwa kumakubo agateberezebwa okuyitamu abayeekera kubanga abalwanyi batya okukubibwa aba Girimaani mubbanga.
entries.english: However, very few Royal Navy ships were based near the likely invasion routes as the admirals were afraid they would be sunk by German air attack.

entries.luganda: Tutandike n’okunyonyola enteekateeka za Yitale. Yitale okutwaliza awamu yali muto wa Bugirimani ne Japaani.”
entries.english: Let's start with an explanation about Italy's plans. Italy was mainly the "little brother" of Germany and Japan.

entries.luganda: Balina amagye nga manafu yadde nga bali bakazimba emeeri empya nya nga olutalo telunabawo
entries.english: It had a weaker army and a weaker navy, although they had just built four new ships right before the beginning of the war.

entries.luganda: Ebirubirirwa bya Italy ebikulu byali okusingira dddal ku nsi za Afirika. Okufuna ensi ezo, bandyetaaze okubeera n’akabinjja okugulawo padi, okukasobozesa okuseyeeya ku semayanja Mediterranean okuyingira Afirika.
entries.english: Italy's main goals were African countries. To capture those countries, they would need to have a troop launching pad, so as troops could sail across the Mediterranean Sea and invade Africa.

entries.luganda: N’olweekyo, baali balina okwesala ku beesi zaba British n’amaato mu bubiligi. Nga ojeeko ebikolwa ebyo, entalo za Italy tezalina kyakukola kilala kyona.
entries.english: For that, they had to get rid of British bases and ships in Egypt. Besides those actions, Italy's battleships were not supposed to do anything else.

entries.luganda: Kati Japan. Japan yali nsi ya kazinga, nga bwolaba Bungereza.
entries.english: Now for Japan. Japan was an island country, just like Britain.

entries.luganda: Submarines gaba maato agatondebwa okutambilira mu nyaanja munda atte negasigalayo okumala ekiseera ekiwanvu.
entries.english: Submarines are ships designed to travel underwater, and remain there for an extended amount of time.

entries.luganda: Ebyombo lubbira byakozesebwa mu sematalo eyasooka ne sematalo owokubiri. Edda byali bisooba ate nga zi kuba amasasi ga kumpi.
entries.english: Submarines were used in World War I and World War II. Back then they were very slow and had a very limited shooting range.

entries.luganda: Muntandikwa y’olutalo basinga kutambuliranga ku ntiko y’asemayanja, naye nga radar etandika okukulakulana n’okufuuka abatuukiridde ab’okulubalama bakakibwa okugenda mumazzi okwewala okulabibwa.
entries.english: In the beginning of the war they mostly travelled on top of the sea, but as radar began developing and becoming more accurate the submarines were forced to go under water to avoid being seen.

entries.luganda: Obwaato bwa Bugirimaani bwayitibwa amaato ga U. Abagirimaani bali barungi mu kulambula wamu nokukozesa obwato bwabwe obutono.
entries.english: German submarines were called U-Boats. The Germans were very good at navigating and operating their submarines.

entries.luganda: Olwokufuna obuwanguzi mu bavuzi b'obwato obutono obubbira, oluvanyuma lw'olutalo, Abagirimaani tebesigika kubeera ne bungi ku bwo.
entries.english: Because of their success with submarines, after the war Germans aren't trusted to have many of them.

entries.luganda: Yee! Kabaka Tutankhamun, oluusi ayitibwa “Kabaka Tut” oba “Kabaka omulenzi”, y’omu ku bakabaka b’eMisiri abakadde abamanyikidwa mu biseera binno.
entries.english: Yes! King Tutankhamun, sometimes referred to as "King Tut" or "The Boy King", is one of the most well known ancient Egyptian kings in modern times.

entries.luganda: Ekinsanyusa nti teyalabwa nga wamugaso mu bisera ebyedda era teyawandikibwa ku lunyilili lwa ba kabaka abalala
entries.english: Interestingly, he was not considered to be very important in ancient times and was not recorded on most ancient king lists.

entries.luganda: Naye, okuzuula entanaaye mu 1922 kyamufuula omututumufu. Newankubadde nga entaana nyinji emabega zaali zibbiddwa, eno kumpi yali tekwaatiddwaako
entries.english: However, the discovery of his tomb in 1922 made him a celebrity. While many tombs of the past were robbed, this tomb was left virtually undisturbed.

entries.luganda: Ebintu ebisinga ebyazzikibwa ne Tutankhamun bikumiddwa bulungi ng’omwo mwemili neifananyi ebikoleddwa mu bintu byomuwenddo nga amayinja
entries.english: Most of the items buried with Tutankhamun have been well preserved, including thousands of artefacts made from precious metals and rare stones.

entries.luganda: Okutondawo emipiira kyaleetera abalwaanyi b’essyria okuwewuka, okwanguwa n’okwetegekera okuduka abasirikale namajje amalala.
entries.english: The invention of spoke wheels made Assyrian chariots lighter, faster, and better prepared to outrun soldiers and other chariots.

entries.luganda: Obusaale okuva mu butida busobola okuyingila engabo z’abasirikale abalumbaganyi. Nga mu 1000 B.C., Abalumbaganyi baaletawo ekijukizo kyokuwanikibwa ekyasooka.
entries.english: Arrows from their deadly crossbows could penetrate the armor of rival soldiers. About 1000 B.C., the Assyrians introduced the first cavalry.

entries.luganda: Calvary ly’eggye erirwanira ku mbalaasi. Nga tebannayiiya etandiiko, Assyrian calvary balwaniranga ku migongo mikalu ku mbalaasi zaabwe.
entries.english: A cavalry is an army that fights on horseback. The saddle had not yet been invented, so the Assyrian cavalry fought on the bare backs of their horses.

entries.luganda: Tumanyi banabyabufuzi ba ba Greece bangi, bana sayansi, n’abayimbi. Kisobokeraddala nti omuntu asingira ddala okumanyika mu by’obuwangwa ye Homer, omukenkufu omuzibe omusomi we bitontome, eyawandiika ebitundu bibiri eby’olungereza bya Greece: ebitotome ekya Iliad ne Odyssey.
entries.english: We know many Greek politicians, scientists, and artists. Possibly the most known person of this culture is Homer, the legendary blind poet, who composed two masterpieces of Greek literature: the poems Iliad and Odyssey.

entries.luganda: Sophocles ne Aristophanes bakyaali bawandiisi bamizanyo abatikirivu era nemizanyo gyaabwe gikyabalibwa okubeera mu mirimu egyamaanyi mu kuwandiika kw'ensi.
entries.english: Sophocles and Aristophanes are still popular playwrights and their plays are considered to be among the greatest works of world literature.

entries.luganda: Omuyonaani omulala amanyidwa enyoo mubazi ng’amanyidwa nyoo kunkola ye eri kunkolagana eriwo wakati wa enjuyi z’ekintu ekyensonda esatu.
entries.english: Another famous Greek is a mathematician Pythagoras, mostly known for his famous theorem about relations of the sides of right triangles.

entries.luganda: Waliwo ebiteberezebwa ebyawukana ku bantu bameka aboogera oluhindi. Luteberezebwa okuba wakati w’olwokubiri n'olwokuna okwogerwa mu nsi.
entries.english: There are varying estimates for how many people speak Hindi. It is estimated to be between the second and fourth most commonly spoken language in the world.

entries.luganda: Omuwendo gw’abantu abasokamu gwawukana okusinzila ku njawukana mu niimi z;obala.
entries.english: The number of native speakers varies depending on whether or not very closely related dialects are counted.

entries.luganda: Ebipimo biva ku bizindaalo obukadde 340 paka ku bukadde 500, era nobungi bw’abantu obukadde 800 abasobola okutegeela olulimi.
entries.english: Estimates range from 340 million to 500 million speakers, and as many as 800 million people can understand the language.

entries.luganda: Hindi ne Urdu zifaanagana mu njogera naye zanjawulo mu mpandiika; mu mboozi zabulijjo, aboogezi bennimi ezo zombie basobola bulijjo okwetegera.
entries.english: Hindi and Urdu are similar in vocabulary but different in script; in everyday conversations, speakers of both languages can usually understand each other.

entries.luganda: Awo nga mukyaasa kya 15th, Estonia eyomumambuka yali elumbiddwa ebyobuwangwa byabugirimaani ebyamanyi.
entries.english: Around the 15th century, northern Estonia was under great cultural influence of Germany.

entries.luganda: Waliwo abamonko Abagirimaani abaali baagala okusembeza Katonda eri bannansi, awo ne bavumbula olulimi olusomebwa nga luestonia.
entries.english: Some German monks wanted to bring God closer to the native people, so they invented the Estonian literal language.

entries.luganda: Yesigamizibwa Ku nukuta za Bugirimaani, era n'enukuta “Õ/õ” yayongerwaako.
entries.english: It was based on the German alphabet and one character "Õ/õ" was added.

entries.luganda: Obudde bwebwagenda buyita, ebigambo ebisinga ebyewolebwa okuva mu bugirimaana byaggalwa. Kino kyekyatandikawo ekitangaala.
entries.english: As time passed, many words that were borrowed from German coalesced. This was the beginning of enlightenment.

entries.luganda: Mu by'obutonde omusika wa nnamulondo agenderawo mu magye nga amaze emisomo gye.
entries.english: Traditionally, the heir to the throne would go straight into the military after finishing school.

entries.luganda: Naye, Charles yagenda ku setendekero ya Trinity College, Cambridge jeyasomera ebikwata ku bantu n’okuvumbula ebyada n’oluvanyuma ebyafaayo nafuna obubonero 2:2(Diguli y’edaala ly'okubiri eyawansi).
entries.english: However, Charles went to university at Trinity College, Cambridge where he studied Anthropology and Archaeology, and later History, earning a 2:2 (a lower second class degree).

entries.luganda: Kalooli yeyali omuntu eyasooka okufuna digili mu maka g’obwakabaka bwe Britain.
entries.english: Charles was the first member of the British Royal Family to be awarded a degree.

entries.luganda: Buturuuki yomubulaaya(obukiika kkono bwa Thrace ne Rumelia mu peninsula ya Balkan) erimu 3% ebyeggwanga.
entries.english: European Turkey (eastern Thrace or Rumelia in the Balkan peninsula) includes 3% of the country.

entries.luganda: Ensi ya Buturuuki esinga kilomita 1,600 (1,000 mi) obuwanvu ne kilomita 800 (500 mi) obugazi, nga okutwaliza awamu ekifaananyi kya ssanduuku.
entries.english: The territory of Turkey is more than 1,600 kilometres (1,000 mi) long and 800 km (500 mi) wide, with a roughly rectangular shape.

entries.luganda: Ekitundu kya Butuluuki, ngamulimu ennyanja, kitwala kilomita za sukweya (300,948 sq mi), ngamuzino755,688 sukweya kilomita(291,773 sq mi)ziri mumaserengeta gabukiikaddyo bwa Asia ne sukweya kilomita 23,764 (9,174 sq mi) mu bulaaya.
entries.english: Turkey's area, including lakes, occupies 783,562 square kilometres (300,948 sq mi), of which 755,688 square kilometres (291,773 sq mi) are in south west Asia and 23,764 square kilometres (9,174 sq mi) in Europe.

entries.luganda: Obunene Turkey bwemalawo bugifuula ensi eya 37 mubunene, era kumpi bwebunene bwa bufalansa ne Bungereza nga ozigase.
entries.english: Turkey's area makes it the world's 37th-largest country, and is about the size of Metropolitan France and the United Kingdom combined.

entries.luganda: Buturuuki yetolodwa ennyanja ku njuyi ssatu. Enyanja ya Aegean mu bukiikaddyo, ennyanja enzirugavu mu mambuka ne nnyanja ya Mediterranea mu maserengeta.
entries.english: Turkey is encircled by seas on three sides: the Aegean Sea to the west, the Black Sea to the north and the Mediterranean Sea to the south.

entries.luganda: Eggwanga lya Luxembourg lilina ebyedda biwanvu naye amatwale gaabwe g’ataandiika mu 1839.
entries.english: Luxembourg has a long history but its independence dates from 1839.

entries.luganda: Ebitundu ebikola Bubiligi ebiliwo kati byaali bitundu ku Luxembourg ebiseera ebyayita naye byafuuka bya Bubiligi oluvanyuma lw’ekyukakyuuka ya Bubiligi eya 1830.
entries.english: Present-day parts of Belgium were part of Luxembourg in the past but became Belgian after the 1830s Belgian Revolution.

entries.luganda: Luxembourg nga eggwanga ligezezaako obutabaako na ludda naye lyaatwalibwa mu sseatalo eyasooka n’owookubiri ng’etwaalibwa Bugirimaani
entries.english: Luxembourg has always tried to remain a neutral country but it was occupied in both World War I and World War II by Germany.

entries.luganda: Mu 1957 Luxembourg yafuuka omu kubaatandikawo ekibiina leero ekimanyiddwa nga European union.
entries.english: In 1957 Luxembourg became a founding member of the organization which is today known as the European Union.

entries.luganda: DrukgyalDzong kyekibumbe era ekijukizo ky’omulembe gwa Buddha mumambuka ga distulikiti ya Paro (mu kyalo, Phondey)
entries.english: The Drukgyal Dzong is a ruined fortress and Buddhist monastery in the upper part of the Paro District (in Phondey Village).

entries.luganda: Kigambibwa nti mu 1649, Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyel yatongozawo ekizimbe ekyali ekinene olwo kwagala okulwanilila edembelye Eli aba tibetan-Mongol kifuba
entries.english: It is said that in 1649, Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyel created the fortress to commemorate his victory against the Tibetan-Mongol forces.

entries.luganda: Mu 1951, omuliro ogwatandikibwawo aba Drukgyal Dzong okusigala, ng’ekifaananyi kya Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal.
entries.english: In 1951, a fire caused for only some of the relics of the Drukgyal Dzong to remain, such as the image of Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal.

entries.luganda: Oluvanyuma lwo’muliro, the fortress yalekebwa wo era ne kumibwa, okusigala nga ekintu kya ba Bhutan’s eky’obyobuwangwa.
entries.english: After the fire, the fortress was preserved and protected, remaining to be one of Bhutan's most sensational attractions.

entries.luganda: Mu kyasa ky’ekumi n’omunana 18th, Cambodia yesanga mu Makati g’abanene abomuliraano babili okuli Thailand ne Vietnam.
entries.english: During the 18th century Cambodia found itself squeezed between two powerful neighbors, Thailand and Vietnam.

entries.luganda: Aba Thais Balumba Cambodia emirundi egiwera mu kyaasa ky’e18 nemu 1772 nebonoona Phnom Phen.
entries.english: The Thais invaded Cambodia several times in the 18th century and in 1772 they destroyed Phnom Phen.

entries.luganda: Mu myaka egiyise egyekyaasa kye 18th mu bavietnam nabo baalumba aba Cambodia.
entries.english: In the last years of the 18th century the Vietnamese also invaded Cambodia.

entries.luganda: Ebitundu kumi na munana ku buli kikumi aba Venezuelans tebayina mirimu,ne abantu abasinga abayina emirirmu abakola be kozesa.
entries.english: Eighteen percent of Venezuelans are unemployed, and most of those who are employed work in the informal economy.

entries.luganda: Ebitundu bibili ku bisatu eby’abantu e Venezuela bakola mu mirimu gy’obwanakyewa, ekitundu kimu ku bina bakola mu makolero, ate ekitundu kimu ku bitano bali mu bulimi
entries.english: Two thirds of Venezuelans who work do so in the service sector, nearly a quarter work in industry and a fifth work in agriculture.

entries.luganda: Yindasitule eyomuwendo mu Venezuela ya mafuta, ngensi yesinga okutunda ebyamaguzi ebifuluma eggwanga, newankubadde omu ku kikumi bebakola mu yindasitule yamafuta.
entries.english: An important industry for Venezuelans is oil, where the country is a net exporter, even though only one percent work in the oil industry.

entries.luganda: Nga Singapore yakafuna obwetwaze, abakugu mu nimiro z’ebimuli bakola kinene nyo okukyusa ekizinga nebakifula ekibuga ekyemiti gyokulukalu
entries.english: Early in the nation's independence, Singapore Botanic Gardens' expertise helped to transform the island into a tropical Garden City.

entries.luganda: Mu 1981, Vanda Miss Joaquim, ekimuli ekyenjawulo ekyimanyidwa nga Orchid Hybrid, kyalondebwa ngekimuli kyensi yonna.
entries.english: In 1981, Vanda Miss Joaquim, an orchid hybrid, was chosen as the nation's national flower.

entries.luganda: Buli mwaka nga mugw’ekumi kumpi akakadde 1.5 abalya omuddo batambula bada eri mumaserengeta g’ekyererezi okusala omuga gwa Mara, okuva mu mambuka ge nsozi okufuna enkuba.
entries.english: Every year around October nearly 1.5 million herbivores travel towards the southern plains, crossing the Mara River, from the northern hills for the rains.

entries.luganda: Era oluvanyuma okudda mu mambuka ngoyita mu bukiika ddyo, near ngosala ngoyita mu nnyanja ya Mara, ngenkuba eweddeyo mu gwokuna.
entries.english: And then back to the north through the west, once again crossing the Mara river, after the rains in around April.

entries.luganda: Ekitundu ky’eserengeti kilimu ekuumiro ly’ebisoro, ekuumiro ly’e Ngorongoro nelizaavu ye Maswa mu Tanzania ne Maasai Mara mu Kenya.
entries.english: The Serengeti region contains the Serengeti National Park, the Ngorongoro Conservation Area and Maswa Game Reserve in Tanzania and the Maasai Mara National Reserve in Kenya.

entries.luganda: Okuyiga okukola ebifannanyi ebitambula nga okozesa amagezi aga bulijjo, n’ebikozesebwa mu masomero (okuwandika engeero kulubaawo, amaloboozi, n’okulongoosa obutambi, okunyumya engero, nebirala bingi.)
entries.english: Learning to create interactive media requires conventional and traditional skills, as well as tools mastered in interactive classes (storyboarding, audio and video editing, story telling, etc.)

entries.luganda: Okutobeka okukwatagana kwetaaga newetegereza ensubirayo ku bikolebwa mu mawulire noyiga okulowooza mu ngeri etali ya bulijjo.
entries.english: Interactive design requires that you re-assess your assumptions about media production and learn to think in a non-linear ways.

entries.luganda: Emisono ejitabaganye jeetaga ebitundu ku kyebakola okugata binaabyo, naye era okujamu amakulu mu buli kimu.
entries.english: Interactive design requires that components of a project connect to each other, but also make sense as a separate entity.

entries.luganda: Ekibi kyebitangaaza ezizimbulukusa kiri nti awasinzirwa wagaziwa n' emirundi gya lensi ez'etagisa okufuna obuwanvu bwokusinziira bungi nyo okusinga obwa pulayimu lensi.
entries.english: The disadvantage of zoom lenses is that the focal complexity and number of lens elements required to achieve a range of focal lengths is much greater than for prime lenses.

entries.luganda: Eno ensonga tekyalina makulu nga ebilawuli by’abakozi bifuna omutindo ogw’awagulu mu kukola ebilawuli.
entries.english: This is becoming less of an issue as lens manufacturers achieve higher standards in lens production.

entries.luganda: Kino kiganyiza lensi ezizimbulukusa okufulumya ebifaananyi eby'omutindo okugelagelanya kw'ebyo ebikolebwa ne lensi ezobuwanvu obwenkomeredde.
entries.english: This has allowed zoom lenses to produce pictures of a quality comparable to that achieved by lenses with fixed focal length.

entries.luganda: Ekizibu ekiri ku lenzi eziraba ewala kye kyokuba nti teziba na supidi era lenzi zibeera wa nsiko.
entries.english: Another disadvantage of zoom lenses is that the maximum aperture (the speed) of the lens is usually lower.

entries.luganda: Kino kikola ekyuma ekilabila ewala mu bifo ebitalinamu kitangala nga totadeko taala lyaka kumulisa nga tonakuba kifananyi.
entries.english: This makes inexpensive zoom lenses hard to use in low-light conditions without a flash.

entries.luganda: Ebimu kubizibu byosanga ng’oteeka akatambi ku DVD kwekukasoma.
entries.english: One of the most common problems when trying to convert a movie to DVD format is the overscan.

entries.luganda: Terefayina nyingi zikolebwa mungeri yakusanyusa bantu abolukale abasing.
entries.english: Most televisions are made in a way to please the general public.

entries.luganda: N’olwensoga eyo buli kyolaba ku telefayina kisalibwako wagulu, wansi n’emumabbali
entries.english: For that reason, everything you see on the TV had the borders cut, top, bottom and sides.

entries.luganda: Kino kikolebwa okukakasa nti ekifaananyi kibika olutimbe lyonna. Ekyo kiyitibwa “overscan”.
entries.english: This is made to ensure that the image covers the whole screen. That is called overscan.

entries.luganda: Ekyenyamilwa nti bwokola ka Dividi, enkomelelo zisalibwako, ette n’ebwobela nga olina okutafuta wansi ku vidiyo, nabyo ebigambo bisalibwako
entries.english: Unfortunately, when you make a DVD, it's borders will most likely be cut too, and if the video had subtitles too close to the bottom, they won't be fully shown.

entries.luganda: Medieval castle eyedda eludde nga eyimusa okutebereza, eleeta ebifanaanyi ebya jousts, banquets ne Arthurian chivalry.
entries.english: The traditional medieval castle has long inspired the imagination, conjuring up images of jousts, banquets and Arthurian chivalry.

entries.luganda: Wadde nga okwesimba mu maaso gabasenda senda olukumi, kyangu okulowooza ku maloboozi n’empunya y’entalo ezaayita, kumpi okuwulira ensamba gele z’obulinya wansi n’okuwunyiriza okutya okuva wansi eyo.
entries.english: Even standing amidst thousand year-old ruins it is easy to bring to mind the sounds and smells of battles long gone, to almost hear the clatter of hooves on the cobbles and to smell the fear rising from the dungeon pits.

entries.luganda: Naye ddala okuteebereza kwaffe kusinziira ku mazima?Ebizimbe ebiwanvu byazimbibwa bitya mu kusooka? Era byatonatonebwa bitya wamu nokuzimbibwa?
entries.english: But is our imagination based on reality? Why were castles built in the first place? How were they designed and built?

entries.luganda: Nga amayumba gonnna ag'ekisser akyo, Kirby Muxloe Castle ekinga kufaanana nyumba ebiriko bbugwe mukifo ky'olubiri.
entries.english: Typical for the period, Kirby Muxloe Castle is more of a fortified house than a true castle.

entries.luganda: Amadirisa gakyo amanene agatemagana n’ebisenge ebitono tebyandisobodde kulwanyisa bulumbaganyi bumaliridde okumala akabanga.
entries.english: Its large glazed windows and thin walls would not have been able to resist a determined attack for long.

entries.luganda: Mu mwaka gwa 1480, nga okuzimba kwakatandikibwa omuloodi Hastings, ensi yalina emirembe era nga ebyokwerinda byetangisibwa eri obubinja bwababbi.
entries.english: In the 1480s, when its construction was begun by Lord Hastings, the country was relatively peaceful and defense was only required against small bands of roving marauders.

entries.luganda: Okutebenkeza amanyi yali nkola amawanga ga bulaaya mwe ganoonyeza okunyweeza obusukkulumu bwa amwanga ga bulaaya
entries.english: The balance of power was a system in which European nations sought to maintain the national sovereignty of all European states.

entries.luganda: Ekiteeso kyaali nti ensi za bulaaya zaalina okulemesa eggwanga erimu okubeera eryaamanyi ennyo, n'olweekyo gavumenti zaakyuusanga enjuyi zeziwagira okusobola okunyweeza obutebenkevu.
entries.english: The concept was that all European nations had to seek to prevent one nation from becoming powerful, and thus national governments often changed their alliances in order to maintain the balance.

entries.luganda: Olutalo lw’aba Spanish olwensikirano lwasaawo olutaalo olusookera ddala nga entabo evudde ku butakkaanya mu ngabanya y'obufuzi.
entries.english: The War of Spanish Succession marked the first war whose central issue was the balance of power.

entries.luganda: Kuno kwe kwali enkomerero era n’enkyukakyuka nga amagye GA Bungereza tegakyasobola kwekwasa ntalo za ddini, olutalo olwatwala emyaka assatu lwe lwasembayo mu ntalo z’eddini.
entries.english: This marked an important change, as European powers would no longer have the pretext of being religious wars. Thus, the Thirty Years' War would be the last war to be labeled a religious war.

entries.luganda: Yekaalo ya Artemis ku Ephesus yayononebwa mu mwezi gwomusanvu nga 21, 356 BCE mukikolwa kya arson ekyakolebwa Herostratus.
entries.english: The temple of Artemis at Ephesus was destroyed on July 21, 356 BCE in an act of arson committed by Herostratus.

entries.luganda: Okusinzila ku lugero, yayagala nyo okumanyibwa, era nga tafayo oba akozze ki okukitukako. Abaphiriso nga banyiizze nyo balangilila nti erinya lya Herostratus teliddamu kuwandikibwa
entries.english: According to the story, his motivation was fame at any cost. The Ephesians, outraged, announced that Herostratus' name never be recorded.

entries.luganda: Omuyonaani omusomi w’ebyaafaayo Strabo oluvannyuma yawandiika erinnya, nga yengeri jetulimanyi leero. Yeekaalu yasaanyizibwaawo ekiro kyeekimu Alexandar the Great lweyazaalibwa.
entries.english: The Greek historian Strabo later noted the name, which is how we know today. The temple was destroyed on the same night that Alexander the Great was born.

entries.luganda: Alexander nga kabaka, yewaayo okusasula okudaabiriza essinzizo, naye ekiwebwayo kye kyagaanibwa. Oluvanyuma Alexander bweyamala okufa essinzizo lyaddamu okuzimbibwa nga Yesu tanajja mu 323 BCE.
entries.english: Alexander, as king, offered to pay to rebuild the temple, but his offer was denied. Later, after Alexander died, the temple was rebuilt in 323 BCE.

entries.luganda: Kakasa nti omukono gwo mukakamu nga bwekisoboka nga osigaal okuba buliungi oluyimba era gezaako okutambua engalozo mu bukkamu.
entries.english: Make sure your hand is as relaxed as possible while still hitting all the notes correctly - also try not to make much extraneous motion with your fingers.

entries.luganda: Mu ngeri eno ojja kweekooya katono nnyo nga bwe kisoboka. Jjukira teweetaaga kunyiga nnyo mapeesa na maanyi nga ku nnanga.
entries.english: This way, you will tire yourself out as little as possible. Remember there's no need to hit the keys with a lot of force for extra volume like on the piano.

entries.luganda: Ku accordion, okufuna edobooze eryeyongedeko, okozesa bellows nga oyongedeko amaanyi oba obwangu.
entries.english: On the accordion, to get extra volume, you use the bellows with more pressure or speed.

entries.luganda: Amaanyi agatategerekeka kyekireeta wo komunyo eyokwenyonyolako, oba okumanya okutuukiride eri amazima agatuukiride, amazima gemyoyo oba Katonda.
entries.english: Mysticism is the pursuit of communion with, identity with, or conscious awareness of an ultimate reality, divinity, spiritual truth, or God.

entries.luganda: Omukiriza anoonya obumanyirivu obwesimbu, ategeera amangu, oba anyikidde mu by’omwooyo owanamadala/ endya oba ebiliibwa.
entries.english: The believer seeks a direct experience, intuition, or insight into divine reality/the deity or dieties.

entries.luganda: Abagoberezi banonya engeri ezokuberawo oba ebikolwa ebigendererwa okulungamya obumanyirivu obwo.
entries.english: Followers pursue certain ways of living, or practices that are intended to nurture those experiences.

entries.luganda: Okusinza ebibumbe kyawukana kubika byenzikiriza ebirala nokusinza olwokusa nnyo essira ku byoyitamu ngomuntui ngotegera burungi, naddala ebyo ebyeddembe, ebirabula, ebinyuma wamu nebyo ebirimu engerigeri.
entries.english: Mysticism can be distinguished from other forms of religious belief and worship by its emphasis on the direct personal experience of a unique state of consciousness, particularly those of a peaceful, insightful, blissful, or even ecstatic character.

entries.luganda: Sikhism y’eddini okuva mu kitundutundu kya buyindi. Yasibuka mu ddiini ya Punjabi mu kyaasa kye kummi ne ttaano (15) okwawukanamu kwekibinja mu Hindu
entries.english: Sikhism is a religion from the Indian sub-continent. It originated in the Punjab region during the 15th century from a sectarian split within the Hindu tradition.

entries.luganda: Aba Sikh batwaala ediina yabwe okubeera eyenjawulo ku yaba Hindu lwakuba bakiriza nti baava mu baHindu n’ebyebakiririzaamu.
entries.english: Sikhs consider their faith to be a separate religion from Hinduism though they acknowledge its Hindu roots and traditions.

entries.luganda: Aba Sikhs bayita ediini yaabwe Gurmat, ekitegeza Punjabi “eri ekubo lya guru”. Guru yengeri enkuru eri ediini z'abayindi zonna naye Sikhism ettute amakulu agakola ekinyusi ky'enzikiriza ya Sikh.
entries.english: Sikhs call their religion Gurmat, which is Punjabi for "way of the guru". The guru is a fundamental aspect of all Indian religions but in Sikhism has taken on an importance that forms the core of Sikh beliefs.

entries.luganda: Eddiini yatandikibwawo mu kyasa kya 15 nga kyatandikibwawo ow’amaanyi Nanak (1469–1539). Eyasikirwa endalaez’amaanyi Mwenda.
entries.english: The religion was founded in the 15th century by Guru Nanak (1469–1539). There followed in succession a further nine gurus.

entries.luganda: Wabula mu gwomukaaga nga 1956, ebisuubizo bya Krushchev byatekebwa mu kugezesebwa abakozi bwebekalakasa olwokubula kwemmere wamu nokusalwa emisaala, era kino nekifuuka okwekalakasa okwaddala eri obusosoze.
entries.english: However, in June 1956, Krushchev's promises were put to the test when riots in Poland, where workers were protesting against food shortages and wage cuts, turned into a general protest against Communism.

entries.luganda: Wadde nga kunkomelero, Krushchev yawereza tanka okutereza embeera, yakuba ekubbo ly’ebyalibibanjibwa mubyenfuna nakiriza okuwa Wladyslaw Gomulka obukulu nga katikiro.
entries.english: Although in the end, Krushchev sent in tanks to restore order, he did give way to some economic demands and agreed to appoint the popular Wladyslaw Gomulka as the new prime minister.

entries.luganda: Ekiwonko kyenkulakulana ya Indus kyali kya myaka jakikomo mu mambuka g’obugwanjuba mutundutundu lyabuyindi nga okusingira dala kikwata ku mbeera ey’omulembe omupya ogwa Pakistan nediini ezimu mu mambuka g’obugwanjuba namambuka g’o g’obuvanjuba ga Afghanistan.
entries.english: The Indus Valley Civilization was a Bronze Age civilisation in the northwest Indian subcontinent encompassing most of modern-day Pakistan and some regions in northwest India and northeast Afghanistan.

entries.luganda: Obugunjufu buno bwanya nyo mabbali g’omugga Indus wejj’erinnya lyaayo.
entries.english: The civilisation flourished in the basins of the Indus River wherefore it derives its name.

entries.luganda: Newankubadde abayizi batebereza nga bwekiri nti enkulakulana yaliwo mumabaafu genyanja kati eyakala eyitibwa Sarasvati, Etekeddwa lwakiri okuyitibwa ebyamakolero bya Sarasvati, newankubadde abamu bagiyita nkulakulana ya Harappan ngakiva ku Harappa, yemu ku ezo sayiti eyasooka okusimibwa mu gyo 1920.
entries.english: Although some scholars speculate that since the civilisation also existed in the basins of the now dried up Sarasvati River, it should be aptly called the Indus-Sarasvati Civilization, while some call it the Harappan Civilization after Harappa, the first of its sites to be excavated in the 1920s.

entries.luganda: Ekikula kyabanamajje kyobwakabaka bwaba Rooma bayamba mu kutondawo ebyamalwaliro.
entries.english: The militaristic nature of the Roman empire aided in the development of medical advances.

entries.luganda: Abasawo batandika okuwandiikibwa Emperor Augustus era nakola n’ekibiina ky’abasawo ekisooka ekinakozesebwa oluvannyuma lw’okulwana.
entries.english: Doctors began to be recruited by Emperor Augustus and even formed the first Roman Medical Corps for use in the aftermath of battles.

entries.luganda: Abalongoosa baliina okumanya ku byebasa eby'enjawulo nga mulimu “morphine” nga bikamulwa okuva munsigo za “poppy” ne “scopolamine”e okuva mu nsigo zeddagala.
entries.english: Surgeons had knowledge of various sedatives including morphine from extracts of poppy seeds and scopolamine from herbane seeds.

entries.luganda: Bafuuka bakugu mu kutemako ebitundu okuwonya abalwadde okuvunda n'okusiba n'okunyweza emisuwa okukomya okukulukuta kw'omusaayi.
entries.english: They became proficient at amputation to save patients from gangrene as well as tourniquets and arterial clamps to stem blood flow.

entries.english: Over multiple centuries, the Roman empire led to great gains in the field of medicine and formed much of the knowledge we know today.

entries.luganda: Ettaka edongoofu origami eri origami namateeka nti fold emu yokka yelina okukolebwako buli sawa, endala fold enzibu nga fold za reverse tezikilizibwa, fold zonna zirina ebifo ebitegerekeka..
entries.english: Pureland origami is origami with the restriction that only one fold may be done at a time, more complex folds like reverse folds are not allowed, and all folds have straightforward locations.

entries.luganda: Kyakolebwa John Smith mu gyo 1970 okuyamba ku Batali batendeke era nabo abalina obukugu obutono mu mamotoka.
entries.english: It was developed by John Smith in the 1970s to help inexperienced folders or those with limited motor skills.

entries.luganda: Abaana batandika okufuna okulabulwa okw’amawanga n’enkyuuka kyuka mu njogera nga bakyali bato ate nga eno enkyukakyuka ekosa eneyissa.
entries.english: Children develop an awareness of race and racial stereotypes quite young and these racial stereotypes affect behavior.

entries.luganda: Okugeza, abaana abavaayo ne beyawula ku bantu beefananyirizaako nga abatakola bulungi mu ssomero batera obutakola bulungi mu ssomero kasita basoma ku kwefaananyiriza ne gyebasibuka.
entries.english: For instance, children who identify with a racial minority that is stereotyped as not doing well in school tend to not do well in school once they learn about the stereotype associated with their race.

entries.english: MySpace is the third most popular website used in the United States and has 54 million profiles currently.

entries.english: These websites have gotten a lot of attention, especially in the education setting.

entries.english: There are positive aspects to these websites, which include, being able to easily setup a class page which can include blogs, videos, photos, and other features.

entries.luganda: Olupapula lunno lusobola okutuukibwaako nga otadem omukutu gumu gwoka, ekyanguwa okujukirwa era n’okuwandiika eri abaana abayinza okusanga obuzibu okukozesa amapeesa ga kompuuta oba n’okuwandiika ebigambo.
entries.english: This page can easily be accessed by providing just one web address, which makes it easy to remember and easy to type in for students who may have trouble using the keyboard or with spelling.
