entries.english: Possible long term health events from excessive drinking can include liver damage and even blindness and death. The potential danger is increased when consuming illegally produced alcohol.

entries.luganda: Emyoyo egitalagidwa gisobola okubaamu ebitatuuse ebyobulabe ngamwotadde omwenge, ebisobola kuvaako obuzibe bwamaaso oba okufa nebwebiba mu bipimo ebitonotono.
entries.english: Illegal spirits can contain various dangerous impurities including methanol, which can cause blindness or death even in small doses.

entries.luganda: Galubindi zisobola okubeera ezalayisi mu nsi engwira, naddala mu nsi ezirimu sente entono abakozi jebabasasulira sente entono.
entries.english: Eyeglasses can be cheaper in a foreign country, especially in low-income countries where labour costs are lower.

entries.luganda: Fumitirizaamu okukeberebwa amaaso ngoli waka, naddala nga oliku yinsuwa, awo nno oleete empapula eziriko ebizuulidwa ziterekebwe ewalala.
entries.english: Consider getting an eye exam at home, especially if insurance covers it, and bringing the prescription along to be filed elsewhere.

entries.luganda: Fuleemu zekika ekyawaggulu ezibeera mu bitundu ebyo zandiba nebizibu bibiri; ebimu biyinza okubeera nga bizijjako, ate ezo ezaddala ezireetebwa mu ggwanga zandiba nga zabuseere kwezo eziri ewaka.
entries.english: High-end brand-name frames available in such areas may have two problems; some may be knock-offs, and the real imported ones may be more expensive than at home.

entries.luganda: Kawa kye kintu ekya maguzi ekikyasinze okusubulwa mu nsi yonna, era nga osobola okufuna ebika ebyenjawulo mu maka go.
entries.english: Coffee is one of the world's most traded commodities, and you can probably find many types in your home region.

entries.luganda: Naye era waliwo engeri ezenjawulo ezokunywamu kkaaa okwetoloola ensi yonna zosaanye okwegezaamu.
entries.english: Nevertheless, there are many distinctive ways of drinking coffee around the world that are worth experiencing.

entries.luganda: Okulambula empuku kyitegeeza kuyingira mpuku nga erimu amazzi oba nga nkalu.
entries.english: Canyoning (or: canyoneering) is about going in a bottom of a canyon, which is either dry or full of water.

entries.luganda: Olukonko lubeeramu ebintu ebiva mu kuwuga, okulinnya nokubuuka—naye kwetaaga okutendekebwa kutono oba okubeera ne seepu ennungi (bwogerageranya mukuwalampa enjazi, okubuuka kwa scuba, nokulibbya ensozi okugeza).
entries.english: Canyoning combines elements from swimming, climbing and jumping--but requires relatively little training or physical shape to get started (compared to rock climbing, scuba diving or alpine skiing, for example).

entries.luganda: Okuwalampa ensozi muzanyo gwawabweru ogulimu okutambulira mu mbeera zabulijjo, ngokozesa ebiyamba mu kuwalampa.
entries.english: Hiking is an outdoor activity which consists of walking in natural environments, often on hiking trails.

entries.luganda: Okwambuka ensozi okwolugendo olutawera mayiro emu ezisobola okutambulwa mu lunaku lumu.
entries.english: Day hiking involves distances of less than a mile up to longer distances that can be covered in a single day.

entries.luganda: Okutambula kwe misana ku kakubo akatono entekateka enyangu entono zetagisa, era omuntu yenna eyetengeredde ekimala asobola okuzinyumirwa.
entries.english: For a day hike along an easy trail little preparations are needed, and any moderately fit person can enjoy them.

entries.luganda: Amaka agalina abaana abatono bandyetaaga okwetegeka okusingako naye olunako wabweeru lusoboka nebwoba nabaana abawere n’abatanagenda kusomero.
entries.english: Families with small children may need more preparations, but a day outdoors is easily possible even with babies and pre-school children.

entries.luganda: Mubuwanganguse, waliyo ebitongole ebyokudduka ebisoba mu 200. Ezisinga kuezo zikola kinoomu.
entries.english: Internationally, there are nearly 200 running tour organizations. Most of them operate independently.

entries.luganda: Abalambuzi babaddusi okwetoolola ensi yonna, aba genda ngabadduka ne netiwaaka mulimu emige gyabekenenya awaddukirwa ku ssemazinga nnya.
entries.english: The Global Running Tours successor, Go Running Tours networks dozens of sightrunning providers on four continents.

entries.luganda: Na makubo mukudduka kwa Barcelona nga mulambula Barcelona ne Copenhagen's emisinde kyagatibwa mangu ku misinde egy'obulambuzi Prague okusinziira ku Prague n'abalala.
entries.english: With roots in Barcelona's Running Tours Barcelona and Copenhagen's Running Copenhagen, it was quickly joined by Running Tours Prague based in Prague and others.

entries.luganda: Waliiyo ebintu bingi byoliina okuteka munkola nga oba tonaba oba nga ogenda okutambula awantu.
entries.english: There are many things you have to take into consideration before and when you travel somewhere.

entries.luganda: Bwotambula suubira ebintu obutabeera byebimu nga bwebiri “ewaka”. Empisa, amateeka, emere, obulipagano, ebyensula, omutindo, olulimi nebirala mungeri emu bijja kwawukanako nejobeera.
entries.english: When you travel, expect things not to be like they are "back home". Manners, laws, food, traffic, lodging, standards, language and so on will to some extent differ from where you live.

entries.luganda: Kino kyekintu kyotekedwa lubeerera okuteeka mu birowoozo, okwewala okwenyamira oba osanga nokwewala enkola yekyalo eyokukolamu ebintu.
entries.english: This is something you always need to keep in mind, to avoid disappointment or perhaps even distaste over local ways to do things.

entries.luganda: Abakola ku ntambula zabantu babadewo okuva kukyaasa kye 19. Akola kubyentabula emirundi egisinga ayamba mukukola kubyentambula okusuka ku mutambuze byeyayitamu emabega mu mbeera, mubyobuwangwa oba mumawanga agatanakulakulana.
entries.english: Travel agencies have been around since the 19th century. A travel agent is usually a good option for a journey which extends beyond a traveller's previous experience of nature, culture, language or low-income countries.

entries.luganda: Nnewaakubadde ebitongole byaniriza abantu okwewandisa okufuna ebiffo, ebitongole ebisinga, okusingira ddala eby’okutambula, emiwendo gya njawulo oba n’ebigobero.
entries.english: Although most agencies are willing to take on most regular bookings, many agents specialise in particular types of travel, budget ranges or destinations.

entries.luganda: Kisobola okubeera ekisinga okwesooka agenti abookinga engendo ezifaanagana ne zizo.
entries.english: It can be better to use an agent who frequently books similar trips to yours.

entries.luganda: Tunuulila ngedo kki atambuza zatulaze eziliko, paka wansi kagwiilawo.
entries.english: Take a look at what trips the agent is promoting, whether on a website or in a shop window.

entries.luganda: Bwoba oyagala okulaba ensi ku layisi, nga kyetagisa, ebyo bulamu oba okugezesebwa, waliwo engeri nyinji eyokukikola.
entries.english: If you want to see the world on the cheap, for necessity, lifestyle or challenge, there are some ways to do that.

entries.luganda: Ekyomugaso, bigwa mu bitundi bibiri:mu kukola nga otambula oba okusala ku nsasanya.kino ekiwanddiko kye kanyiziddwa mu latter
entries.english: Basically, they fall into two categories: Either work while you travel or try and limit your expenses. This article is focused on the latter.

entries.luganda: Eri abo abeewaddeyo okusaddaaka emirembe, obudde n’okuteeberezebwa okusindika ensaasaanya wansi kumpi paka ku zeeero, laba okutambula kwemiwendo ejaawansi
entries.english: For those willing to sacrifice comfort, time and predictability to push expenses down close to zero, see minimum budget travel.

entries.luganda: Okuwabulwa kulowooza nti abatambuze si babbi, teba salikiriza, tebeetaba mu butale obumenya amateka, oba okulyaazamanya bannabwe.
entries.english: The advice assumes that travellers do not steal, trespass, participate in the illegal market, beg, or otherwise exploit other people for their own gain.

entries.luganda: Ekifo ewakebererwa abafuluma nabayingira eggwanga abatambuze webatera okutuukira ngabakava ku nnyonyi, ku mmeeri, oba okuva ku mmotoka.
entries.english: An immigration checkpoint is usually the first stop when disembarking from a plane, a ship, or another vehicle.

entries.luganda: Eggali z’omukka ezimu ezisala ensalo, okwekebejja kukolebwa atte olina okubeera nga olina endagamunttu entuufu nga olinya emu kwezo eggali z’omukka.
entries.english: In some cross-border trains inspections are done on the running train and you should have valid ID with you when boarding one of those trains.

entries.luganda: Ku gaali z'omukka ez'okwebaka ekiro, passipota ziyinza okukunganyizibwa omukubiriza awo otulo two tuleme okutataganyizibwa.
entries.english: On night sleeper trains, passports may be collected by the conductor so that you do not have your sleep interrupted.

entries.luganda: Okwewandisa kyatekka mukwagala okufuna visa. Mu nsi enddala, olina okwewandisa n’olagga gyobela eri abakulembeze abekyalo
entries.english: Registration is an additional requirement for the visa process. In some countries, you must register your presence and address where you are staying with the local authorities.

entries.luganda: Kino kiyinza okwetaaga okujjuza foomu n’abebyokwerin da oba okukyalira yafeesi ekola ku bagwira.
entries.english: This might require filling out a form with the local police or a visit to the immigration offices.

entries.luganda: Munsi nyingi ezirina eteeka ng’eryo, woteeri z'omu kitundu zikwasaganya okwewandiisa (kkakasa nga obuuza).
entries.english: In many countries with such a law, local hotels will handle the registration (make sure to ask).

entries.luganda: Mungeri endala, abo bokka abasula wabweru webifo ebisulwamu abalambuzi bateekedwa okwewandiisa. Lwakubanga kino kiretera etteeka obutabeera nabukuumi, nolwekyo kizuule ngatonakiwayo.
entries.english: In other cases, only those staying outside of tourist accommodations need to register. However, this makes the law much more obscure, so find out beforehand.

entries.luganda: Ebyobuzimbi birimu ebyoku designing n'okuzimba ebizimbe. Engeri ekizimbe gye kizimbiddwamu nakyo kyakulambula ngakyo.
entries.english: Architecture is concerned with the design and construction of buildings. The architecture of a place is often a tourist attraction in its own right.

entries.luganda: Ebizimbe ebimu bisanyusa okutunulako nga oli wagulu ku kizimbe ekilala nga olimudinisa okusobola okwekanya obulungi.
entries.english: Many buildings are quite beautiful to look at and the view from a tall building or from a cleverly-positioned window can be a beauty to behold.

entries.luganda: Ebyokuzzimbba bikwatagana n’ebyokutegekela ekibugga, bya yinginiya, okutimbba, okunyilizza munda n’ebyokuteleza mu kompanuda
entries.english: Architecture overlaps considerably with other fields including urban planning, civil engineering, decorative arts, interior design and landscape design.

entries.luganda: Engeri pueblo enyingi gyezirimu byalo, tojakusobola kuzuula omuwendo omukulu ogw'obulamu bw'ekiro nga totambudde Ku Albuquerque oba Santa fe.
entries.english: Given how remote many of the pueblos are, you won't be able to find a significant amount of nightlife without traveling to Albuquerque or Santa Fe.

entries.luganda: Lwakubanga, kumpi ewazanyirwa zaala wonna ewogedwako waggulu, era nyingi ku zo zileetawo okusanyuka okwenjawulo(naddala ezo engazi eziriranidde ddala Albuquerque ne Santa Fe).
entries.english: However, nearly all of the casinos listed above serve drinks, and several of them bring in name-brand entertainment (primarily the large ones immediately surrounding Albuquerque and Santa Fe).

entries.luganda: Wegendereze: obubaala obw’ekyaalo obutono sibifo biruni okubeeramu abagwira okukasibiramu.
entries.english: Beware: small-town bars here are not always good places for the out-of-state visitor to hang out.

entries.luganda: Eri ekintu kimu, amambuka ga Mexico empya galina ebizibu eby'enjawulo nokuvuga okw'etamiiro, n'obungi bw'abavuzi abayononeeka kuli wagulu kumpi mu bu bbaala zobubuga obutono.
entries.english: For one thing, northern New Mexico has significant problems with drunk driving, and the concentration of intoxicated drivers is high close to small-town bars.

entries.luganda: Okukuutiza ennyo ekitetaagisa kwe kumanyikiddwa nga graffiti.
entries.english: Unwanted murals or scribble is known as graffiti.

entries.luganda: Wadde nga kili wala n’omulembe oguliko, abantu abasinga bakisiba ku kwonona abavubuka kwebatuusa ku bintu eby’olukale n’ebyobwananyini nga bakozesa langi enfuyire.
entries.english: While it's far from a modern phenomenon, most people probably associate it with youth vandalizing public and private property using spray paint.

entries.luganda: Wabula, ennaku zino waliwo abasiizi b’ebifaananyi ebya Graffiti abakugu, emikolo gy’okusiiga ebifaananyi ebya Graffiti, n’ebisiige ebiri mu mateeka. Ebisiige bya Graffiti mu njogera eno bitwalibwa nga ebisiige ebitamenya mateeka.
entries.english: However, nowadays there are established graffiti artists, graffiti events and "legal" walls. Graffiti paintings in this context often resemble artworks rather than illegible tags.

entries.luganda: Okukasuka Bumelanga kakodyo akamanyikiddwa enyo abalambuuzi abasinga kebagala okufuna.
entries.english: Boomerang throwing is a popular skill that many tourists want to acquire.

entries.luganda: Bwoba nga oyagala okuyiga kukanyuga ka boomerang akakomawo mu mikono jjo, kakasa nti olina akasobola okudda.
entries.english: If you want to learn throwing a boomerang that comes back to your hand, make sure you have a suitable boomerang for returning.

entries.luganda: Okuyiga okuliwo okusinga mu Australia mubutuffu tebidda. Ekisinga eri abatandika butagezako kukasuka mumpewo.
entries.english: Most boomerangs available in Australia are in fact non-returning. It is best for beginners to not try throwing in windy

entries.luganda: Emmere yomu Hangi bagifumbira mu kinya ekyokya mu taka.
entries.english: A Hangi Meal is cooked in a hot pit in the ground.

entries.luganda: Ekinnya olumu kijuzibwamu amayinza agookya okuva mu muliro oba mu bifo ebimu ebbugumu elyabulijjo liletera ebitundu ku ttaka okwokya.
entries.english: The pit is either heated with hot stones from a fire, or in some places geothermal heat makes areas of ground naturally hot.

entries.luganda: Ekinnya ky’amasiga kikozesebwa okufumba emmere mu nkola ey'ekinnansi.
entries.english: The hangi is often used to cook a traditional roast style dinner.

entries.luganda: Ebifo bingi mu Rutorua ebilina emere efumbibwa ebbuggumu ly’omuttaka, atte nga emere bweti endala esangibwa mu bifo bya Christchurch, Wellington n’awalala.
entries.english: Several places in Rotorua offer geothermal hangi, while other hangi can be sampled in Christchurch, Wellington and elsewhere.

entries.luganda: Oluguudo lwegaali ymukka olwa metro lulina kkalaasi bbiri ku gaali zomukka ezikolera okwetolola ekibuga kya Cape: Metroplus(ngeno yeyabagagga) ne Metro (ng’eno yabamufunampola).
entries.english: MetroRail has two classes on commuter trains in and around Cape Town: MetroPlus (also called First Class) and Metro (called Third Class).

entries.luganda: MetroPlus nungi okusinga ate nga y'abantu batono, lwakuba yabbeyi ko, yadde ekyali yalayisi okusinga metro tikitti ezabulijjo Ebulaya.
entries.english: MetroPlus is more comfortable and less crowded but slightly more expensive, though still cheaper than normal metro tickets in Europe.

entries.luganda: Buli ggaali yomukka erina MetroPlus ne Metro kooki; MetroPlus kooki lubeerera zibeera ku nkomerero yegaali yomukka kumpi nekibuga kya Cape.
entries.english: Every train has both MetroPlus and Metro coaches; the MetroPlus coaches are always on the end of the train nearest Cape Town.

entries.luganda: Okusitulila abalala - Toleka nga nsawo zo wotolabira, naddala nga osala ensalo z'amawanga amalala.
entries.english: Carrying for others - Never let your bags out of your sight, especially when you are crossing international borders.

entries.luganda: Oyinza okwesanga nga okozesebwa nga omusituzi w'enjaga nga totegedde, ekiyinza okusula mu mitawaana egy'amaanyi.
entries.english: You could find yourself being used as a drug carrier without your knowledge, which will land you in a great deal of trouble.

entries.luganda: Kino kitegezza kulindila mu lunyilili kubanga embwa eziwunyiliza enjaga ziyinza okukozesebwa sawa yona
entries.english: This includes waiting in line, as drug-sniffing dogs could be used at any time without notice.

entries.luganda: Ensi ezimu zirina ebibonerezo ebyamanyi ebisuse ne kumisango egy'omulundi ogusooka; bino bisobola okugattamu ebibonerezo by'amakomera ebisukka emyaka 10 oba okufa.
entries.english: Some countries have exceedingly draconian punishments even for first time offenses; these can include prison sentences of over 10 years or death.

entries.luganda: Ensawo ezitafibwako zisobola okubbibwa era zisobola okusikiriza ab’obuyinza nga berarikirira bbomu.
entries.english: Unattended bags are a target for theft and can also attract attention from authorities wary of bomb threats.

entries.luganda: Ekka, okusinzira nti buli kiseera obera wetoloddwa obuwuka bunno obuleta obulwadde, emikisa jili waggulu nti tebusobola kulwaza
entries.english: At home, due to this constant exposure to the local germs, odds are very high that you're already immune to them.

entries.luganda: Naye mu bitundu ebilala mu nsi yona awali ebimera byotamanyilidde, oyinza okusanga ebizibu bingi.
entries.english: But in other parts of the world, where the bacteriological fauna are new to you, you're far more likely to run into problems.

entries.luganda: Mu mbera eyebbugumu, obuwuka obuleeta obulwadde bukula mangu nyo ate ne buwangala okusingako, nga buli wabweru w’omubiri.
entries.english: Also, in warmer climates bacteria both grow more quickly and survive longer outside the body.

entries.luganda: Okubonaabona kwa Delhi, ekikolimo kya Falaawo, okuwoolera kwa Montezuma, n’emikwano gyabwe mingi.
entries.english: Thus the scourges of Delhi Belly, the Pharaoh's Curse, Montezuma's Revenge, and their many friends.

entries.luganda: Ngamubizibu by’okussa mu mbeera ezinyogoga, ebizibu byomukyenda mu mbeera ezookya bingi era mu biseera ebisinga binyiiza naye sibyabulabe ekiri awo.
entries.english: As with respiratory problems in colder climates, intestinal problems in hot climates are fairly common and in most cases are distinctly annoying but not really dangerous.

entries.luganda: Bwoba ogenda mu nsi ezikya kulaakulana omulundi gwo ogusooka – oba mu kitundu ky’ensi ekipya – tonyooma kikangabwa kya buwangwa.
entries.english: If traveling in a developing country for the first time – or in a new part of the world – don't underestimate the potential culture shock.

entries.luganda: Abatambuze bangi banywevu, ebesobola, bawangulwa obupya bw'enkulakulana y'okutambula mu nsi, nga okukyuusa kw'obuwangwa obutono kusobola okugattako amangu.
entries.english: Many a stable, capable traveler has been overcome by the newness of developing world travel, where many little cultural adjustments can add up quickly.

entries.luganda: Okusingira ddala mu nanku zo ezisoka, lowozza okuggendda mu woteri enungi, ewali emere enungi n’emperezza ey’ebbeyi okusobola okumanyila ekifo
entries.english: Especially in your initial days, consider splurging on Western-style and -quality hotels, food, and services to help acclimatize.

entries.luganda: Tewebaka ku mufaliso oba ekyezizikwa ku ttaka mu kitundu kyotamanyi kisolo kyamu gyekiri.
entries.english: Do not sleep on a mattress or pad on the ground in areas where you do not know the local fauna.

entries.luganda: Bwonaaba ogenda kusula bweeru, leeta etundubaali oba ekyeesuubo kyolugoye okutangira emisota,enjaba ne’byobulabe ebirala.
entries.english: If you are going to camp out, bring a camp cot or hammock to keep you away from snakes, scorpions and such.

entries.luganda: Jjuza amakaago ne kakaawa ak'amaanyi kumakya ne kacaayi ka chamomile akawungeezi.
entries.english: Fill your home with a rich coffee in the morning and some relaxing chamomile tea at night.

entries.luganda: Bwoba oli mu luwumula, obeera nobudde obwetwalako neweyonona era notwala obudakiika butono okutandikawo ekintu ekyenjawulo.
entries.english: When you're on a staycation, you have the time to treat yourself and take a few extra minutes to brew up something special.

entries.luganda: Bwoba nga totya kugezako, wandikubye eyokunywa mu mubisi nogezako okukola ebyokunywa ebisenekerevu ebyedekende.
entries.english: If you're feeling more adventurous, take the opportunity to juice or blend up some smoothies:

entries.luganda: Oyinza okuvumbula ekyokunywa ekyangu kyosobola okwekolela okunya ku kyenkya nga ozzeeyo ku bulamu bwo obwa bulijjo.
entries.english: maybe you'll discover a simple beverage that you can make for breakfast when you're back to your daily routine.

entries.luganda: Bwoba obeera mu kibuga ngabalina engeri gyebanywamu, genda mu mabaala oba obubaala mu bitundu ebyetoolode byotatera kwettanira.
entries.english: If you live in a city with a varied drinking culture, go to bars or pubs in neighborhoods you don't frequent.

entries.luganda: Eri abo abatamayiridde dagala lya jargon, ebigambo ezikwata no kukwatibwa birina amakulu agenjawulo.
entries.english: For those unfamiliar with medical jargon, the words infectious and contagious have distinct meanings.

entries.luganda: Endwadde ekwatira mumpeewo yeeyo ereteebwa obuwuuka obutono, nga akawuka, obuwuka bwobujama, obwebivundu oba obunyuunyuuta.
entries.english: An infectious disease is one that is caused by a pathogen, such as a virus, bacterium, fungus or other parasites.

entries.luganda: Ekirwadde ekilanda kyekyo ekibuna amangu enyo bwobera kumpi n’omuntu akilina.
entries.english: A contagious disease is a disease which is easily transmitted by being in the vicinity of an infected person.

entries.luganda: Ensi ezisinga zetagisa abagenyi abayingila oba abafuluma okugemezibwa endwadde ezenjawulo
entries.english: Many governments require visitors entering, or residents leaving, their countries to be vaccinated for a range of diseases.

entries.luganda: Ebyeetago binno biyinza okusinziila ku nsiiki omutu jakyaalidde oba jayagala okukyaalamu.
entries.english: These requirements may often depend on what countries a traveller has visited or intends to visit.

entries.luganda: Ekimu ku bilungi bya Charlotte, mumambuka ga Carolina kye kyokuba nti waliwo ebintu bingi ebisikiliza amaka.
entries.english: One of strong points of Charlotte, North Carolina, is that it has an abundance of high-quality options for families.

entries.luganda: Abatuuze okuva mubitundu ebirala batera okugamba nti omukwano mumaka nga ensonga etandikirwako okusenga yoo era abagenyi batera okusanga ekibuga nga kyangu okweyagaliramu nabaana babwe.
entries.english: Residents from other areas often cite family-friendliness as a primary reason for moving there, and visitors often find the city easy to enjoy with children around.

entries.luganda: Mu myaaka egiyise abiri, omuwendo gw’ebyokweloboza kwa baana mu Uptown Charlotteezze yeeyongera.
entries.english: In the past 20 years, the amount of child-friendly options in Uptown Charlotte has grown exponentially.

entries.luganda: Takisi tezikozesebwa bamakka mu Charlotte, wadde nga zandibadde zamugso mu mbeera ezimu.
entries.english: Taxis are not generally used by families in Charlotte, though they can be of some use in certain circumstances.

entries.luganda: Waliwo omuwendo gwosasula olwokuba nabasabaze abasuka mu babiri, kati ekyokusalawo kino kiyinza okuba ekyebbeyi okusinga bwekyetagiisa.
entries.english: There is a surcharge for having more than 2 passengers, so this option might be more expensive than necessary.

entries.luganda: Antarctica kye kifo ekikyasinze obunyogovu mu nsi, atte kyetooloola empagi ze nsi ezomumaserengeta.
entries.english: Antarctica is the coldest place on Earth, and surrounds the South Pole.

entries.luganda: Enkyala zobulambuzi za bbeeyi, zetaaga duyilo, zisobola okubeerawo mumusana wakati wa museenene ne mukutulassanja, era zino ziri mu Peninsula mwokka, nekubuzinga nekumayanja ga Ross.
entries.english: Tourist visits are costly, demand physical fitness, can only take place in summer Nov-Feb, and are largely limited to the Peninsula, Islands and Ross Sea.

entries.luganda: Abakozi nga lukumi basula wanno mu bissera by’omusana, awamu emige ngena okusingira ddala mwebyo ebiffo, abamu basigalawo mu butiti.
entries.english: A couple of thousand staff live here in summer in some four dozen bases mostly in those areas; a small number stay over winter.

entries.luganda: Antarctica eyomunda kifo kikusifu ngebikidwa balaafu abikka 2-3km.
entries.english: Inland Antarctica is a desolate plateau covered by 2-3 km of ice.

entries.luganda: Abakungu be ntambbula y’omubbanga batela okugenda munda ku taaka okulinya mu nsozi oba okutuka ku kasolya akalina beessi enene
entries.english: Occasional specialist air tours go inland, for mountaineering or to reach the Pole, which has a large base.

entries.luganda: Oluguudo kunkomelero y’omumaserengeta (oba hayiwe) luli kukajegere ka 1600km okuva awayimirirwa McMurdo ku guyanja Ross paka welukoma.
entries.english: The South Pole Traverse (or Highway) is a 1600 km trail from McMurdo Station on the Ross Sea to the Pole.

entries.luganda: Kijjudde omuzira ogwenyize era nga awali anjyatika warambiddwa bubendera. Kusobola kutambulrako ttulakita z'omuzira, ezisika amafuta n’ebyetaagisibwa.
entries.english: It's compacted snow with crevasses filled in and marked by flags. It can only be traveled by specialized tractors, hauling sleds with fuel and supplies.

entries.luganda: Bino tebyanguwa nnyo n'olwekyo omukululo gulina okutwaala okukyuusa mu buwanvu okwetoloola kw’ensozi za Transantarctic okufuuka enjazi.
entries.english: These aren't very nimble so the trail has to take a long swerve around the Transantarctic Mountains to come onto the plateau.

entries.luganda: Ekisingira ddala okuleetawo obubenje mu bunyogovu kiva ku kuserera kwa nguudo,ewatambulirwa abantu wamu namadaala.
entries.english: The most common cause for accidents in winter is slippery roads, pavements (sidewalks) and especially steps.

entries.luganda: Ekisookerwaako wetaaga engato elina soole egwaanidde. Engato z’omusana zitela okubeela nga ziseelela mu bunyogovu ne mu muzira, n’engato ezimu ez’obunyogovu zilemelelwa.
entries.english: At a minimum, you need footwear with suitable soles. Summer shoes are usually very slippery on ice and snow, even some winter boots are deficient.

entries.luganda: Ekyokulabirako kirina okukumibwa wansi nnyo mu mm 5 (1/5 inch) oba okusingawo n'ebikozesebwa nga bigonvu ekimala mu mbeera y’obunyogovu.
entries.english: The pattern should be deep enough, 5 mm (1/5 inch) or more, and the material soft enough in cold temperatures.

entries.luganda: Waliyo engato eziriko obuziyiza ate waliyo nebyuma ebiziyiza embeera zobuseelezi, busaana kusibwa kungatto ne buutu, enkondo, oba enkondo ne sole.
entries.english: Some boots have studs and there is studded add-on equipment for slippery conditions, suitable for most shoes and boots, for the heels or heels and sole.

entries.luganda: Obukondo bulina kuba wansi atte nga bugazi. Omusenyu, oluyinja, n’omunyo(Calcium Chloride) bimansirwa kumakkubo nobukubo obutono okusobozesa entambula.
entries.english: Heels should be low and wide. Sand, gravel or salt (calcium chloride) is often scattered on roads or paths to improve traction.

entries.luganda: Omuyaga gwa ayisi tegutiisa nnyo, ensozi zisobola kusitula mutonotono era bwe gusukkamu nga guyiika.
entries.english: Avalanches are not an abnormality; steep slopes can hold only so much slow, and the excess volumes will come down as avalanches.

entries.luganda: Obuzibu buli nti omuzira gukwatira, n'olwekyo gwetaagisa okunyonyogerwa okusobola okukka wansi, era omuzira gukka wansi era guno guyinza okuleetawo omulala okukka.
entries.english: The problem is that snow is sticky, so it needs some triggering to come down, and some snow coming down can be the triggering event for the rest.

entries.luganda: Oluusi ekisookera ddala okuleerawo kinnaakyo gwe musana okubugumiriza omuzira, oluusi omuzira ne gweyongeera, oluusi ebyobutonde ebirara, okusingira ddala omuntu.
entries.english: Sometimes the original trigging event is the sun warming the snow, sometimes some more snowfall, sometimes other natural events, often a human.

entries.luganda: Tornado kolomu eyevulungula erina pulesa yomuka eya wansi, enuuna omuka ogwetolodde munda ne wagulu.
entries.english: A tornado is a spinning column of very low-pressure air, which sucks the surrounding air inward and upward.

entries.luganda: Zireta embuyaga eyamaanyi (bulijjo mayiro100- 200 buli saawa)era esobola okusitula ebintu ebizitowa mu bbanga, nga zibitwaala nga okutambula kwa tornado.
entries.english: They generate high winds (often 100-200 miles/hour) and can lift heavy objects into the air, carrying them as the tornado moves.

entries.luganda: Butandiikiriza nga buweewo okuva mubire nembuyaga, awo nezifuuka ensoke bwezituuka kutaka.
entries.english: They begin as funnels descending from storm clouds, and become "tornadoes" when they touch the ground.

entries.luganda: VPN ekozesebwa omuntu okusobola okufuna omutimbagano okwewala okuziyizibwa mu byobufuzi wamu n'okwewala okumanya wakolera emirimu.
entries.english: Personal VPN (virtual private network) providers are an excellent way of circumventing both political censorship and commercial IP-geofiltering.

entries.luganda: Bali wagulu ku mikutu jebirungo bya yinyaneti lwansonga nyingi: Batereza internet traffic si http yoka.
entries.english: They are superior to web proxies for several reasons: They re-route all Internet traffic, not only http.

entries.luganda: Batera okuwa omutimbagano n’obuweereza obwomulembe . balina ebyuma bingi era nga kizibu okubaketako.
entries.english: They normally offer higher bandwidth and better quality of service. They are encrypted and thus harder to spy on.

entries.luganda: Ebitongole bya amawulire birimba nyo ku nsooga ezekuusa ku kino, nga bagamba nti bagezaako “okuziyiza okukopa okumenya amateeka”.
entries.english: The media companies routinely lie about the purpose of this, claiming that it is to "prevent piracy".

entries.luganda: Mu butuufu, ediini terina ngeri jeekosa kukoppa mu bukyaamu; okukoppa akatono
entries.english: In fact, region codes have absolutely no effect on illegal copying; a bit-for-bit copy of a disk will play just fine on any device where the original will.

entries.luganda: Ensoga enkulu kwekuba nti kampuni zibera n’obuyinza ku butale, sente nezzetololera awo
entries.english: The actual purpose is to give those companies more control over their markets; it's all about money spinning.

entries.luganda: Olwokuba nga amasimu agakubibwa gayungiddwa ku mukutu gwa yintaneti, tewetaga kampuni y’amasiimu wobeera oba nga otambuddemu.
entries.english: Because calls are routed over the Internet, you do not need to use a phone company located where you live or where you travel.

entries.luganda: Tewali kyetaagisibwa nti offune omuwendo okuva ewamwe gyobera; osobola okukozesa omutimbagano omugatta bantu mu binyonyi byenkoko, Alaska n’olondako omuwendo ogulaga nti oli mu ggwanga eryokya erya Arizona.
entries.english: There is also no requirement that you obtain a local number from the community in which you live; you can obtain a satellite Internet connection in the wilds of Chicken, Alaska and select a number which claims you're in sunny Arizona.

entries.luganda: Bulijjo otekedwa okugula enamba yensi yonna ngayanjawulo ngeno ekkiriza PSTN namba okukubira.Ngeno enamba ezikubira zileetawo enjawulo ku bantu abakukubira amasimu.
entries.english: Often, you have to buy a global number separately that allows PSTN phones to call you. Where the number is from makes a difference for people calling you.

entries.luganda: Ebikozesebwa okukyuusa ebyawandiikibwa mubwangu – By’ebikozesebwa ebisobola okukyuusa enyiriri zonna ezekigambo okuva mululimi olumu okudda mululala.
entries.english: Real-time text translator apps – applications that are capable of automatically translating whole segments of text from one language into another.

entries.luganda: Ebimu kubikolebwa mumuteeko guno bisobola n’okukyuusa obubaka mu nimi engwira kububonero oba ebintu ebirala mumbeera yensi eyadala nga omukozesa asonga esimu seereza ku kintu.
entries.english: Some of the applications in this category can even translate texts in foreign languages on signs or other objects in the real world when the user points the smartphone towards those objects.

entries.luganda: Ebyuma eitafuta byeyongedde okutelela nga kati tebikyakola nsobi nyingi nayeolumu bibera nga tebitukilidde n’olwekyo ossanga nga bilinamu ensobi
entries.english: The translation engines have improved dramatically, and now often give more or less correct translations (and more seldom gibberish), but some care is due, as they still may have gotten it all wrong.

entries.luganda: Emu ku aplikessoni ekyasinze ettutumu mu kiti kino ye Google Translate, ekusobozesa okuvuunula yade nga tolina yintaneti bw’obeera ng’omaze okuteekamu ebikwata kululimi lwe weetaga.
entries.english: One of the most prominent apps in this category is Google Translate, which allows offline translation after downloading the desired language data.

entries.luganda: Okukozesa GPS navigation apps ku ssimu kalimagezi eyinza okubeera engeri ekyasinze oba enyangu ennyo ng’otambula wabweru w’ensi yo .
entries.english: Using GPS navigation apps on your smartphone can be the easiest and most convenient way to navigate when out of your home country.

entries.luganda: Kikuyamba okufissa ku kugula maapu za GPS, GPS eyeetongodde oba okupangisa okuva ku kitongole ekipangisa emmotoka
entries.english: It can save money over buying new maps for a GPS, or a standalone GPS device or renting one from a car rental company.

entries.luganda: Bwoba tolina bwobelelela kumpewo ku simuyo, oba nga toli kumpi namukutu, enkola yazo eyinza obutaba nungi oba obutakolera dala.
entries.english: If you don't have a data connection for your phone, or when it is out of range, their performance can be limited or unavailable.

entries.luganda: Buli sitowa y'omukoona ejudde enkalala ezitabula eza kaadi z'essimu ezasasulwa edda ezisobola okukozesebwa ku ssimu ez'okusasula oba essimu eza bulijjo.
entries.english: Every corner store is filled with a confusing array of pre-paid phone cards that can be used from pay phones or ordinary telephones.

entries.luganda: Newankubadde nga kadda ezzimu zikusobolesa okuba amasiimu buli wamu, ezimu zikolebwa nga osobola kuba masimu mu nsi eyo yoka
entries.english: While most cards are good for calling anywhere, some specialise in providing favourable call rates to specific groups of countries.

entries.luganda: Okufuna savisi zino lubeerea oyita ku namba ezitali zakusasulibwa ezisobola okubibwa ku ssimu ezisinga nga tebakusazeko ssente.
entries.english: Access to these services is often through a toll-free telephone number that can be called from most phones without charge.

entries.luganda: Ebiragiro ebifuga enkuba y'ebifaananyi gakola ne mu kukwata ebirikodingibwa n’okusingirawo ddala.
entries.english: Rules regarding regular photography also apply to video recording, possibly even more so.

entries.luganda: Oba okukuba obukubi ekifananyi tekukkirizibwa, tolowooza ku kukwata katambi kaakyo.
entries.english: If just taking a photo of something isn't allowed, then you shouldn't even think of recording a video of it.

entries.luganda: Bwoba okoze akanyonyi akatono, kebera bulungi nga tonnakakozesa okumanya obutambi obukkirizibwa okukwatibwa oba waliwo ne layisinsi endala eyetagisibwa.
entries.english: If using a drone, check well in advance as to what you are allowed to film and what permits or additional licensing are required.

entries.luganda: Okubuusa drone okumpi n’ekisaawe oba wagulu w’abantu abanji kumpi kiba kibbinyo, nebwekibba tekimenya mateeka mukitundukyo.
entries.english: Flying a drone near an airport or over a crowd is almost always a bad idea, even if it's not illegal in your area.

entries.luganda: Ennaku zino kyebonere okwesooka ekifo muntambula y’enyoyi nga tosoose kunnonyereza ku miwendo.
entries.english: Nowadays air travel is only rarely booked directly through the airline without first searching and comparing prices.

entries.luganda: Oluusi enyonyi emu eyinza okuba n’ebisale ebyenjawulo okusinziila kubanonyereza ab’enjawulo era ofunamu okugelagelanya ebiva mukunoonyereza n’okukebera kumutimbagano gw’enyonyi eyo nga tonaba kujeekwata.
entries.english: Sometimes the same flight can have vastly differing prices at various agregators and it pays to compare search results and to also look at the website of the airline itself before booking.

entries.luganda: Newankubadde nga tewetagga viza nga oggendda kubera mu nsi ezimu okumala ebbanga ttono, bwoba oggenda ng’omusomi, wettaga viza eyebbanga elisingawo
entries.english: While you may not need a visa for short visits to certain countries as a tourist or for business, going there as an international student generally requires a longer stay than going there just as a casual tourist.

entries.luganda: Okutwalira awamu, okubeera munsi yonna engwiira okwongerayo ekiseera kija kukwetagisa okufuna visa nga bukyaali.
entries.english: In general, staying in any foreign country for an extended period of time will require you to obtain a visa in advance.

entries.luganda: Viza z’abasomi zitera okubeera n’ebyetaago ebyenjawulo era ebyokuzisaba byawukana ku viza z'abalambuzi oba abasuubuzi.
entries.english: Student visas generally have different requirements and application procedures from normal tourist or business visas.

entries.luganda: Munsi ezisinga, ogyakwetaaga ebaluwa gyebakuwa okuva mu kitongole gyoyagala okusomera era n'obukakafu bw'ensimbi ezinakuyambako okumala omwaka gumu wakiri ogusooka.
entries.english: For most countries, you will need an offer letter from the institution you wish to study at, and also evidence of funds to support yourself for at least the first year of your course.

entries.luganda: Kebera ne kitongole, era ne ekitongole kyentambula ekyensi gyoyagala okusomeramu okufuna ebyetagisa byonna.
entries.english: Check with the institution, as well as the immigration department for the country you wish to study in for detailed requirements.

entries.luganda: Okujjako nga oli mukungu, naye okukolera mu nsi endala kitegeza nti oja kusasula omusolo mweyo ensi gyolimu.
entries.english: Unless you are a diplomat, working overseas generally means that you will have to file income tax in the country you are based in.

entries.luganda: Omusolo ku musaala gusengekeddwa mu ngeri yanjawulo mu buli gwanga, era n’emiwendo gy'emisolo n’ebibinja byawukana okuva ku nsi emu okudda ku ndala.
entries.english: Income tax is structured differently in different countries, and the tax rates and brackets vary widely from one country to another.

entries.luganda: Munsi ezimu ezirina federo, nga United States ne Canada, omusolo kumusaala gugibwaako kudaala lya federo nekudaala erya bulijjo, nolweekyo ebibiina n’emiwendo jawukana okuva kukitundu ekimu okudda kukilala.
entries.english: In some federal countries, such as the United States and Canada, income tax is levied both at the federal level and at the local level, so the rates and brackets can vary from region to region.

entries.luganda: Naye nga okukeberwa na abebyokwelinda bwe bitatera kubaawo oba nga tekwetagisibwa bw'otuuka ku butaka, abakebera emigugu bisumbuyira ddala.
entries.english: While immigration check is usually absent or a formality when you arrive in your homeland, customs control can be a hassle.

entries.luganda: Kakasa nti omanya byolina okuyingiza ne byotasanye kuyingiza okwewala okumenya amateka.
entries.english: Make sure you know what you can and cannot bring in and declare anything over the legal limits.

entries.luganda: Engeri enyangu eyokutandika mu bizinesi eyo kuwandiika ebyentambula kwe kuyunga obukugu bwo Ku mutimbagano gwa blog ogwebyentambula ogunywezeddwa
entries.english: The easiest way to get started in the business of travel writing is to hone your skills on an established travel blog website.

entries.luganda: Nga omaze okufuuka omukugu n'okutereeza n'okusunsula ku webu, kati oluvanyuma, osobola okukola webu eyiyo ey'obwananyini.
entries.english: After you become comfortable with formatting and editing on the web, then later, you might create your own website.

entries.luganda: Okukola obwanakyewa ng’otambula kirungi okukyuusa ekifo naye obwanakyewa tebuba bwakuwa buwi.
entries.english: Volunteering while travelling is a great way to make a difference but it's not just about giving.

entries.luganda: Okubeera nokukola obwa nakyeewa munsi engwiira ngeri yamanyi okumanya obuwangwa obw'enjawulo, osisinkana abantu abapya oyiga kubulamu bwo, ofuna engeri gy'olabamu era nofuna obukugu obupya.
entries.english: Living and volunteering in a foreign country is a great way to get to know a different culture, meet new people, learn about yourself, get a sense of perspective and even gain new skills.

entries.luganda: Nayo yandiba engeri nnungi okuwaanvuya embalirira okusobola okuwaangaliira awantu kubanga emirimu gy’obwanakyeewa gyikuwa awookusula ate mitono gikusasula omusaala omutono.
entries.english: It can also be a good way to stretch a budget to allow a longer stay somewhere since many volunteer jobs provide room and board and a few pay a small salary.

entries.luganda: Aba Vikings bakozesa ensulo za ba Russia, okudayo ku nnyanja enzirugavu ne ennyanja eya Caspian. Ebitundu ebimu ku nnyanja zino bikya sobola okukozesebwa. Noonya tikiti ezenjawuolo ezikuwa olukusa, naye kiyinza okubeera ekizibu.
entries.english: Vikings used the Russian waterways to get to the Black Sea and Caspian Sea. Parts of these routes can still be used. Check possible need for special permits, which may be difficult to get.

entries.luganda: Omukutu gwa ssemayanja enjeru Sea-Baltic guyunga ssemayanja Arctic ku ssemayanja Baltic nga guyita munyanja ya Onega, Ladoga ne Saint Petersburg okusingira dala emiiga n’enyanja.
entries.english: The White Sea–Baltic Canal connects the Arctic Ocean to the Baltic Sea, via Lake Onega, Lake Ladoga and Saint Petersburg, mostly by rivers and lakes.

entries.luganda: Enyanja ya Onega era eyungidwa ku Volga n’olwekyo okugira kussemayanja Caspian ng’oyita mu Russia kikyasoboka.
entries.english: Lake Onega is also connected to Volga, so coming from the Caspian Sea through Russia is still possible.

entries.luganda: Gwe berra mugumu nti olutuka mu Marinas, buli kimu kijja kubera kyangu. Ojjakusangayo abasabiriza okutambulira ku'maato kubwelere era bajjakuwa bwino mungi.
entries.english: Be assured that once you hit the marinas everything will be pretty obvious. You will meet other boat hitchhikers and they will share their information with you.

entries.luganda: Okusingila ddala ojja kuwanika obulango obugamba nti owa obuyambi, otambule tambule ku mwalo, otuukire abalongoosa amaato gabwe, ogezeeko okukwatagana n'abalunnyanja mu bbaala wamu n'ebirala bingi.
entries.english: Basically you'll be putting up notices offering your help, pacing the docks, approaching people cleaning their yachts, trying to make contact with sailors in the bar, etc.

entries.luganda: Gezaako okwogerako n'abantu abawerako nga bwekisoboka. Oluvannyuma lw'akabanga abantu bajja kukumanya era bakutemyeeko ku lyato erinoonya omuntu yenna.
entries.english: Try to talk to as many people as possible. After a while everyone will know you and will give you hints as to which boat is looking for someone.

entries.luganda: Otekedwa okulonda enyonyi ekutambuza mu kibiina kyazo nobwegendereza.
entries.english: You should choose your Frequent Flyer airline in an alliance carefully.

entries.luganda: Wadde nga olowozza nti ky’amagezi okwegatta ku kitongole ky’enyonyi gyosinga okozessa, olin’okumanya nti ebyeddembe byofuna mu buli nyonyi byawukana buli wamu era biyinza okubera ebilungi awamu oba nedda newankubadde nga enyonyi zili mu kitongole kyekimu
entries.english: Although you may think it is intuitive to join the airline you fly most, you should be aware that privileges offered are often different and frequent flyer points may be more generous under a different airline in the same alliance.

entries.luganda: Kampuni z’Enyonyi nga Emirates, Etihad, Qatar Ne Turkish zeyongedde mu mpereza zabwe nga z’ongela okugatta ensi eziri wano ku lukalu lwa Bufirika ku bbeyi ensamusamu okusinga kampuni z’enyonyi e bungereza
entries.english: Airlines such as Emirates, Etihad Airways, Qatar Airways & Turkish Airlines have greatly expanded their services to Africa, and offer connections to many major African cities at competitive rates than other European airlines.

entries.luganda: Ekitongole ky’enyonyi ya Butuluuki entogole egenda mubiffo 39 mu lukalu lwa Afilika ensi 30 okusinziila ku 2014.
entries.english: Turkish Airlines flies to 39 destinations in 30 African countries as of 2014.

entries.luganda: Bwoba okyalina obudde bw'okutambula, kebeera olabe ebisale ebikugereddwa okugenda mu Afirika ogerageranye n'ebisale by'ensi yonna.
entries.english: If you have additional travel time, check to see how your total fare quote to Africa compares with a round-the-world fare.

entries.luganda: Tewelabila okugatako ebisale ebirala eby’obutuuze, emisolo ejokufuluma, okutambulila kutaka, nebirala ebyebitundu ebitali mu Afilika.
entries.english: Don't forget to add in the extra costs of additional visas, departure taxes, ground transportation, etc. for all those places outside of Africa.

entries.luganda: Bwobeera oyagala okubuuka okwetoolola ensi mu maserengeta,okulonda enyonyi ezikubuusa ne gyolaga zibeera ntono olwokuba nti tewali makubo gayita mu ga semayanja.
entries.english: If you want to fly around the world completely in the Southern Hemisphere, the choice of flights and destinations is limited due to the lack of transoceanic routes.

entries.luganda: Tewali mukago gwa nyonyi gubika zisemayanja ezisala mu maserengeta ga Hemisphere (namukago gwa nyonyi gutwaala wezisaliramu).
entries.english: No airline alliance covers all three ocean crossings in the Southern Hemisphere (and SkyTeam covers none of the crossings).

entries.luganda: Wabula naye, Star Alliance evunaanibwa ku buli kimu okujjako obuvanjuba bwa South Pacific okuva e Santiago de Chile paka e Tahiti, oluli olugendo lumu olwe LATAM Oneworld.
entries.english: However, Star Alliance covers everything except the eastern South Pacific from Santiago de Chile to Tahiti, which is a LATAM Oneworld flight.

entries.luganda: Eno si y'ennyonyi yokka bwoba nga toyagala kuyimirira mu makirira ga Pacific n’ebugwanjuba bwa America yomumaserengeta.(laba wamanga)
entries.english: This flight is not the only option if you want to skip the South Pacific and the west coast of South America. (see below)

entries.luganda: Mu mwaka gwa 1994, eggwanga lya Armenia Nagorno-Karabakh erya Azerbaijan baatandikawo olutalo kuba Zeris.
entries.english: In 1994, the ethnically Armenian Nagorno-Karabakh region of Azerbaijan waged war against the Azeris.

entries.luganda: Nga balina okuwagirwa kwa Armenia, ensi endala yatondebwa, naye tewali nsi yagiraba nga ensi eyetongodde nga omwo mwe muli Armenia.
entries.english: With Armenian backing, a new republic was created. However, no established nation - not even Armenia - officially recognizes it.

entries.luganda: Enkayana z’abakungu mukitundu zongera ku satulula nkolagana wakati wa Armenia ne Azerbaijan.
entries.english: Diplomatic arguments over the region continue to mar relations between Armenia and Azerbaijan.

entries.luganda: Disitulikiti ye Canal (bu Dutch: Grachtengordel) yesinga okumanyibwa mu zzetolodde Binnenstad ye Amsterdam.
entries.english: The Canal District (Dutch: Grachtengordel) is the famous 17th-century district surrounding the Binnenstad of Amsterdam.

entries.luganda: Disitulikiti yonna yafulibwa kifo kya UNESCO ekyobulambuzi kyensi yonna kubanga kya njawulo mu muwendo gw'eby'obuwangwa n'ebyafaayo nomuwendo gw'ebintu by'ebimu kubya waggulu munsi.
entries.english: The whole district is designated as a UNESCO World Heritage Site for its unique cultural and historical value, and its property values are among the highest of the country.

entries.luganda: Cinque Terre, ekitegeeza amataka ataano, elina obwaalo butaano obw'okulubalama obutono obwa Riomaggiore, manarola, corniglia, Vernazza ne Monterosso ekiri mu rigoni ya Yitale eya Liguria
entries.english: Cinque Terre, which means Five Lands, comprises the five small coastal villages of Riomaggiore, Manarola, Corniglia, Vernazza and Monterosso located in the Italian region of Liguria.

entries.luganda: Bali ku lukalala lwa UNESCO olw’ensikirano y’ensi.
entries.english: They are listed on the UNESCO World Heritage List.

entries.luganda: Okumala ebyasa, abantu babade bazimbye ensalosalo kunsozi, obuserengeto byetaka okwambukira dala kunsozi ezitunudde musemayanja.
entries.english: Over the centuries, people have carefully built terraces on the rugged, steep landscape right up to the cliffs that overlook the sea.

entries.luganda: Ebimu ku magezi gabwe bwebutaba n’ankulakulana erabikibwako. Obukubo, ggaaliz’omukka n’amaato zezigata ebyalo, ate emotoka ezebweru tezituuka yo.
entries.english: Part of its charm is the lack of visible corporate development. Paths, trains and boats connect the villages, and cars cannot reach them from the outside.

entries.luganda: Ennimi ez’Obufalaansa enza enjawulo ezoogerwa mu Belgium ne Switzerland zikyuukamu katono okuva ku Lufalansa olwoogerwa e bufaransa, newankubadde zifaanagana nnyo okuzaawula
entries.english: The varieties of French which are spoken in Belgium and Switzerland differ slightly from the French spoken in France, though they are similar enough to be mutually intelligible.

entries.luganda: Mubuliwo, enkola eyo kulambiika ensi ezogela olufalansa Belgium ne Switzerland bayina obuntu obutono obutafanaga mu kw’ogera olufalasa nga bwe lw’ogerebwa mu France,era nenjogera yalwo eye biganbo njawufu.
entries.english: In particular, the numbering system in French-speaking Belgium and Switzerland has some slight peculiarities that are different from the French spoken in France, and the pronunciation of some words is slightly different.

entries.luganda: Wadde kyali kityo Ababirigi naba Swiss abogera olufalansa bandiyize olufalansa olutuufu musomero olwo basobole okukutegeera nebwoba okozeseza embala y’enamba enambike eyolufalansa.
entries.english: Nevertheless, all French-speaking Belgians and Swiss would have learned standard French in school, so they would be able to understand you even if you used the standard French numbering system.

entries.luganda: Mu bifo bingi mu nsi, okuwuba emikono yengeri y’okulagamu omukwano “owaye”.
entries.english: In many parts of the world, waving is a friendly gesture, indicating "hello."

entries.luganda: Newankubadde e Malaysia mubanansi mu byalo, kitegeza nti jangu eno, nga olugalo lwomumakati nga luweteddwa okudda eri omubiri, kino kikolebwa mu nsi ze bulaya naye kilina kozesebwa kulwensoga zino zoka
entries.english: However, in Malaysia, at least among the Malays in rural areas, it means "come over," similar to the index finger bent toward the body, a gesture which is used in certain Western countries, and should be used only for that purpose.

entries.luganda: Era okwefaananiriza, Omungereza mu Sipayini ayinza obutategela kya kumuwubila mukono nga amusibula singa engalo ebera etunudde bweru, omutu gwebawubila ayinza okukitwala nga gwebayita okukomawo
entries.english: Similarly, a British traveller in Spain may mistake a wave goodbye involving the palm facing the waver (rather than the person being waved at) as a gesture to come back.

entries.luganda: Ennimi za malala siza butonde oba ennimi ezizimbibwa nga zikolebwa ku mukutu gwa yintaneti okuyamba empuliziganya wakati w'abantu abayinza okuba n'obuzibu mumpuliziganya.
entries.english: Auxiliary languages are artificial or constructed languages created with the intent of facilitating communication between peoples who would otherwise have difficulty communicating.

entries.luganda: Byanjawulo okuva Ku lulimi Franca's, ennimi ezobutonde ezifuuka enfuzi olw'ensonga emu oba endala nga engeri y'okuwuliziganya wakati w'abogezi b'ennimi endala.
entries.english: They are separate from lingua francas, which are natural or organic languages that become dominant for one reason or another as means of communication between speakers of other languages.

entries.luganda: Mu mutima gw’olunaku, abatambuze balaba ebifaanani ebyamazzi nga balowooza nti mazzi(oba ebintu ebirala).
entries.english: In the heat of the day, travelers can experience mirages that give the illusion of water (or other things).

entries.luganda: Kino kiyinja okubeera ekyatabu singa abatambuze bafuna olugendo, kwonona amanyi n’amazzi agasigadewo.
entries.english: These can be dangerous if the traveler pursue the mirage, wasting precious energy and remaining water.

entries.luganda: N’eddungu erisinga okwokya lisobola okunnyogoga ennyo ekiro. Obulwadde bwa obunyogovu bulabe bwennyini awatali ngoye zibuguma.
entries.english: Even the hottest of deserts can become extremely cold at night. Hypothermia is a real risk without warm clothing.

entries.luganda: Mu biseera by’omusana, okusingira ddala, olina okubeera bulindaala okwewala ensiri bwosalawo okutambulirako mu Kibira kyenkuba.
entries.english: In summer, especially, you'll need to watch out for mosquitoes if you decide to hike through the rainforest.

entries.luganda: Nebwoobanga ovugira mu bibira ebililaanye equator, obutikitiki butono nga enzigi nzigule nga oyingila mumotoka zimala ensiri okuyingira mumotoka naawe.
entries.english: Even if you're driving through the subtropical rainforest, a few seconds with the doors open while you get inside the vehicle is enough time for mosquitoes to get in the vehicle with you.

entries.luganda: Senyiga w’ebinyonyi oba tugambe avia influenza akwata ebinyonyi n’ensolo wamu.
entries.english: Bird flu, or more formally avian influenza, can infect both birds and mammals.

entries.luganda: Emisango emitono egikka wa nsi w'olulukumi gyegyaali gyakalopwa mu bantu, naye egimu kujjo gy'egibadde egy'amaanyi.
entries.english: Fewer than a thousand cases have ever been reported in humans, but some of them have been fatal.

entries.luganda: Abasinga babitaddemu abantu abakola mu byenkonko, naye era waliwo obulabe obutonotono eri abalaba ebinyonyi.
entries.english: Most have involved people who work with poultry, but there is also some risk to birdwatchers.

entries.luganda: Ekyo kya bulijjo mu Norway okubeeramu ebiwonvu n'emigga nga bino biwa ekkubo eri ebiwanvu, kyenkana eri omusetwe.
entries.english: Typical for Norway are steep fjords and valleys that suddenly give way to a high, more or less even plateau.

entries.luganda: Ebifo ebyolukalu bimanyiddwa nga “vidde” ekitegezza awagazzi, awelele era nga tewakomenkelela.
entries.english: These plateaus are often referred to as "vidde" meaning a wide, open treeless space, a boundless expanse.

entries.luganda: Mu Rogaland ne Agder, bagiyita “Hei” ekitegezza ensozi omutali miti egibikidwa .
entries.english: In Rogaland and Agder they are usually called "hei" meaning a treeless moorland often covered in heather.

entries.luganda: Glaciers teziri wamu, naye zikulukuta wansi w'olusozi, kino kija Ku leeta enjatika, enjatika mu balaafu ezisobola okusikilizibwa n'entindo z'omuzira.
entries.english: The glaciers are not stable, but flow down the mountain. This will cause cracks, crevasses, which may be obscured by snow bridges.

entries.luganda: Ebisenge n’akasolya by'empuku za ayisi zisobola okubomoka n'enjatika ne zigalwa.
entries.english: The walls and roofs of ice caves can collapse and cracks can get closed.

entries.luganda: Ku museetwe gwa glaciers amabulooka bwaguuga gamenyeka, negagwa era olumu gabuuka oba negatambula okwesuula akabanga ku museetwe.
entries.english: At the edge of glaciers huge blocks break loose, fall down and perhaps jump or roll farther from the edge.

entries.luganda: Ekiseera kyokulambula ebifo byomu nsozi kirondebwa mu Luwumula lwa Buyindi.
entries.english: The tourist season for the hill stations generally peaks during the Indian summer.

entries.luganda: Newankubadde , bilina obulunji obwenjawulo mu biseera by'obutiti , n’ebifo binji ebyo munsozi nga zifuna omuzira munji era nga bisobozesa emizzanyo gya mu muzira.
entries.english: However, they have a different kind of beauty and charm during winter, with many hill stations receiving healthy amounts of snow and offering activities such as skiing and snowboarding.

entries.luganda: Kampuni z’ennyonyi ntono nnyo ezikyagaba ebisale ku miwendo ng’ofiriddwa, era kisinga kusalirako ku bisale by’olumbe.
entries.english: Only a few airlines still offer bereavement fares, which slightly discount the cost of last-minute funeral travel.

entries.luganda: Enyonyi eziwa binno mulimu Air Canada, Delta Airlines, Lufthansa kw’ezo eziva mu U.S. oba Canada, ne Westjet.
entries.english: Airlines that offer these include Air Canada, Delta Air Lines, Lufthansa for flights originating from the U.S. or Canada, and WestJet.

entries.luganda: Mu buli mbeera yonna, oteekeddwa okubukinga buteerevu n'abennyonyi ng'okozesa essimu.
entries.english: In all cases, you must book by phone directly with the airline.
